name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zum7p5g9raipogcte9tlumsmvljqsqoh6qlcffj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3v0h201avglu3mln7labc4l4qc1h4gloeud1nag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo33mkllke5ju2kc8gph0tpjk9k9kmjh9aelmvf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3i7fhutuk1gm5vt5db445ia0g5kqd1njm568g28_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za2631ocrg1ojfsol6mvkea6repdqk5qsalj738g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvhhrpi3oeog6s9gcpjgsrsidtrrenfi78r8lg08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvkng50pqk4snv9b6288h416mrrjs3rcmidlj2oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqorbbbp2211am076jipq264r86pvdsj86gf8sao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqmds9p5tbeki1s9ai1iatbvfhb330m25jtdve8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob3c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The Untapped Power of Christian Voters
body:
Chad Connelly has built a network of nearly 20,000 churches that are registering voters, promoting biblical values, and engaging Christians like never before.
| | | |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31be)

| Patriot-

---
| **** What if the key to saving America isn't found in Washington -- but in your local church?
[In the latest episode](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31c0 "In the latest episode") of _The Jenny Beth Show_ , I sit down with Chad Connelly, Founder and CEO of Faith Wins, to expose how pastors and churches across the country are quietly transforming elections -- one voter registration drive at a time.
Chad has built a network of nearly 20,000 churches that are registering voters, promoting biblical values, and engaging Christians like never before.
If you've ever wondered, _what can I do_ to help save our country -- this episode will show you exactly where to start.
Watch now: _[**Register. Vote. Win. The Church 's Role in Saving America**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31c2 "Register. Vote. Win. The Church’s Role in Saving America")_
__************ **__** **** ************
---
| **** Together, we can mobilize millions of Christian voters who share our values of faith, freedom, and limited government.
Don't miss this important conversation.
In liberty,
Jenny Beth __************ **__** **** ************
---
| **** **** ******P.S. Don 't miss these recent episodes of _The Jenny Beth Show_ :**
> ▶ _[Fighting IRS Abuse and Winning: Clyde 's Battle for Liberty](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31c4 "Fighting IRS Abuse and Winning: Clyde’s Battle for Liberty")_Congressman Andrew Clyde (GA-9) shares how he's taking on the IRS and defending your freedoms.
> ▶ _[The Left 's Legal War on Election Integrity](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31c6 "The Left’s Legal War on Election Integrity")_Hans von Spakovsky of Heritage Foundation exposes how the Left is weaponizing the legal system against election integrity.
> ▶ _[How Media Lies Led to the WalkAway Movement](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31c8 "How Media Lies Led to the WalkAway Movement")_ Brandon Straka, Founder of #WalkAway, shares his story of leaving the Left and building a movement for truth.

[**Catch up on all episodes.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa8ae7b0/1edb9794aa8a31ca "Catch up on all episodes.")

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0mds6cluta77ebtq6f3ot4bkdv41t5ni37eagi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob1cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ne58mvcggtlnirh12v80d9sosmeivvene73t5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob1cth2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkmtnp4airtbg19jos0cj9g1fjnihcsa161sa630_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm0ob1cth2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Stop DEI Lunacy
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zninu5hm6rhj2cj00s625v18pmhpj4dhtormnv2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm8pj6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4pd47f8hffmjih4vdp2rh7qq1f2v91hsuculj4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm8pj6cdh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmof6and057og5j9nrf3rd49jff4blr22r0mohj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm8pj6cdh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1tkgqh7dt8hjvbgfm3heqbjbdaf3ignkqidqpd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o36cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlrio35r7l4vlev97b7crs2dmsh9nb7ccjv9fah8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o36cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpp2bofh9garucqnt7q3782ktgciehnb2qp7trag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o36cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zracqivqc6udhf1jdmcq6g77j1mhq1tt08sd3ng0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o36cph2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp5es8cp5s5g28h0n5lmssd3evjfkh1dtkjfu7lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o36cph2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9o0ghukidt1stoto591mmq6me52mjc5qu0fv3o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o31c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6269cgg310tmvpf7a0lhjnr4hqetnh2vetjjm40_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o31c1h2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztlb39jrt6s29tjdapcemrocmeb1dd3u9b87os80_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2o31c1h2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

# **[Pope Francis makes surprise visit to Regina Coeli prison on Holy Thursday](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Pope Francis meets with inmates in a surprise visit to the Regina Coeli Prison on Holy Thursday, April 17, 2025, in Rome. / Credit: Vatican Media Vatican City, Apr 17, 2025 / 12:30 pm (CNA). Pope Francis, still recovering after his recent hospitalization for double pneumonia, made a surprise visit to Rome’s Regina Coeli prison on Holy Thursday, continuing his long-standing tradition of beginning the paschal Triduum with prisoners despite his ongoing health concerns.The unannounced visit took place shortly before 3 p.m. local time. According to the Vatican, the pope met with approximately 70 inmates who regularly participate in activities and catechesis organized by the prison’s chaplaincy.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjqdb186h30n7796fdpr1dcg1vk9visadv05cano_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2p74clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqccr7vrmcesc0sfseeg0tjb2fpqchv6jbr7i15o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2p74clh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfhmtoqhh9jhsfld39389urqr7aspihee0ovn928_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjm2p74clh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z29j3h3mclokiabkkkut791ikfjcvepdp8h20ug8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjmeor0cdh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3shl4gf18l3hfls8ukrgp9ut6n7ssr9kg4llss0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjmeor0cdh2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoe7icri5akekfq1m92ijpghi8qrhtgv38oluh58_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjjmeor0cdh2bs)**

Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition: **The WiFi Spy Cam**. **Pocket-Sized Powerhouse** : Gone are the days when surveillance cameras were bulky and noticeable. Our WiFi Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Designed for seamless remote monitoring, this compact device lets you keep an eye on what matters most in real time. Whether you’re at work, on vacation, or just in another room, its WiFi capabilities ensure you’re always in control. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1775, [Paul Revere and William Dawes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUz81qxCAYheGr0d0E_xKThYtCmd10W-hGjH5GixOn0SR49yW9g27PgQfez4d-mJjiunyYJ6jqs_ZlLyHnGtdlNnOzOeVSTCo_mhHW34i40VE7E1PTAjvlARhwDIpKISZJRj7hoKi1nnLXT5yDBeG4FNPY-9FS3zMgFkd1aUTQkRIiqezsNA-DZ7OhA2fMOyQIuFjz1n3nuNYAPrV8wNbZ_MRJhVpfBfE3xO6I3c_z7Fre6z7D9V-LqTYgfj8Qfw9yX-TX2nTLeFPudcaUYhkkEmR5mpj-yPr_-EOx3wAAAP__CwVpDg) rode out from Boston on their famous ride, alerting Colonial leaders about British soldiers planning a mission to remove arms and supplies from the countryside. A growing number of high schools are now [“sleep training” teenagers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0LHO3CAQBOCnsTtOsHDgKyjSXPenTWktsNhEa-MYcqd7-8h5g78cjTT6NL--5i8sXPblJ27ke65zbn_bWmsv-xIwfGLl2hpy-zODhLuQRqhpTlj4M5sx-UwEpEfyyhnzcHLSj3H1Exh9n6xVKspwz85EZa1NKdmAEzkai7_WpFGTktIpd4uPYG2GgMpqgJwGIymVXs_b71r2vlLmT33ReYt1G9mvvR9t0D8GeA7wxGOnd7uqK5y9RKYBno2JDtGJdlzoFK3Ggiw2SgXFRntHFish91U4HQM5m5ICIMAY0iWJFknp6LIeT5-Od2EuzbrByGXDwv8p_funvTz8CwAA__-bcHud), recognizing that better rest can mean better mental health and academic success. And let’s be honest—most of us could probably use a little sleep training, too. ## FSU Shooting Leaves 2 Dead, 6 Injured
Two people were killed and six others injured Thursday when a 20-year-old Florida State University student opened fire near the campus [student union in Tallahassee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLGurCAYhJ8GOwz8oGhBcRu7ve0tDcqP_jes7BFW49ufuDkvcLovmclkZv49xoejSNvy1z3RlpDGkN95TanQtkxuuuYUU84u5q8RBDRcaC670TuK16grbwMioKrQSqN1b0Sn-mq1EKBXTmOjHARnhFe68UKbThqFwrcV2TtNaNlJIYw09dxPbRtgcrJVAMEzLdBTSXv9P9FWVgzxSgfu9ZyeVbRrKa_M1B8GA4PhPM96m-YNz3zrDIYbGQzvzH8o0oF8imlhMISYdvKO5-IK8vdGB-6ZysXdXG7bZz_ufJ83B0Kapq12618nxUi5NUyL5ekofqqU3592WPgOAAD__-4ZfNY). The suspect, Phoenix Ikner—identified as the son of a longtime Leon County sheriff’s deputy—was shot by responding officers and hospitalized. Authorities say he used weapons [connected to his mother](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLtqxDAURL9G7mT08qtQEQjuNk0IKY1sXdk3aK2NdNeL_z7s_kHaGRjmnO_LdHEYcV8_3BUshTSFci9bSoT7Orv5XFJMpbhYficlVMOF4bKfvMN4TqbyNgAo0BVY2RkzdKLXQ7VZ0_fateC0H5q-N-28NL4ToTWuaeQy6wrtc00Y2UshOtnVyzC3bVCzk61WKnhmBHiklOufhDttEOKZDsj1kq5VtBvRrTD9xtTI1OjmZYdHqdf0rJkavz6f6UJ4AH_RQOYZbikTeB5iyugdL-QI-H3HA3JBOnkod-4iZGJqLJTyyfSInul3qcQgpRZDla2_PTBGLG3HjFivDuPrEv1f3mHVXwAAAP__1hh-1Q), who has served with the department for over 18 years. Witnesses described chaos as students fled or barricaded classrooms. One bystander said the gunman exited an orange Hummer with a rifle, then returned for a handgun before firing at random. Police say the area remains an active crime scene. The motive is still under investigation by local, state, and federal agencies.
## Judge: Google Ran Illegal Ad Monopoly
A federal judge ruled Thursday that [Google violated antitrust law](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0D2unTAQxfHVmM5XxvjyUbhIQ_fSpkRjPAY_DQxhzI3YfUR2kPpIPx39f31NX5Ap78tP2NCXxFOSS1bmkvclQLhnJhYBkt-TNfatjdN1P0XIdE-uij4hWmwq9HXn3NCZvhmq1ccU-960A5rWNe_hDZBCaIcYUm_esbdV9o9mXN3XxnR195qH0LbJBqjbxtoUlTMYc-Hz9c15LysmuvmD52vmrSK_lnKIan4oOyo77vfBUp5J2fGBlR2NU3asO2XHcEneUUTZcWFeCDUfeEJB0ZkIFyANUW-888GUUXRZoWi5ghTYSwaiW69wbhj1fEnhDU_R31dcUJ8X4eNWp4_Hn0yUpe2UM8sGmf5dLf8f9ePt3wAAAP__R1OIjQ) by monopolizing two key markets in digital advertising—publisher ad servers and ad exchanges. Judge Leonie Brinkema found Google abused its ad dominance and "substantially harmed" competitors and online publishers who depend on ad dollars. While the [court upheld Google’s past acquisitions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWYGrsgaGLt3TtaPFxsYmuuWkgsfL2VfoGnY_009H_-7JeXMZcti93gG2J1lQfdSdquWze-VcgpFod1p9VCfXBheZyWqPL-Fp1F20CUDB0YKXRejZiGuZut8McpXHzkFyQxunJpzRLH5KPcnYGhi7btya0nKQQRpo-zH4ck_JOjoNSKTItIOZG9_5KubQdEr7oCfc-0NGh3Vu7VTZ8MrUwtZzn2Yfiw3tkannTTC1CM7VIw9RyfcQNeMolVr4RbQh8J4yVZ0TYHHIqmAtwF3mDsPODCt0IM9R-bwd2dxtvZ0bMdTRMi-1wGf-OtP8ne1r1GwAA___meHui) of DoubleClick and Admeld, it concluded the company’s ongoing behavior entrenched its power unfairly. The case now heads to a penalty phase, with the Justice Department expected to push for a breakup of parts of Google’s ad business.
## Scientists Find Signs of Extra-Terrestrial Life
A Cambridge team has found the strongest sign yet of [potential alien life on a world known as K2-18b](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUz71u6yAYxvGrgS0WvIAxA8NZvOWsHS0-XmJSYlJDY-XuK_cOuj3SI_2k_8d1ubpc8nb77x5oe6pLat9trbXn7eadf4daamuutK8FGKgLkxc-LdHl8l4kjTYhAgqKlmspjWaTMHS13Eg0SgWMWivUYvQmxagmZSBK7yLN9tSY5BNnTHM9BOPHMYF3fBQAKRLJMOZe9-Fe89ZXTOVdX7gPoT5osWvvz0bEPwIzgfk4jsH7cH4E5g2PRmB2e8-h4DmDMPe7eX3uQla62_g8cim5jZpIdnu4XH7V_vf-l4WfAAAA__8ShGmQ)—a planet over twice Earth’s size, eight times its mass, and orbiting in its star's habitable zone 124 light-years from Earth. Using NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope, researchers spotted the [molecules dimethyl sulphide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkL1urDAQRp8GOiN78PJTuLgN3d4mkVKiwR7DRMbeYGcRbx9t3iDdJ33S0dH5uM935MBx_Y87meLT7PN33lIqHNcFl8umkHLGkL9mkHATUgs1zA45XLOunfFEQG1NRvVaj70c2rHejHYk_aBl38KAt85LrRe_EGgcbWdVW7N50aRWg5KyV31jx6XrPCyouhbAu0pLclzS0XwmjmUjH670pKOxaa-D2Up55Kr9V8FUwYSLjXTmZk2vu4LpnewWU0jrVcF08kFvJR2vnS1TLJxLFp6jE3ajnS0GkXmNWQT2JDweeOIlHgEjFaFAjnK8jV19GPc4OQTOXV9pue7I4den_L3c08BPAAAA___Ijn6s) (DMS) and dimethyl disulphide (DMDS), which, on Earth, are produced solely by simple marine life. While the findings mark a significant leap from previous data, the results are still short of scientific confirmation, with a confidence level of 99.7%—shy of the 99.99999% “discovery” threshold. The planet’s atmosphere suggests the presence of a vast ocean, but researchers caution that non-living processes might explain the gas signatures. More data is expected within the next year or two.

clean_body: Two people were killed and six others injured Thursday when a 20-year-old Florida State University student opened fire near the campus . | | | | | | Friday, April 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1775, rode out from Boston on their famous ride, alerting Colonial leaders about British soldiers planning a mission to remove arms and supplies from the countryside. A growing number of high schools are now , recognizing that better rest can mean better mental health and academic success. And let’s be honest—most of us could probably use a little sleep training, too. Read more in Et Cetera below. Mistake Tracking: Thursday’s issue mistakenly referred to President Trump as “former president.” Of course, President Trump is the current president. That was a typo and not intended, and our proofreaders didn't catch the error. We apologize for the mistake. Today's sponsor is , offering a unique investment opportunity for you. | FSU Shooting Leaves 2 Dead, 6 Injured Two people were killed and six others injured Thursday when a 20-year-old Florida State University student opened fire near the campus . The suspect, Phoenix Ikner—identified as the son of a longtime Leon County sheriff’s deputy—was shot by responding officers and hospitalized. Authorities say he used weapons , who has served with the department for over 18 years. Witnesses described chaos as students fled or barricaded classrooms. One bystander said the gunman exited an orange Hummer with a rifle, then returned for a handgun before firing at random. Police say the area remains an active crime scene. The motive is still under investigation by local, state, and federal agencies. Judge: Google Ran Illegal Ad Monopoly A federal judge ruled Thursday that by monopolizing two key markets in digital advertising—publisher ad servers and ad exchanges. Judge Leonie Brinkema found Google abused its ad dominance and "substantially harmed" competitors and online publishers who depend on ad dollars. While the of DoubleClick and Admeld, it concluded the company’s ongoing behavior entrenched its power unfairly. The case now heads to a penalty phase, with the Justice Department expected to push for a breakup of parts of Google’s ad business. Scientists Find Signs of Extra-Terrestrial Life A Cambridge team has found the strongest sign yet of —a planet over twice Earth’s size, eight times its mass, and orbiting in its star's habitable zone 124 light-years from Earth. Using NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope, researchers spotted the (DMS) and dimethyl disulphide (DMDS), which, on Earth, are produced solely by simple marine life. While the findings mark a significant leap from previous data, the results are still short of scientific confirmation, with a confidence level of 99.7%—shy of the 99.99999% “discovery” threshold. The planet’s atmosphere suggests the presence of a vast ocean, but researchers caution that non-living processes might explain the gas signatures. More data is expected within the next year or two. name: Al Franken
subject: The “Powwow” Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc499ba3b-2830-4c96-96d4-1a2d1fbf4a2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Dear Peter, I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, Minnesotan. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0f59f47-ba0e-4264-bab9-fb4d510089b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. She gets it because she’s lived it. And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way to little of.)
---
| | [HELP ELECT PEGGY TO THE SENATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4bc064b0-6047-424e-b704-02abde244ffb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME! But most importantly — she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: We all do better when we all do better. (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.) While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans — whether they agree with her or not. [So let’s make it happen. Split a donation with Blue Amp Action today, and help send Peggy Flanagan to the Senate, where she’ll keep speaking up, fighting hard, and making sure we all have a good hotdish recipe.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc48fc46a-9b3d-4682-b5ac-95827b7b7bbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td68f9168-6b99-4354-847a-27a8422bae65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7201a95-0daf-42eb-80f9-948a87370be8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5977cce-d03f-4e15-b2ae-341b1101e6fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Al _P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said after you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor._

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8551cf01-e0b4-42f2-923f-3d17033a4dc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: History Facts
subject: Should we make decisions like the ancient Persians?
body:
Lavish, ritualized banquets were prevalent in the Achaemenid Empire, also known as the First Persian Empire, a dynasty of ancient Persia (modern-day Iran) that ruled from 550 to 330 BCE.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ofpaadmd8ako340mzx0iy0hsucv7xyatqvw3awyw7yr9q9unrps8yn6naxh6h3dx0okd9fe5hh6pgdyioosfbd2ik64n324zrhau9qhrrq55lflgsshgb3nrx73txnhwp7aj2x8vj6uc998&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Ancient Persians reportedly debated big decisions twice: once drunk and once sober.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L avish, ritualized banquets were prevalent in the Achaemenid Empire, also known as the First Persian Empire, a dynasty of ancient Persia (modern-day Iran) that ruled from 550 to 330 BCE. Wine was a key part of these events, poured from ornate silver and gold vessels, likely by highly knowledgeable sommeliers. According to the Greek historian Herodotus, who lived during the time period, wine’s role in civic life went beyond simple indulgence. He claimed that ancient Persians debated each decision twice: once drunk and once sober, and not necessarily in that order.
---
“It is their custom to deliberate about the gravest matters when they are drunk,” Herodotus wrote in his [texts on Greco-Persian conflicts](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). “If, being sober, they still approve it, they act on it, but if not, they drop it. And if they have deliberated about a matter when sober, they decide upon it when they are drunk.” Notably, Herodotus is the only source claiming this custom exists, and modern historians are torn on the veracity of the passage. Some [consider it to be accurate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), noting that, for a Greek writer, Herodotus is surprisingly impartial toward Persians. Others believe it to be an exaggeration that paints ancient Persian kings as reckless and irrational — although a moderate amount of wine could have been a part of any decision-making process.
Whether drunk discussion and sober editing were standard procedure or not, the Achaemenid Empire was wildly successful for nearly two centuries. It is one of history’s largest empires, reaching parts of Europe’s Balkan Peninsula as well as modern-day India and Egypt, and was known for its intricate architecture, prized art, and culturally diverse citizenry.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## The Achaemenid Empire had a massive postal system.
At its peak, the Achaemenid Empire spanned 2 million square miles, but you could send a message from one end to the other [in a manner of days](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suwspi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), an impressive feat in 500 BCE, before paper was even invented. Expert couriers on horseback called _pirradaziš_ used a relay system to speed up delivery times, and carried tablets from modern-day India to modern-day Egypt in a week or less. The system helped inspire the United States Postal Service more than 2,000 years later.

clean_body: Lavish, ritualized banquets were prevalent in the Achaemenid Empire, also known as the First Persian Empire, a dynasty of ancient Persia (modern-day Iran) that ruled from 550 to 330 BCE. | L avish, ritualized banquets were prevalent in the Achaemenid Empire, also known as the First Persian Empire, a dynasty of ancient Persia (modern-day Iran) that ruled from 550 to 330 BCE. Wine was a key part of these events, poured from ornate silver and gold vessels, likely by highly knowledgeable sommeliers. According to the Greek historian Herodotus, who lived during the time period, wine’s role in civic life went beyond simple indulgence. He claimed that ancient Persians debated each decision twice: once drunk and once sober, and not necessarily in that order. “It is their custom to deliberate about the gravest matters when they are drunk,” Herodotus wrote in his . “If, being sober, they still approve it, they act on it, but if not, they drop it. And if they have deliberated about a matter when sober, they decide upon it when they are drunk.” Notably, Herodotus is the only source claiming this custom exists, and modern historians are torn on the veracity of the passage. Some , noting that, for a Greek writer, Herodotus is surprisingly impartial toward Persians. Others believe it to be an exaggeration that paints ancient Persian kings as reckless and irrational — although a moderate amount of wine could have been a part of any decision-making process. Whether drunk discussion and sober editing were standard procedure or not, the Achaemenid Empire was wildly successful for nearly two centuries. It is one of history’s largest empires, reaching parts of Europe’s Balkan Peninsula as well as modern-day India and Egypt, and was known for its intricate architecture, prized art, and culturally diverse citizenry. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . **Good Morning!** On this day in 1904, surrealist artist [Harry Peyton Carnohan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGOhCAUheGnwU4DV1ywoNjGbrbd0lzgqiQIEyTj-PYb5xG2-qvzFef3MT8wxJDWH9zJ1PeSZ4elUnQl7FRCWh3uJxaPyc_AYWi5bIWePYZ4zbLxxnI_ioaMUFKOSnLdN5vpF3COj8PCR2UXkEqRQ_BaWSTPbd8Ec2NcCi0EF2LsdA9KyUGjR6etACY5-VBz6epGld54LPHKLyqdy3sTzVbr82D9N4OJwXSeZ1ePDXOKIVGXy8pg-qxaj1drrzsMJkq13BViaIrxzzPEGI4vxSRfdwzxg9d__PAy8BcAAP__mihsZw) was born in Milford. His most famous work is West Texas Landscape, depicting a farmhouse, a windmill, and a mesa. A rescue cat that lives at a library in Fredericksburg isn't welcome anymore, and some people aren't happy about it. ## Lawmakers Confront Abortion-Related Issues
The Texas Senate passed a bill Wednesday to prohibit local governments from allocating taxpayer funds to groups that help women pay for out-of-state travel or other assistance to receive an abortion. Two Democrats voted with Republicans in approving the measure. [Senate Bill 33](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0L1u8jAUxvGrcTYifyVxBg8vQtE7QIcydIxO7EM4qoMj2wVy9xVcQvefnkf6f53GE1Cg2_wBC9ryvMTRQSoYXKIFE91mB8sDkoebHyWXzY7rnTCjBwrbqCtvJ-57UaEVndZ9p7lR1dXKfnIKJtca0TaqQS_h0jozYYe99Ggqsq8xroURggvR10bJrtONAQ_OTEIyzdFTiakuVyz4hHwJW7xjql1cqmCvpayZqX9MDkwODlYqMdRvWM_xzuSwpxCOMX7_rEwO_ymXmLYa8vpkajjifMacmTqY_pPJ9mWZOpz3SlXJ-vVBIVBuO6b5vACF92n5Q5-7lb8BAAD__9lRc7k) aims to strengthen a 2019 law that bars direct payments for abortion-related travel. Cities like Austin and San Antonio have attempted to get around the prohibition by funding organizations that facilitate out-of-state travel. The legislation is a [priority of Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGOwyAQRL8Gd0SASYwLimvc5dorrTWsHXRrY8Emcf7-lHzCVdPMPI3ez3W8QqK0Ld-woudjzmOAwkihpBVL2pYA6xNKhC2ORpmzVFZqN0ZI9BptE_2kYq8b9Lqztu-scm1z8-YStJs7HTBMDlqrJjWjNhFaHTT20CT_himrndZK6_7kWtN19uwgQnCTNsIqjIlzOfENGQ-oM73yA8sp5LUhf2Peq2i_hBmEGSIQQcVjL1jruyHMUBkYhRk-Y1lxA0a5Q61Y5ZSIJGc5UQ6_kuHY4YVFzvctpm2ReZb5zu_4QCRMuXDKm-QCDyRhhqb4uD8TUaqXTli1rJDoc43_YfHhzV8AAAD__-HYhMc), who said it "draws a line in the sand, prohibiting these cities from using taxpayer dollars to fund abortion-related travel to circumvent state law." The House must pass the bill before it can become law. Yesterday, a group of Republicans in the Texas House succeeded in forcing leadership to withdraw a slate of memorial and congratulatory resolutions that included one [honoring the late Cecile Richards](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGOhCAURb8GOw0PGcGCYhu72XZL84TnSAJigBln_n7jfsK29ybnJOfnPt_RB78_vjGSqe81zRZzpWCzj5T9_rAYT8wOdzcLLm4tly3o2aEPn1k2zizcjdCQASXlqCTXfbMZtax2IG1HqW4A0g565SOnVbleKjnyxpsLxiVoAA4wdroXSsmbRodWLyCY5OR8TbmrG1V6Y1nDJ70odzbFJpit1qOw_ouJiYnpPM_ug1tK18vEtNNZmJi29CzUZjqeS_AW99JmWq_pwFJaS5li2j2GVnDogQ8wdFuNocnGHacPwZdBMckfEX3489Z_JHoZ8RsAAP__-8R1aQ), daughter of the former governor and the president of Planned Parenthood from 2006 to 2018.
## Investigation Uncovers Cartel-Linked Crime Ring
An investigation into retail theft at Katy Mills Mall outside Houston led authorities to uncover a [cartel-linked crime ring](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGOszAQBOCnMZ2RvdhgChd_Q5e_vRJt8BpWMRAZX0je_pTcG1w90mi--bqMF-TE2_wfV_LlGfdxwlwoTZlXyrzNE64n5oBbGEGBlcpI7caAnF6jqYK_qtDrirzujOk7o1xTLd5C79pgVHCN7cn2IWIIAEo38aqRYsX-XaaMdlorrfvaNdB1xjoMOLmrBmEUBS57rstChZ54xPTaH5TraV-r5JdS7odo_gkYBAzneda3Zf9-hwIGzIWnRAKGjc5DwPDRCBgyFeQky0KxSN4edBSesfC-yV-2vGF5yZVTOuSKKQkYwFkZwRptGiP7ACgNtihRo5U2kqKua6Nrpyr7cD85JT7aThg1r8jps7b84diHh58AAAD__0LYhg8) believed to have stolen over $100 million in merchandise nationwide. Four men [communicating through wireless earpieces](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLvO4yAQhZ8Gd0RAiI0Lim3cZdstrQmM7dEOJsKjXN5-5X2EvzwXfTo6f-7zHYhpX39DwSifpc4JmiCnRgUb7WuC8oaWYc-zM-6mjdc2zBmIv7PvcnyYPNoOox28HwdvwrXb4vgI4EbTG2OgD4u7YTIO-zB47O2w-I7iCTPeBmuNteMlXN0w-FuADCk8rFPeYCap7SIbCn7gWPhbX9guqZaO4ybyPNT1l3KTclM6E9rXvyDfs6DctOP7UG46HeWmZ2VKqE-lCzEfugCzbihArGXDRfQJ0KnuOybBrKXqgh9KoNzUtZifb2Kmox-UN2sB4v9L5AenvaL7FwAA__-3_3zD) were recorded stuffing $5,000 worth of Tommy Hilfiger and Guess merchandise into suitcases. When police followed them to a nearby Airbnb, they discovered additional stolen goods, Mexican IDs, and plane tickets. One of the suspects was linked to a prior raid in Laredo, in which $2 million of stolen merchandise was discovered. [According to court records](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLuu4yAUAL8GdycCTIJdUGzjLttuaR3DSYzMwwLy8N-vkvsHtx5pNJp_1_mKPvh0_4uRTHvf8myxNAq2-EjFp7vF-MLiMLlZcnkGrkAMs0Mfjll1zizcjaIjI7RSo1Z86LvVcLUsZ6UuvR4scVoWcj0q7C965MvY686bj4wrMQjBhRhPQy-1VucBHdphEZIpTs63XE5tpUZvrLdw5CeVk82xC2Ztba-s_8PkxOS05uyCT_SBTE4fN5MTV1_0qC0nsHmvYAvaDQTnEQo19AHaSrcG9UjOW2wEG7YDog-hQsQQoGCqaDdyUB91J9vIwc8hCD5tFei950qOyakrxu0vH4KvF80Uv0f04ZvbfnH2aeT_AAAA__9ZS4mB), he allegedly shipped $200,000 of stolen merchandise from Minnesota to Laredo. Authorities have identified at least [98 suspected cartel members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGO2zAQBNCvobo1uDR1ogoVadRd2pTCmlxZi1CiQe6d7b8PlPxB6sEMBu_X5_JJkuW4_6SdJ32tZYlUlXOssnOV4x5pf1JNdKTFWdeD9YBhSST5vfguTTebRux4wsH7cfA2XLttGjh45IDYr5isX8fg-xgQBx69dZY6mc4x6zEgWsTxEq5uGHwfKFEMN3TGW06ipV50Y-UXtTW_yzfXSyx7l6dN9dHM9Ydxs3Ez3SJez8S4-VGaGje38qUbU1PYylfTcsBWdoZKkiAzpQa_Sd_wKFkiw0Eq5XhKYkBrYZecpRygG68KJwOocIOdXxLpgH9Gxs34gb4fXTBu7uqUHs-z2D4G4-19J8l_3-p_wH5P7k8AAAD__zs6h5Q) connected to the operation, in which "boosters" travel city-to-city, committing large-scale retail theft, staying at each location for about a week at a time. No arrests have yet been announced.
## Texas QB Projected No. 1 NFL Draft Pick
Cam Ward, the [projected No. 1 pick](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LmOwyAUheGngQ6L5bK4oJjGXaad0rpmSZDwIozi5O1HmUeY-kifjv6f23zDUst2_8Y1-f7K-xyw9VRDK2tqZbsHXC9sEbc4Sy4148CEmyOW-p6BRr_wOAqavLAAowXuFH14BCETgssmKjHGYAAXHtGEMGbjgqbFfzAOwgnBhRgHp6S1oB1GDG4RkgBPsfS9Df2Renrhmet7f6Y2hH2l1T96P06ivoiciJyu6xq2XD8bkdPR9vNIoZ9ETgFX9vlP5KQk59qCYFpyw7TimikDC7MmiDw6l0En2nw8rlJrOY0lwO8rlj-W9n_UeXr5GwAA__9xim-0) in next week's NFL draft, didn't get any offers from major college programs after starting for two years at West Columbia High, a 4A school in a Brazoria County town of 3,644. Despite having a strong arm and leading West Columbia to a district championship in 2019, Ward rarely threw [more than 10 passes a game](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckD2uqzAUhFdjOiP_ER8KF6-hy2tviU587GDJYGSskOz-iizh1iN9M_P93Oc7ppy2539cg2vvWGaPtYXsa1pDTdvT43piJdxoVkINXBguYSZM-TObjtxD0Ci74KQ1ZrRGgO4Wp5XR0aCNgsDbQSLFEYaboKjBaJBdchdMGAlSCinHHrSy1gyAhB4eUjEjAqVWat-W0MIbj5g_5RVq78vaZbe0th9M_2NqYmo6z7P3Sy3blTI1HXup7WBqwtqSz4GpyePKryN8i5lTxdj4F8uvIQAD9Puyd9XRfqac03GzzIjniil_G9sf5Lyc-g0AAP__z3xydA) due to the Roughnecks' run-heavy offense. After Ward and his father drove to football camps across the state to showcase his skills, he accepted an offer to play for San Antonio's University of the Incarnate Word, where he threw for 71 touchdowns and 14 interceptions. Following two years starting for Washington State, he played a final season at the University of Miami, earning recognition as the [nation's top quarterback](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LuOszAQBeCnMV2QZ5hwKVz8DV3-dks02IZY8iWyvYG8_Yp9hO1OdT6d8_VYHuy8i_t_DlbVc0uL5lyt19kFm13cNYeDs-FoFpR4v0m6wbgYdv6zUGPUKs0EjVUwEE0DybFrnkqv_dbzCoPsEWkyPbOWK20Wtok63hqnrjJJMAJIgKkdOxwGuo9sWI8roCBpjaspt_Vpqz25bP6T3ja3OoXGq2etryK6fwJngTN7XypXW753zms6fJvyLnCO9igC58sSOMMVJ4Fz4Bhd3G98LWu5vM4mK_M6nPeu9IMguQd2_peqf3jlrfAnAAD__ztIcGQ) and finishing his college career with an NCAA-record 158 touchdowns. During a recent video game livestream, Ward indicated he [thinks the Tennessee Titans will select him](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckDtuxCAURVeDO0bwzPhTUKShm7QprWcDYyI-FjzNZ_eRZwmpr3R0z_m5LTcMMeT7Nyan6eXLsmElF7cakqsh3zdMT6wWs11AwJULxeW0WAzxvajO6lXYWXZOy1GpeVRi6rtd98rLdR1xcArtJIVfVw_D6tFbnKWQXdAnTCg5SSmknC9TD-OorhNa3KZVAlPC2UClXmh35F7YfHyXh6uXraQu6p3oaKz_YmAYmPw-SqNzYmBOMgMjFAMjBwamHaVSY2A2TPyU4baWo_GEv6Xyj1X2kduKnvgeMvFnoJ1TIMyNV9eOkptjYLqq7fEMMYY2jEyJe8IQP4foH-0eGv4CAAD__5hifUg) with the No. 1 draft pick.

clean_body: An investigation into retail theft at Katy Mills Mall outside Houston led authorities to uncover a believed to have stolen over $100 million in merchandise nationwide. | | | | | | Friday, April 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1904, surrealist artist was born in Milford. His most famous work is West Texas Landscape, depicting a farmhouse, a windmill, and a mesa. A rescue cat that lives at a library in Fredericksburg isn't welcome anymore, and some people aren't happy about it. Check out in today's Et Cetera section. We're sponsored today by . If you're looking for a unique and thoughtful gift idea for Easter, check out their ads in today's edition. Abilene ☁️ 88/69° | Amarillo ☁️ 79/54° | Austin ☁️ 88/69° | Brownsville ☁️ 89/75° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 86/74° | DFW ☁️ 84/68° | El Paso 🌥️ 82/63° | Houston 🌦️ 86/71° | Laredo ☁️ 99/73° | Lubbock ☁️ 85/65° | Midland ☁️ 88/67° | San Antonio ☁️ 92/69° | Tyler ☁️ 88/68° | Waco ☁️ 86/68° | Lawmakers Confront Abortion-Related Issues The Texas Senate passed a bill Wednesday to prohibit local governments from allocating taxpayer funds to groups that help women pay for out-of-state travel or other assistance to receive an abortion. Two Democrats voted with Republicans in approving the measure. aims to strengthen a 2019 law that bars direct payments for abortion-related travel. Cities like Austin and San Antonio have attempted to get around the prohibition by funding organizations that facilitate out-of-state travel. The legislation is a , who said it "draws a line in the sand, prohibiting these cities from using taxpayer dollars to fund abortion-related travel to circumvent state law." The House must pass the bill before it can become law. Yesterday, a group of Republicans in the Texas House succeeded in forcing leadership to withdraw a slate of memorial and congratulatory resolutions that included one , daughter of the former governor and the president of Planned Parenthood from 2006 to 2018. Investigation Uncovers Cartel-Linked Crime Ring An investigation into retail theft at Katy Mills Mall outside Houston led authorities to uncover a believed to have stolen over $100 million in merchandise nationwide. Four men were recorded stuffing $5,000 worth of Tommy Hilfiger and Guess merchandise into suitcases. When police followed them to a nearby Airbnb, they discovered additional stolen goods, Mexican IDs, and plane tickets. One of the suspects was linked to a prior raid in Laredo, in which $2 million of stolen merchandise was discovered. , he allegedly shipped $200,000 of stolen merchandise from Minnesota to Laredo. Authorities have identified at least connected to the operation, in which "boosters" travel city-to-city, committing large-scale retail theft, staying at each location for about a week at a time. No arrests have yet been announced. Texas QB Projected No. 1 NFL Draft Pick Cam Ward, the in next week's NFL draft, didn't get any offers from major college programs after starting for two years at West Columbia High, a 4A school in a Brazoria County town of 3,644. Despite having a strong arm and leading West Columbia to a district championship in 2019, Ward rarely threw due to the Roughnecks' run-heavy offense. After Ward and his father drove to football camps across the state to showcase his skills, he accepted an offer to play for San Antonio's University of the Incarnate Word, where he threw for 71 touchdowns and 14 interceptions. Following two years starting for Washington State, he played a final season at the University of Miami, earning recognition as the and finishing his college career with an NCAA-record 158 touchdowns. During a recent video game livestream, Ward indicated he with the No. 1 draft pick. | Flying together with our sponsor Need a Last-Minute Easter Gift? Look No Further than Goats. You've heard about chocolate bunnies and plastic eggs--but have you ever thought about giving the gift of a goat this Easter? Make a generous gift through where the gift of a goat, chickens, clean water, or education can dramatically change a family's life. We've made a list of items that kids and families in some of the most remote and overlooked parts of the world desperately need. We're offering the opportunity for you to give an Easter gift that brings new life to those in need just like Jesus did for you and me. We're calling it our , and you can even give a gift in honor of someone you love and let them know they had a part in changing a life. | ➤ Austin: Police detonated "explosive material" at a house Wednesday afternoon after being called to the residence the day before. A suspect whose identity has not been disclosed is in custody. () ➤ Houston: Three stolen puppies--two chocolate dapple Dachshunds and a Shih Tzu--were returned to a pet store after the owner shared surveillance video of the suspects, including a child. A turtle was also stolen. () ➤ McAllen: Border Patrol apprehended a Mexican citizen who has lived in the U.S. for 16 years without authorization after he crossed the Rio Grande on a jet ski with his daughter, who had been missing in Mexico. () ➤ Dallas: Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed two lawsuits against the city for restricting licensed handgun carriers from bringing firearms into Fair Park's Music Hall and The Majestic Theatre. Local governments are barred from enacting such prohibitions on their property. () ➤ Houston: A restaurant security guard was charged with assault after tasing two customers as they were leaving, assuming they had not yet paid. () ➤ Bryan: Reily Dominy, a high school senior who plans to compete in a national archery contest this summer, lost her prized bow in the mail after getting it repaired in New Braunfels. It's the latest in a string of Postal Service incidents. The Grizzlies have won three of this season's four matchups. () ➤ The women's golf teams at Tarleton State and Texas A&M Corpus Christi won their conference championship tournaments and are advancing to their regional tournaments next month. () ➤ The No. 2 Houston Rockets are considered underdogs in their first-round matchup against the No. 7 Golden State Warriors due to their inexperience in the playoffs. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/18/2025
body:
Colorado’s fentanyl crisis exposes a deadly failure of leadership
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Today, many pause to reflect on **Good Friday** —a day of sacrifice, hope, and shared values like courage and renewal. Wherever you are in your journey, we hope it brings peace, perspective, and time to focus on what matters most. 🕊️
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** The legislature passed HB25-1208, giving cities control over how [base pay for tipped workers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is calculated. At the same time, HB25-1312 and other fast-tracked gender and abortion bills are drawing growing backlash, with pastors, parents, and advocates [rallying at the Capitol](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Rep. Rose Pugliese continues to []()[lead the conservative response](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), amplifying grassroots voices and pushing back on what she calls a dangerous government overreach.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver’s inflation is [outpacing the national average](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), driven by rising housing, education, and healthcare costs. A [school stabbing in Aurora](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and Colorado’s worsening fentanyl crisis are fueling public safety concerns, with critics blaming lax enforcement. Meanwhile, Mesa County backed [Rep. Crank’s BLOC Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to tie federal funding to immigration enforcement.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Angel Moms are [blasting Sen. Chris Van Hollen](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for flying to El Salvador to visit a deported MS-13 member while ignoring the murders of their daughters by illegal immigrants. Meanwhile, a Newsweek report shows a stunning shift among Gen Z: young Americans are now [leaning Republican by double digits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with JD Vance emerging as a leading figure among under-30 conservatives.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Colleen Enos slams Colorado’s majority party for [silencing debate on rushed bills](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that weaponize gender and abortion politics—calling it a betrayal of transparency and parental rights.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, April 18, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado’s fentanyl crisis exposes a deadly failure of leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV STAFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A newly released report from Advance Colorado lays bare the devastating human cost of Colorado’s fentanyl crisis—and the state policies that helped fuel it.
Titled “Communities in Ruin: The Human Cost of Fentanyl in Colorado,” the report delivers a searing indictment of legislative decisions made over the past six years—starting with a 2019 law that downgraded possession of deadly narcotics like fentanyl to a misdemeanor.
That’s when possession of up to four grams—enough to kill 1,500 people—started being treated like a minor infraction.
Four years later, the state’s fentanyl-related overdose deaths have exploded by 440%, jumping from 222 deaths in 2019 to over 1,200 in 2023.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Outnumbered but not outmatched: House Minority Leader Pugliese’s grassroots push](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rep. Rose Pugliese, Colorado’s House Minority Leader, is leading a grassroots-driven fight against bills like HB25-1312 and SB25-003, while juggling leadership and single motherhood—including raising a daughter with special needs.
* She introduced HB25-1315, requiring appointed legislators to face a public election, drawing both grassroots support and internal GOP pushback.
* Pugliese says affordability and accountability are top concerns from voters and warns that policies like the grocery bag fee and HB25-1321 are out of touch with everyday Coloradans.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Rep. Crank’s BLOC Act gains Mesa County’s support: “Align federal funds with public safety”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Mesa County Board of Commissioners formally endorsed Rep. Jeff Crank’s BLOC Act (H.R. 1984), which would withhold federal transportation funds from jurisdictions that refuse to cooperate with ICE.
* Supporters, including Sheriff Todd Rowell, argue the bill strengthens public safety by ensuring coordination between local and federal law enforcement.
* Critics claim the bill “blackmails” communities and spreads fear, but commissioners maintain that illegal immigration is straining local resources and driving crime.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Enos: What rushed gender and abortion bills say about the legislature’s priorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Enos criticizes Colorado lawmakers for fast-tracking controversial bills like HB25-1312 and HB25-1309, arguing they shut out parental voices and limit public debate, with hearings scheduled on short notice and dissenters labeled as hate groups.
* She warns that HB25-1312 could strip custody from parents for “misgendering,” while HB25-1309 mandates insurance coverage for gender-transition procedures, including for minors.
* Two abortion-related bills, SB25-129 and SB25-183, also advanced quickly—shielding providers from liability and compelling taxpayers to fund Medicaid abortions, regardless of religious beliefs.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Polis’s $4M legal fund to fight Trump? GOP Senators say it’s a political power grab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD****| COMMENTARY | APRIL 16** _Colorado Governor Jared Polis wants $4 million in taxpayer money to fight off the return of Trump—literally. Under HB25-1321, Democrats in the Colorado legislature are moving to shift $4 million from the state’s infrastructure fund directly into Polis’s office, allowing him to wage legal and administrative battles against the federal government, particularly policies implemented by the Trump administration._
**[Can the America-First movement win in Colorado? Heidi Ganahl and Rasmussen pollster break down Colorado’s GOP identity crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | STATE | APRIL 16** _With Colorado’s 2026 elections on the horizon, Republicans are once again asking the question: What kind of candidate can actually win statewide? On the latest episode of Unleashed, Rocky Mountain Voice founder Heidi Ganahl sat down with Mark Mitchell, head pollster for Rasmussen Reports, to dig into exclusive polling data—and the identity crisis facing Colorado’s GOP._
**[Self-defense on hold: House GOP announces letter to AG Bondi at capitol press conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | APRIL 15** _A young woman in her twenties stood outside Rep. Scott Bottoms’ church recently and asked him for help—she needed a firearm. Not for sport. Not to make a point. For protection._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🧀 DID YOU KNOW?** Is cheese one of America’s favorite foods? It sure looks like it. Today, the average American eats **42 pounds of cheese a year** —more than twice the amount we consumed in 1975, when the government first began tracking it. All told, we now devour 653 pounds of dairy per person annually. Got milk? You bet—plus yogurt, butter, ice cream, and, of course, cheese.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Loyalty to country always. Loyalty to government, when it deserves it.” –Mark Twain
|
---

name: Rep. Pat Harrigan
subject: China controls more than 80 stores on our military territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
It's not political--it's just common sense

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6e03db2306eb49ecaadbe655a8d38782&_e=ijUT5LljV2niSNOH9ZUKGDGk3BW-kTp5kvQpKZe3irEMlJlzUwcBsPPOt02s4UASD8zHaKZ0t0cz1ukkRHHY-fhcjAWM_-BxwlnIenFkeAb6fMTQrmdTgsk9_j1ifPw9ET9D8k9GPNQSN7Q-5uKcA0XSSXQdKb-14Mj2DVsJeL6vC-JYb3_ydqXlGnLrm4f4t106R5AMS2rMCUpdMmL_DCvwZigq0skE6gdzSs9mIgxUEe5-TYvYzr9JW17F81QWuGRgGfW3wexsJqo_MlF1R0UaijJohGPjhnzdLYx-6C9xZxrWPt5OVAo3LqlQKJNCZVJWJZIKu3lJon85zbbTTuAg-7txs0KG5nKOUJ0Y_5s%3D)
---
Patriot,

Did you know that the Chinese Communist Party - or the CCP - controls more than 80 GNC stores on our U.S. military installations?

You're probably as shocked as I am, Patriot. China has NO BUSINESS being anywhere close to our troops, especially on base! As a Green Beret, I can personally testify to how unsafe this is for our national security - and not just unsafe, but straight-up dangerous.

| [**ADD YOUR NAME - BAN COMPANIES OWNED OR CONTROLLED BY CHINA, RUSSIA, NORTH KOREA, OR IRAN FROM OPERATING ON OUR BASES!**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6e03db2306eb49ecaadbe655a8d38782&_e=ijUT5LljV2niSNOH9ZUKGDGk3BW-kTp5kvQpKZe3irEMlJlzUwcBsPPOt02s4UASD8zHaKZ0t0cz1ukkRHHY-fhcjAWM_-BxwlnIenFkeAb6fMTQrmdTgsk9_j1ifPw9ET9D8k9GPNQSN7Q-5uKcA0XSSXQdKb-14Mj2DVsJeL6vC-JYb3_ydqXlGnLrm4f4JDmOPrQgkS_6so_qaiPlj4GG9TcCZs8P6YQixIrPv17_gP7rfyCYjwLDgyJ9xo4oWDXOijRn9fbwqStYI6XDH7IHTXDhDtVc4HC9ZGspckbUBmRcl-Lfdjj2FnIH5iuuPWq-Dkd4UatDuuE87Te-QXAS3uWRE9figbPwZJktjEE%3D)
---

So, I want to do something about it. I introduced the Military Installation Retail Security Act, a bill that bans companies owned or controlled by China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from operating on U.S. military bases. You'd think that's common sense, right? Guess Biden and Kamala couldn't figure that one out.

This is about protecting our servicemen and women from foreign surveillance the moment they step on base. It's not political-- **[it's just common sense.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6e03db2306eb49ecaadbe655a8d38782&_e=ijUT5LljV2niSNOH9ZUKGDGk3BW-kTp5kvQpKZe3irEMlJlzUwcBsPPOt02s4UASD8zHaKZ0t0cz1ukkRHHY-fhcjAWM_-BxwlnIenFkeAb6fMTQrmdTgsk9_j1ifPw9ET9D8k9GPNQSN7Q-5uKcA0XSSXQdKb-14Mj2DVsJeL6vC-JYb3_ydqXlGnLrm4f4lBn1q-0dGGgW8px0BqktE9e7zYbEKgMm9HdzUNRN6SL_Js57MR54gN0MumLtTRVSWvucu0NEvdLY5AgXRHF53VeoAyJmJd6wsfWQoKoVm-OQDqIOEkG6rRtzRHpY0-UW-thpEqJm1-UseLmYIOaobVuDgDzlcqtm2QI6ClZoMSo%3D)** And, now that we have a real, patriotic, pro-America President in the Oval Office, I have no doubt that this issue will be taken seriously and dealt with swiftly.

American Foreign surveillance should not be permitted on our bases... PERIOD.

I need you to add your name to my petition ASAP and show my colleagues--both Republicans and Democrats--the support my bill has.

[**ADD YOUR NAME - BAN COMPANIES OWNED OR CONTROLLED BY CHINA, RUSSIA, NORTH KOREA, OR IRAN FROM OPERATING ON OUR BASES!**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6e03db2306eb49ecaadbe655a8d38782&_e=ijUT5LljV2niSNOH9ZUKGDGk3BW-kTp5kvQpKZe3irEMlJlzUwcBsPPOt02s4UASD8zHaKZ0t0cz1ukkRHHY-fhcjAWM_-BxwlnIenFkeAb6fMTQrmdTgsk9_j1ifPw9ET9D8k9GPNQSN7Q-5uKcA0X5Flq7U9z3-jA5VUijACJfxhGZ5OpkgU6XDJ5WFhuKna7TcnVnnZ1z1CIXiDL1s7GviD8_O0k12atrryHTcYsdSFccOMsrgilMvCa9XlRxLtQcVAUFifVJKM8320uL_cRtlOExEnMUFzfHyr2uY8u0KzCEV90VydeyhvnXUTfOUO9HlN9J59ML0SRqMMvMqWdn0gMT-n2fwEXbfj4aty0%3D)
---

There is absolutely no reason a company owned by the Chinese Communist Party or any of our foreign adversaries should be operating inside our military bases, especially with access to personal data of our service members.

**That ends now. The Military Installation Retail Security Act is a no-nonsense fix to a dangerous oversight.**

Thank you,

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6e03db2306eb49ecaadbe655a8d38782&_e=ijUT5LljV2niSNOH9ZUKGDGk3BW-kTp5kvQpKZe3irEMlJlzUwcBsPPOt02s4UASD8zHaKZ0t0cz1ukkRHHY-fhcjAWM_-BxwlnIenFkeAb6fMTQrmdTgsk9_j1ifPw9ET9D8k9GPNQSN7Q-5uKcA0XSSXQdKb-14Mj2DVsJeL6vC-JYb3_ydqXlGnLrm4f4Bji29je2PZzAYn4qk9rcWiNvXmI1j68-Ea5mWD1AkHtRr_5ZbN4H2L8WkpR3AnFW97fdjUsd1GKicdiPwKfIfdY06uOyU8wfvKwyqTubYtFsUkPKUaxrQ7YsE3C3S_SiB44ZTMbwbdF8yvw3rDG6mpDAXycpRAT5KsVe9R4pvFo%3D)

Green Beret Pat Harrigan

_Christian, Husband, Father, West Point Grad, Business Owner_

clean_body: It's not political--it's just common sense | Patriot, Did you know that the Chinese Communist Party - or the CCP - controls more than 80 GNC stores on our U.S. military installations? You're probably as shocked as I am, Patriot. China has NO BUSINESS being anywhere close to our troops, especially on base! As a Green Beret, I can personally testify to how unsafe this is for our national security - and not just unsafe, but straight-up dangerous. | So, I want to do something about it. I introduced the Military Installation Retail Security Act, a bill that bans companies owned or controlled by China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from operating on U.S. military bases. You'd think that's common sense, right? Guess Biden and Kamala couldn't figure that one out. This is about protecting our servicemen and women from foreign surveillance the moment they step on base. It's not political-- And, now that we have a real, patriotic, pro-America President in the Oval Office, I have no doubt that this issue will be taken seriously and dealt with swiftly. American Foreign surveillance should not be permitted on our bases... PERIOD. I need you to add your name to my petition ASAP and show my colleagues--both Republicans and Democrats--the support my bill has. There is absolutely no reason a company owned by the Chinese Communist Party or any of our foreign adversaries should be operating inside our military bases, especially with access to personal data of our service members. That ends now. The Military Installation Retail Security Act is a no-nonsense fix to a dangerous oversight. Thank you, Green Beret Pat Harrigan Christian, Husband, Father, West Point Grad, Business Owner Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1fca9a78bfbc4ae7b2f06b6fa247dc2c&_e=7I-KKQdXvs3AEl_d0OLzeRTkGPf6SzkGZwVt4pZiI5lLJj2apYJ9jtZUKyaQZTvsHxGPNBneM9SOZqmaN_mywX6YZeya796A-Yd4hmvEK7MsrfQVz3HrwXcyF_tLOn56X4iRd0o0VVFKu99Zaxi9ZMJGK-2w7KrHxWE21NDsMlyHaTou2JnfSN8zG1_8drrqXDLguZKdjHQjANw-0o2toL6Ti0AQNPNkUORhspRurEzgEVj4L91hcVYb_hJoXb-eFsbaQjkC0DJ8DfMvko6N5dDMI9DpufZ-f7gkZuhJ-UXeg1pXtAYuWRjjVr-eV1fJx3p3iohMsiMIxahXwyPyjMY5pnApqDx7xqA1hnRLq601cobnw3RjjfYh_NILId8ON2AeFWabkqtpgQcvDiVTtJ35KbGTYSFOETjmrMnpjSvVuuskHJ7LwMJkDEsL4biI)
