| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1fca9a78bfbc4ae7b2f06b6fa247dc2c&_e=7I-KKQdXvs3AEl_d0OLzeRTkGPf6SzkGZwVt4pZiI5lLJj2apYJ9jtZUKyaQZTvsHxGPNBneM9SOZqmaN_mywX6YZeya796A-Yd4hmvEK7MsrfQVz3HrwXcyF_tLOn56X4iRd0o0VVFKu99Zaxi9ZMJGK-2w7KrHxWE21NDsMlyHaTou2JnfSN8zG1_8drrqXDLguZKdjHQjANw-0o2toL6Ti0AQNPNkUORhspRurEzgEVj4L91hcVYb_hJoXb-eFsbaQjkC0DJ8DfMvko6N5dDMI9DpufZ-f7gkZuhJ-UVJ7gf4vBzzp_SQQgmz-vPXjids6EEh3AAZZqmjSYGp5IoxubfKj4xqZka5yZ-HnkGToI8K5VLbqX1VSko1_Uetr0JeC_6S85bKdclonn7lamnQVzEOTkfhNev2rGYPv7A2ABan3nkTA72seWobvoNj)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1fca9a78bfbc4ae7b2f06b6fa247dc2c&_e=7I-KKQdXvs3AEl_d0OLzeRTkGPf6SzkGZwVt4pZiI5lLJj2apYJ9jtZUKyaQZTvsHxGPNBneM9SOZqmaN_mywX6YZeya796A-Yd4hmvEK7MsrfQVz3HrwXcyF_tLOn56X4iRd0o0VVFKu99Zaxi9ZMJGK-2w7KrHxWE21NDsMlyHaTou2JnfSN8zG1_8drrqXDLguZKdjHQjANw-0o2toL6Ti0AQNPNkUORhspRurEzgEVj4L91hcVYb_hJoXb-eFsbaQjkC0DJ8DfMvko6N5dDMI9DpufZ-f7gkZuhJ-UXGKo0zGEEQYWY263eZLVBC46_7sa5oHV3o-josEr9DV6jQKJY9hgE9nfS2EZwzTy_X1_Jp5bkIP0Q7y1iA6KxDgcxBx9u5fbewLIRIdMGp3eHPNoX6A8TAXSGon0HxNcevyNCVIx-DIf3yM3Kd9gau)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1fca9a78bfbc4ae7b2f06b6fa247dc2c&_e=7I-KKQdXvs3AEl_d0OLzeRTkGPf6SzkGZwVt4pZiI5lLJj2apYJ9jtZUKyaQZTvsHxGPNBneM9SOZqmaN_mywX6YZeya796A-Yd4hmvEK7MsrfQVz3HrwXcyF_tLOn56X4iRd0o0VVFKu99Zaxi9ZMJGK-2w7KrHxWE21NDsMlyHaTou2JnfSN8zG1_8drrqXDLguZKdjHQjANw-0o2toL6Ti0AQNPNkUORhspRurEzgEVj4L91hcVYb_hJoXb-eFsbaQjkC0DJ8DfMvko6N5dDMI9DpufZ-f7gkZuhJ-UWrFmBYd6Pc5wU8KqZ36Hz1DaSnU7szCyaQtPQix9UqWFdbYLev3dHq0-4g4ujaab7_lBCFP5BQ1Iw6UFPlAlonIjy7_PwEBhn3iPyZmUSRT8yCIKmWRQzHiegODQoDIJ9ZxrmZP4WjC8pqTPX06Xmr).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kEyU3AcYC2Mrp1Uz24wTnuG8HZCkVf9nq0B_YLMpX54tz_cds-Xyu3eJEhd6WcaPe3fzdkngmvkCIfeE-GYh2QNNbfmyJlopY3K9GbO5-5VLPGjz8jGgh3ftXzicII7HsB9lGEFFSm0aZC4hSUpW5FSZ)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kExfceqq6BMYSdL4iHm0QFnDTxewZSuQq00aa52U9COpamNl-xBSI-rIEgx2hNA41ctCu12DFyxQBrhviQoXzHs5268JzbOFtifcpnKqQtpI2vCJJvjtsF7GKKYIi_WOPgJD0dmu19yS_AYYjsuJfftD)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kEwM92BiGxRn-9E0_x1cZCPrYK0DAl3xI3KI5Z53bW8gfQMXlvXAiMDzIC6Fp9i0kEeu4BItMCPXrG-_n_BOYdfQaEF9a_oOjAmkYy2MGcprUUx_4XXxV6iD9-5YdeCzIszPzt2hRIzrIVDYLq-gXfbN)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kExZZ-Tjm8BZEkZx_31QDaF6ZytsSA83op24fJcJ-RH1BuVdUZNm6NSlqH92cRTM5TiTCKpNiPsBkJXIiRDwcDjTFkUEgtK_VlVSmhnTAzEBRHHEaAR3iukp3bnH3fDi2kUYYe7tt_Omu5VgcWHIgXma)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0ma8iH5YJPNVfpe816Q2r0s0DHTuPEsdCJT20eN3o8zmoaTR-fTaz743wlPFYb1cK4MM7vDaEc_VQHtruagj00MdK8Pg3jbFo_9rAhyTtM4EkIXxyYUqDgNvz3Up3tTOLDtGjnmnKcKWPo77Gk9dJVqoIeJgq6gZHlx-c1ZPvFxbLka3_887ikM3Mjo5j4C4bVLIpNMRF_7KeSknp-SfrQPXFKi4EzkjJMbZ6-HNFPDk%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kEyIN3g-0dElRGvt2oimPw0PwY8k_HaGmNMuoOQbYa05ZIxxWHj3cIxuASbvZC60O2JdepjD2K-9VikMZgdyJNU4XJ4GsxDDxzOZ0nsWuj7sJ7tOU-oeon_yqjQXsrghUF3ByjgGXpyo2KhqXMidy9zG) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kEzVzJa0nimlZbHboRcsrGYclC3Y2q2P3jOmofUgcyTj1Ij7eUsdQXCLTD_eUCTBvH6qDyUEVsYnEm47hiWWx7aq7vhi_Mw_Kw2cERjDgqq2l5PgA2X9PA5ubICU0hum3LDjzI8zGyjEyv-ncLLPn3Kv)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b115f01b67324076a7db4665b3fb6d0a&_e=2TVdiVtFzGBS3nIZ5cirHUbSMSnJzY-vaB-00Ndf-2A2K6VqhHk0bgeD_ntrOEf0zN_9v4R8O0BDg7IQMCNWR1g-qEKfqnM1PCELW6OHr0YfE1vXLi41fCy3qiG_hskoPTFo7bFsIL0VazfNBUJXwfy4wKInZPdArX3VGo88kEwum-sP7QWBWMJfVdIXmtssSzBzISqiG6O6dNN8-v9FcmonX8MJEzzYpDVZxn3mCkEEgiTYAecm4-5nCQe30A_dQbe1BX_t-ZpeDd-AcVheZAj8qICr34Pc7kDobYKzeaKGqTrZQ_qHa4gQJzcldSn3)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

clean_body: This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Open for a selfie of me and Cory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
My friend and hero
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106052547/540272509/-486209955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.18_Cory-Booker-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5ZjRiMC01NjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjvigQKGns-0f28IfR2NS4frFl5Z3CjnhI96RpLA6es=) This is my dear friend and Senate colleague, Cory Booker.

In case you haven’t seen him all over the headlines recently, let me explain:

Cory broke the record for the longest Senate speech in history at 25 hours and 5 minutes to protest the Trump administration’s attacks on our hard-earned benefits, our health care and our democracy.

He’s one of my heroes.

While Trump and the MAGA movement attempt to divide us and wear us down, Cory is proving that Democrats can harness our power when we speak out boldly and unapologetically.

**In the midterms, Cory is up for re-election in New Jersey. The GOP will call up their megadonors and flood this race with dark money to try to unseat him.**

[**_So I’m personally asking you: Will you chip in anything you can to defend Cory Booker’s seat and get one step closer to taking back our Senate majority? Your donation will be split with his campaign to ensure he has the resources he needs to take on the GOP:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106052558/540272522/-486209955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.18_Cory-Booker-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5ZjRiMC01NjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjvigQKGns-0f28IfR2NS4frFl5Z3CjnhI96RpLA6es=) | | | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106052564/540272532/-486209955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.18_Cory-Booker-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5ZjRiMC01NjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjvigQKGns-0f28IfR2NS4frFl5Z3CjnhI96RpLA6es=)
---
Thanks for all your support,

Kirsten

_P.S. Cory’s birthday is on April 27th, so please give him an early birthday surprise by chipping in to his campaign!_
* * *
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106052573/540272542/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.18_Cory-Booker-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5ZjRiMC01NjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjvigQKGns-0f28IfR2NS4frFl5Z3CjnhI96RpLA6es=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. [**Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106052577/540272549/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.18_Cory-Booker-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWY5ZjRiMC01NjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjvigQKGns-0f28IfR2NS4frFl5Z3CjnhI96RpLA6es=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/mZRmh2qV7a4g4Ycl2WxmPMpjtIrR1QVbYcwOIaRC2NxIMxZXMPhrZDXCukDjzUftrc0fEO5tafhGpZQK-5VKbToTaWB5uBydNeFQYDGZd4iGGLX1yuAAEuh9ehXmT1yfs8c3UTIzYjPeeJL3bQXh_Tid7C_xhnjdGfrVzA6rYAe1sc5VDkpAF5lvRY4VZUatbrE6rWdbeTRb-OUYPPMK5LnONHcpHnNk5STA116tB7TxXI5DZ6r8PCsJtHAHReZUUsvDgrbOuC1s8-LhBEK9vQPzpbJGN5wxWn3Dn7BHA96B15kxZR9TbJ1Ulxr6QYaDP3Qq3XvDM__9kzcAnUihm3ocNukBLEU5vMCGx7aTm5RY-4sGEYUy7I-Os6dzlvyE9PVV7wutWQB2zN3GN60k6RCgFW_Q0YVgF_tSEVYXjtxztx_kE2QMMEYRzGYV96fJiUoqqip2ApdpoUGDuLhkp9mc3QoU4TAqRKJNOc6kpg/qpShI0Hb3KVKREXeWmsOUfXliL-IOnQt/8 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/BuNKjTO5DtjIc-F2VTH51SaqHJF-rbPwV8p7E0tlPBlv89bsHM7E682w9PqwAkqvpxsZSMaVPfNEPJBQTbafjQtP4Rk6upqcs-La0RiB2OlT4yOADF5MLoOqoZvfVvci3CZfF1wzGsU-ZVKazEKrgb3OxLvXzxo8ayJYqDoZZUvZUh-axtvXAgmiUip5D74nKpjPFAyfzfxGBLb9pVZXfMjEUd_ZDR_HDX8JqvUE1Nv4i19IuPra_1Zny_cVj1-visutUwSqzn2IaS5GO_rtgRAU4g_NFNDQrqHhOEuVu4v0MdZl_67T7-FMtyKr3qNh68aXz25Xb-hwjpxVR71jboZyHe3nw98rnVyg88Q6NdBsAJ5IOgGxmSmxFRsJHy8iWNA0MVB2tJvFXN_Xv73JzjrQBkGgkgxjxxcFy_l2zjx5XkPLGVHAF3x_AlWeuSO3b3EPpqB5ajOZSPoWhgctY36iCwc8XFEzZQKcXQ7fIA/3EX_GDjXDFb0HgPlQxm4SoBRVzp25z6i/8 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Eb2Qb46Snb2Y_LkbAnucHRHRpKUF36DC5s7_RtXV_Uh7qgoQOuA9C5gFv5SWPINEK_sDt5HwAxfFDSQXmcvf1yCAoOtMO4KMeyc_zAYKjM8R8JQNnwzpWRM2bAZksYHYEUCzJXZoNDFzfxki4gdoxbbStSVwlaCGaFy36zM65ZH0vnT0tnnOAat1XgGyV6Qzpl-ViPdaqOY-HrCFlnOQ79isSsEYvlJE8JP7U_MitFZHc6YK03GR-eI6g30W1dMBibZt0hRbMRzy4NHOpOYCk9TcAUK6zUjluf0B93Jn_kDxvCJV7si_T-B6FoNsWCuPEErwMYtOSbQ3877n9al5wSHUf_E4zI4pApbX_XECovII8Hfv7ReTaARoGngiby1ffMPh9jBhVaBA2sgZfQd0h4Hc4NpUHXtxTrDVAfOHL703g0WXNwe9bTekphI9HIjVOLpdpAdtbbTSMrYuFUoY6Ep1WUu_7ezGaN6wKkLM_g/iFJKtkcNvUS4cNYwsiFY4pZW8aOLlCRY/8 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Hi Peter,

Did you know that Virginia is the last state in the South to have full access to reproductive healthcare?

That is why our awesome partner organization called **Roe Your Vote Virginia** is working to pass a constitutional amendment to enshrine abortion access into the state’s constitution, and we want to help make that happen.

During the 2023 General Assembly elections, Roe Your Vote Virginia led the fight to elect pro-choice candidates and advance reproductive freedom in their state. In 2025, we’re working together to protect Virginia’s pro-choice majority in the General Assembly and enshrine abortion access once and for all.

[**Help us as we support pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates running for office in Virginia by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Roe Your Vote Virginia today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106057990/540289379/-1243516685?refcode=EM_F_250418RYV_N_THBM_90DO_8_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMWY4YTUzLTViMWMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6OZlODqdxNA5WYj0HIXdm6IJZk-AwcLOOVvdS5wAgu4=)

The first step to passing a constitutional amendment to protect abortion access has already happened: The General Assembly voted on Senate Joint Resolution No. 1 (SJ 1) and House Joint Resolution No. 1 (HJ 1). Now we’re onto step two: This November, Virginia voters will head to the polls to elect a Governor, Lt. Governor, Attorney General, and the entire House of Delegates. **The outcome of these elections will be critical in determining the future of reproductive rights in the state – and a possible healthcare access point for women across the entire southern region of America.**

Here is why this is so important: If pro-choice leadership remains in control of the House of Delegates, they will take another vote on these bills. If they pass a second time, the amendment will proceed to the final stage, where voters will have the opportunity to vote on the amendment in November 2026.

Without this protection, reproductive rights remain vulnerable to shifting political landscapes and the whims of elected officials who could impose restrictions or outright bans on abortion. We must ensure there are pro-choice women in the room when this vote is happening.

[**Check back in next week as we’ll be announcing the first wave of our shared candidates in this partnership. In the meantime, help fund the important work we’ll be doing together by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106058001/540289391/-1243516685?refcode=EM_F_250418RYV_N_THBM_90DO_8_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMWY4YTUzLTViMWMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6OZlODqdxNA5WYj0HIXdm6IJZk-AwcLOOVvdS5wAgu4=)

Thank you,

Team Her Bold Move

name: OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION [From Team Scalise]
subject: Thank God for President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When we look back at the last three months, that’s the one thought that stands out over everything.

| |
---
| | | _Thank God for President Trump!_

When we look back at the last three months, that's the one thought that stands out over everything. Our President, his Administration, and his Congressional allies are:
* Slashing billions of dollars of waste, fraud, and abuse
* Deporting violent criminal aliens
* Decreasing illegal border crossings by 95%
* Releasing over two dozen hostages from war zones
* Restoring faith in our elections
* Removing DEI propaganda in schools
* Lowering inflation
* Bringing thousands of jobs back to America
* Winning legal battles against the Democrat Machine

And the list goes on... **[Unfortunately, it's not all good news - there's trouble on the horizon, Friend.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeoealeo666sg3kj0i37an40t58771mr3motfgo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "Unfortunately, it’s not all good news – there’s trouble on the horizon, Friend.")**

House Democrats are sparing NO EXPENSE to cut deep into Republican territory. The BIGGEST Super PAC for House Dems pledged 50 million bucks to wipe out every Conservative in purple districts! It's more aggressive than we ever imagined...

They may have enough cash at their disposal to pull off the unthinkable. And we don't have the resources to keep up. We're stretched too thin as it is!

**So we're reaching out to ask you for a small - _but meaningful_ - donation today.**

We're not sending you this to cut us a huge check.

We're sending this to you so we're all on the same page. **[And now we're asking you to make an investment of JUST 100 PENNIES to help save our Conservative House Majority and keep delivering on President Trump's Agenda.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrre5ncrppckcfid3cl4hj2ac57hd9pqkbmnt9l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "And now we’re asking you to make an investment of JUST 100 PENNIES to help save our Conservative House Majority and keep delivering on President Trump’s Agenda.")**

_Would you be willing to step up right now?_

---
| | | [PITCH IN 100 PENNIES $1](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhabsmar3s3tg8ossu4jjnmk7f7o8jlvv8o4fh10_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "PITCH IN 100 PENNIES $1")
---

---
| | | [PITCH IN 10,000 PENNIES $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0na9mii01p9c7c70m3rn2jr1fgtqdkpvunl38v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "PITCH IN 100 PENNIES $1")
---
Every donation, no matter how big or small, helps move mountains.

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms, save our razor-thin House Majority, and keep delivering on President Trump's agenda. And we promise to never waste a single cent!

_**[If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zle59o0g3hnuefs971hvj8ku5o6p9tpr453246lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.")**_

For God and Country,

House Republicans
_via Team Scalise_

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zno243tuc2leq6sn2aep82m2vobocvn2dn7m3dc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cjie1pj4cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Action breeds hope.
Hi Peter — I want to talk for a moment about hope.
The last few months have been hard.
An unelected billionaire is threatening Social Security, Medicare, and education funding. The president is pushing the bounds of our democracy every day. And the cost of living just keeps rising.
In moments like these, it’s tempting to give in to despair. The kind of despair that just makes you want to turn your head, look away, and say, “I’m out.”
But here’s what else I’ve learned: **Action breeds hope. And action plus hope feels a heck of a lot better than fear and despair.**
I know it, because I’ve lived it. In 2018, we scared off a 12-term Republican incumbent and flipped a red seat — winning a Democratic House majority and laying the groundwork to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. **And now, we’re building an even stronger grassroots movement across New Jersey in this race for governor.**
Because for as hard as these last few months have been, I’ve also been reminded of how many people care enough about this country and their community to do the hard work of making it better — including everyone who has knocked a door, made a phone call, signed a petition, or chipped in a few bucks to power this grassroots campaign.
**[So that's why I'm asking, Peter: Will you split a donation between our grassroots campaign and Heartland Patriots today? We’re going all-in to win this race, make life more affordable for New Jersey families, and beat back the divisiveness in our politics. Together, we’re going to build up hope.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87877?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87878?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87877?refcode=em20250418-8883&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8883%2E614464%2E_2OP8T)

I'm ready to get to work, folks — and I can’t wait to do it alongside this incredible team.
— Mikie

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
There are many like it, but this is the only Official D.O.G.E. Poll
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGSnCoUhp8Gd1h6QNGFi5nruLipStUknXTNykLAlg4go6g9efqUVndvf75z-D_g1hvdf1WIvSKAQcsZASDyggBe3uH886TeFMNnt31i_qb-_76fwn93dIUn7ATvyMc8raQn8-12u54-36_dmj758OXVk77fGivLtdlTVkeyAlGAEJGqUkZpWdCMZNFQJXlfsKIESonoEkk7xjtWcJYq3iUik5GuIIEsoWmRkiwjJBZKpUnZFWXBpOwhRzTZtIvl6LiR1zAt1sditJGphhD8fFRqEDSzEsuk4k27ScmdQNAcNHY86H0ai9FaHYJS-NoLBI3xeOjxoYHleFHYj8bgNaWINEuwrVVSLxaR-m6a7-E8LpNQiNTGt8a3Q3_PBbee64tDpH4YtcGJdl_82NsOfSuPUq3xj7nRBeUCIvWuGBSCvHVGS0TqTPz99frnLMtvR3j8L6m7jWSnD_L7RzRV0m_aGD3nDNHksrc83mat4F8AAAD__9Miq6w)
---

GOP Rep. Morgan Luttrell **[shut down disruptive protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/83859fd1-eb4e-4d0e-be5d-d8b8cdc3685a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who came to his town hall speaking event to demand the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a suspected MS-13 member and illegal immigrant that the Trump administration deported to El Salvador.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/83859fd1-eb4e-4d0e-be5d-d8b8cdc3685a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/83859fd1-eb4e-4d0e-be5d-d8b8cdc3685a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Where do you, I'm talking about YOU, personally stand on the return of Abrego Garcia," one protester asked Lutrell before several others began cheering and chanting "bring him home!"
Lutrell didn't overreact, but collected himself and took his time to respond to the mob. "As I understand it, he is an illegal alien," he said. "And when he was detained he was with two MS-13 members, which is a terrorist organization."
"His wife filed a restraining order on him for beating on her, is that okay?" Lutrell asked the hecklers.
Abrego Garcia was **[reportedly detained outside of a Maryland Home Depot](https://substack.com/redirect/443fe545-24d5-468e-a398-88fd6cbe8906?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** alongside MS-13 members and a court filing revealed his wife had reported several incidents of domestic abuse including being struck in the head and scratched by her husband.
"In November 2020, he hit me with his work boot," she wrote in the filing. "In August 2020, he hit me in the eye leaving a purple eye."
Many on the left still strongly defend Abrego Garcia and demand his return to the U.S. in spite of his alleged gang affiliations, history of domestic violence and having entered the country illegally. Sen. Chris Van Hollen of Maryland met with Abrego Garcia in El Salvador Thursday night.
"I said my main goal of this trip was to meet with Kilmar. Tonight I had that chance. I have called his wife, Jennifer, to pass along his message of love. I look forward to providing a full update upon my return," Van Hollen **[wrote on X](https://substack.com/redirect/cde0b019-ceac-4e6f-a201-e7bd01eaa70f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** along with a picture of himself sitting with Abrego Garcia at a table.
* * *
**[Together With Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/b2105371-efae-4869-af57-8e0d7b46895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2105371-efae-4869-af57-8e0d7b46895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's Mode Mobile, 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.1
Their disruptive tech, the EarnPhone and EarnOS, have **[helped users earn and save an eye-popping $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/b2105371-efae-4869-af57-8e0d7b46895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , driving $60M+ in revenue and a massive 45M+ consumer base. And having secured partnerships with Walmart and Best Buy, Mode's not stopping there...
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into **[an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/b2105371-efae-4869-af57-8e0d7b46895c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. The difference is that you have a chance to invest early in Mode's pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share.
They've just been granted the stock ticker _$MODE_ by the Nasdaq2 and the time to invest at their current share price is running out.

# _Don 't Miss It:_ Karoline Leavitt silences the left-wing media with a special guest...
White House Press Sec Karoline Leavitt **[left reporters speechless this week](https://substack.com/redirect/02d06155-e0e9-48ac-ac76-261d0f7d3100?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by introducing Patty Morin, mother of Rachel Morin who was raped and murdered by an illegal immigrant.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/02d06155-e0e9-48ac-ac76-261d0f7d3100?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

President Trump invited Patty Morin to the stage during a TPUSA convention last year to give a heart-wrenching speech about how the Democrat's open border's have made this country less safe and it has had deadly consequences.

clean_body: Don't mess with a Navy SEAL | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Don't mess with a Navy SEAL Apr 18 | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Morgan Luttrell who came to his town hall speaking event to demand the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a suspected MS-13 member and illegal immigrant that the Trump administration deported to El Salvador. "Where do you, I'm talking about YOU, personally stand on the return of Abrego Garcia," one protester asked Lutrell before several others began cheering and chanting "bring him home!" Lutrell didn't overreact, but collected himself and took his time to respond to the mob. "As I understand it, he is an illegal alien," he said. "And when he was detained he was with two MS-13 members, which is a terrorist organization." "His wife filed a restraining order on him for beating on her, is that okay?" Lutrell asked the hecklers. Abrego Garcia was alongside MS-13 members and a court filing revealed his wife had reported several incidents of domestic abuse including being struck in the head and scratched by her husband. "In November 2020, he hit me with his work boot," she wrote in the filing. "In August 2020, he hit me in the eye leaving a purple eye." Many on the left still strongly defend Abrego Garcia and demand his return to the U.S. in spite of his alleged gang affiliations, history of domestic violence and having entered the country illegally. Sen. Chris Van Hollen of Maryland met with Abrego Garcia in El Salvador Thursday night. "I said my main goal of this trip was to meet with Kilmar. Tonight I had that chance. I have called his wife, Jennifer, to pass along his message of love. I look forward to providing a full update upon my return," Van Hollen along with a picture of himself sitting with Abrego Garcia at a table. | | ---|---|--- No, it's not Nvidia... | Dear Parents and Grandparents, The Easter season is here! That means it's the perfect time to help your kids remember why we celebrate Easter: The ultimate sacrifice that Jesus made, and His glorious resurrection! If your kids are like most, they look forward to Easter morning with eager anticipation! The joy of receiving baskets of goodies and sweet treats is enough to make any child excited. But with all the excitement, it's easy for kids to forget why we celebrate Easter: The resurrection of Jesus Christ.
---

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
Grow in your knowledge and understanding of Christianity

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=433aa4a019a14e73ad7fb3d3167f798c&_e=xzCMwaDkVAgbnDVbwnEwIBtL4PXeSJl1duSNf_ZQbT9l4-wczmfUCZEeWu6pyQMl7IcusdKUzOdGoYtoXjMmtKI1VMR5jRb6uL3csqhKU1Rt5Atgjc9XzdvfMSq12nAVKwxcbXawDkklwRjpYtV1xbqlDpzpUlbW4YauYdgwyh8rVUv4vlHhaQCpMoCsXWpYmzr52DBgdTZhdQuC-soyZ0WcuVayO-Tdnmbejg5z2eGepx0VdMvrIjOQWPy9Uo2w2_v8tfi-DJpfeEWHrLZUk0-bKcoGAmgALrkxPklACewdoQWanuZTUx-k5PP9MCz3gOVW7PQ555TON12u3sgnIZ5YQnBBQ298jhnaJ_MqMo3_RbW4dlOw45dxo-9s5qmadqtzBCJ0tpZZpf4SDR55KzBcqA-01xoShHq9Je-xISGzIrwBsVIetmQD-iOxPeRO)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=433aa4a019a14e73ad7fb3d3167f798c&_e=xzCMwaDkVAgbnDVbwnEwIBtL4PXeSJl1duSNf_ZQbT9l4-wczmfUCZEeWu6pyQMl7IcusdKUzOdGoYtoXjMmtKI1VMR5jRb6uL3csqhKU1Rt5Atgjc9XzdvfMSq12nAVKwxcbXawDkklwRjpYtV1xbqlDpzpUlbW4YauYdgwyh8rVUv4vlHhaQCpMoCsXWpYmzr52DBgdTZhdQuC-soyZ0WcuVayO-Tdnmbejg5z2eGepx0VdMvrIjOQWPy9Uo2w2_v8tfi-DJpfeEWHrLZUk0-bKcoGAmgALrkxPklACeyQTFiPpCVNiDlmKca5LSzAclSnm5cgRkaacTbocW1rIdYRlCcNwwPYe7pIlEnMq35AVK1rGshtYOzp3Hs-tGk47KIEBCytreSwkzx7s1q4wApHPu9U7YXQxrREQ1u-0t2j7iAGnc6lrfiSlAV6gq02)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=433aa4a019a14e73ad7fb3d3167f798c&_e=xzCMwaDkVAgbnDVbwnEwIBtL4PXeSJl1duSNf_ZQbT9l4-wczmfUCZEeWu6pyQMl7IcusdKUzOdGoYtoXjMmtKI1VMR5jRb6uL3csqhKU1Rt5Atgjc9XzdvfMSq12nAVKwxcbXawDkklwRjpYtV1xbqlDpzpUlbW4YauYdgwyh8rVUv4vlHhaQCpMoCsXWpYmzr52DBgdTZhdQuC-soyZ0WcuVayO-Tdnmbejg5z2eGepx0VdMvrIjOQWPy9Uo2w2_v8tfi-DJpfeEWHrLZUk0-bKcoGAmgALrkxPklACezNQ-SWEKYf65HeSKjGgjcPBIGLRQIzD_sMMw6_i-VzVWwBYemt2oXOuBMwYQuNMMyI2y7ZO1Ib0fiEL_yiiXumfxQ0Fd7HGHtKu7S2Vre2xrlk_wpAZq7MUJYbctj7grnL_gP7QklAOew6uc7BbDoG)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=433aa4a019a14e73ad7fb3d3167f798c&_e=xzCMwaDkVAgbnDVbwnEwIBtL4PXeSJl1duSNf_ZQbT9l4-wczmfUCZEeWu6pyQMl7IcusdKUzOdGoYtoXjMmtKI1VMR5jRb6uL3csqhKU1Rt5Atgjc9XzdvfMSq12nAVKwxcbXawDkklwRjpYtV1xbqlDpzpUlbW4YauYdgwyh8rVUv4vlHhaQCpMoCsXWpYmzr52DBgdTZhdQuC-soyZ0WcuVayO-Tdnmbejg5z2eGepx0VdMvrIjOQWPy9Uo2w2_v8tfi-DJpfeEWHrLZUk0-bKcoGAmgALrkxPklACeyW1A5BeF3c3zzpoQH_DA4SZXOoNxr-HdPvtjgGhmVgU1hkKM4S-RlL__ZpFs2PZTTHw6IWVo_v38R2bTwpQvp4qs7IuL6P-C14_muEmSngbkfohpjTfa1kulW_Oi5kF44ay7HsjYtckIi0Mk1NBCuI).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=433aa4a019a14e73ad7fb3d3167f798c&_t=9K8Vqyi98RF7ikPEMv4Jx227ixudxg24ErX0Y3fCADPx2bXYaGW0bPhBPWW4e4XmKsKYkOvcrBkqxrSzuEdVVxvQgge6ADeBHu6nwx_8srFhQgDzPNDowTVui4eH42mB)

| | | Protests against Trump will be taking place tomorrow (April 19th) all across the country. This is our chance to show Trump, Elon Musk, and the rest of this tyrannical administration that we won’t let them attack our communities and destroy our Constitution. There’s power in numbers – in every town, city, and state across the country, we need to declare with one voice that enough is enough and we’re standing strong against Trump’s fascist power grab. [So gather your friends, family, and neighbors and get out there! Click here to find a protest in your community >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3f62306-94f7-4cf2-8ad4-dd7e505e5f81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

There’s power in numbers – in every town, city, and state across the country, we need to declare with one voice that enough is enough and we’re standing strong against Trump’s fascist power grab. | | | | | | | Not able to join tomorrow? Then please forward this to others, and help get them out to show support! Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Got a progressive cause or organization you want to promote? ) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

subject: CO-SIGN THE LAWSUIT AGAINST TX GOV. ABBOTT →
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T) [**❗10,000 CO-SIGNERS NEEDED❗**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60636?t=3&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T)

_“House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said House Democrats will “very likely” pursue litigation against Texas GOP Gov. Greg Abbott over what he says is an intentional delay of calling a special election”_ []()
| [CO-SIGN THE LAWSUIT AGAINST TX GOV. ABBOTT → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60636?t=4&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T)
---
This is **OUTRAGEOUS:**

A deep-blue seat in Houston is vacant — and instead of letting Texans vote, Greg Abbott just delayed the election until November.

**_This is how MAGA cheats._**

Republicans ran on “improving the economy” last November – but now that they’ve **DESTROYED IT** , they know that if voters went to the polls any sooner, they’d be crushed.

Rep. Hakeem Jeffries is fighting back and threatening a lawsuit against Abbott, but we need to prove just how serious we are about this.

[**_So please, sign on before 11:59PM to citizen co-sign the suit against Abbott and together, we can force him to act – and we can keep this seat BLUE! → _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60636?t=5&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T)
[CO-SIGN THE LAWSUIT AGAINST TX GOV. ABBOTT → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60636?t=6&akid=23007%2E4449941%2Efxbp2T)
---
Thanks for signing.

Fight for Reform

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: One quick action for you today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan is doing everything in her power to move Congress to hold Trump and his administration accountable
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)

Friend — We have a quick action for you to take today.
Right now, we are facing some of the greatest threats to our democracy this country has ever seen in the wake of numerous arrests and deportations of **legal** US residents by the Trump Administration.
Due process has been thrown out the window. Hundreds have been sent to a mega-prison in El Salvador, some mistakenly, with Donald Trump refusing to obey court orders to bring them back.
Ilhan is doing everything in her power to move Congress to hold Trump and his administration accountable, and she urgently needs your support.
**[Will you add your name to Ilhan’s petition DEMANDING an end to these illegal arrests? We have to keep the pressure up until these disastrous mistakes are reversed.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-ice/?source=em250418-1-180&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-april25-ice/?source=em250418-1-180&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)**
It's going to take a massive popular movement of people using their voices to defend our democracy from fascists like Donald Trump.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1599_791427_4IHCI7&akid=1599%2E791427%2E4IHCI7)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033

## Some pics from the White House this week...
## SNL hits a new LOW...
I usually don't care much about Saturday Night Live -- every once in a while I'll see a clip on X the morning after it airs, but generally it's not on my radar.
But their choice of a cold open for last Saturday's show stopped me in my tracks.
The skit -- the one they chose to start the show -- kicked off Holy Week by brazenly mocking Easter and Jesus.
Titled "The Cleansing of the Temple," the open presented a tableau of the biblical story, which was quickly interrupted by "Trump," (played by James Austin Johnson). The skit used this pantomime of Trump to distastefully mock Jesus and Easter.
In theory this is nothing new.
SNL and all the other mainstream variety or comedy shows have always poked fun at Republican figures and conservative values.
Mocking the right is these shows' bread and butter.
But mocking Jesus and Easter? This cold open was a step too far.
The flippant disrespect that the skit showed towards Christianity -- just a couple days before Holy Week -- is nothing short of disgusting.
At one point in the sketch, in the midst of a bit attacking tariffs, "Trump" (Johnson) quipped "The stock market did a Jesus; it died, then on the third day it was risen. And then on the fourth day it died again, possibly never to return -- just like Jesus."
As if we needed another reason not to watch SNL...

name: The Democratic Party
subject: We’re taking Trump and DOGE to court
body:
---
Derek: **We’re taking Trump and DOGE to court.** Here’s what you need to know: Last month, Trump signed an executive order to impose radical changes on how Americans register to vote, cast a ballot, and participate in our democracy. All of which threaten to disenfranchise lawful voters, and none of which is legal. It makes it harder for married women who’ve changed their names to register to vote, and attacks states that lawfully allow mail ballots cast by election day to count. If states don’t comply, they could lose federal funding. And somehow, as we’ve come to expect from this administration, it gets even worse. The executive order also gives DOGE access to the data of millions of voters, sensitive personal information handed over to Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire. The threat is real. After floating a third term, Trump and Musk are taking steps to undermine our elections. That’s why we filed a lawsuit to stop them. We’re already suing to block Trump’s hostile takeover of the Federal Election Commission, and now we’re gearing up for yet another legal battle that will shape the future of our country. [**Winning these is not easy, especially when your opponents are the president and the richest man in the world. So we’re relying on a surge of grassroots support right now to help us put an end to these illegal power grabs. If you’re with us, we hope you’ll consider making a donation to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250418_3217_fr&refcode2=3221_22930333_TEz9VB&akid=3221%2E22930333%2ETEz9VB) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250418_3217_fr&refcode2=3221_22930333_TEz9VB&akid=3221%2E22930333%2ETEz9VB)**

name: Gary Sinise
subject: A final chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
body:
I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dfa5a3eef81e43e5bdc2ff15eac29ecf&_e=WX065b2NUZN_cCqsTOtrYlk9B04c8DaOyH0vWQPWoqxR8bVbjb1DDFvDaJaTiHvKB99s6CDpLySS4YEdk6MNQ3ZlcOT6SCsrCTKMGWByJCbgOv44barZIQw4_CNr1ntRCogLQBmzOP41E-Yzbnnsph5mfOE_4a24aBbNvcNZEQgipsWd2Grjv00S6RrpFizFt-lG6uSa1LaAz1gPa-Hp7zYN-aIvdN2JQpo0y4OKHAOw4Q6HSPN_naDY2bfp-9umjzvjyzW2zPfe4mMjXIkMPjD0RAwHGUf9xu18opp8saytxYBO9fivTrSCHedeEfFk)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dfa5a3eef81e43e5bdc2ff15eac29ecf&_e=WX065b2NUZN_cCqsTOtrYlk9B04c8DaOyH0vWQPWoqxR8bVbjb1DDFvDaJaTiHvKB99s6CDpLySS4YEdk6MNQ3ZlcOT6SCsrCTKMGWByJCbgOv44barZIQw4_CNr1ntRCogLQBmzOP41E-Yzbnnsph5mfOE_4a24aBbNvcNZEQjZgd8BvK6Ap0t7KEgaScpPitfGkRKBps-0fUwcpx9YAL-dTk1fflQEUHq0fBlxod5Nsi_0R-onA193kexa3sZCSDsFT0Of_9UxdkkWrnNEC-pEvls-PkS-YuH0CKETeWKWjwxmU9lf8NjZClkN1I7E)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dfa5a3eef81e43e5bdc2ff15eac29ecf&_e=WX065b2NUZN_cCqsTOtrYlk9B04c8DaOyH0vWQPWoqxR8bVbjb1DDFvDaJaTiHvKB99s6CDpLySS4YEdk6MNQ3ZlcOT6SCsrCTKMGWByJCbgOv44barZIQw4_CNr1ntRCogLQBmzOP41E-Yzbnnsph5mfOE_4a24aBbNvcNZEQh91OsoAv78c50fxUNM4GURKWusBuRUhUvOj3z4x-oaB1YuDmvWipoaAR3RdSCTk5u162rvAyyePdTw5XdoXmRP0E0-fPGUiKq9HXpL-GZfg16P10_XF1jGIh1ADINqEx3mGkbQraD6lRlDiRIxRm3X)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dfa5a3eef81e43e5bdc2ff15eac29ecf&_e=WX065b2NUZN_cCqsTOtrYlk9B04c8DaOyH0vWQPWoqxR8bVbjb1DDFvDaJaTiHvKB99s6CDpLySS4YEdk6MNQ3ZlcOT6SCsrCTKMGWByJCbgOv44barZIQw4_CNr1ntRCogLQBmzOP41E-Yzbnnsph5mfOE_4a24aBbNvcNZEQjePPW-LE7OtucTcFaxKnlCfwqUZorZ7APHGSPmj3TaxTiMs4fFH2dNTuuHNv_gONLWNWeB36CW6XIbAGN76W3JH2MjdtKm3ZnGG-wcQ_w2k0R0jsDfzj32k3eaJAWKzALOwgpuFBtEpT2LvcVLTQzX)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. body:

A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...

After months of grinding, they came out with this prototype that blew everyone's minds.

It uses this patented military tech that makes it 20X more badass than anything as regular Joes can buy.

It uses military-graded nanotech to magnify 10X more than any other IR monoscopes out there.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer this monoscope optic to you at an **[INSANE discount...](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21165/6374453/84f17ce8579295f4f44ce5f58732db76973bf672/f16eb47ff82cd61891bf79914cfe3eabe1b5ce1b)**

These won’t last long at this price.

In fact, I’m positive these will run out soon.

body:
What college wrestling has to do with being a Senator
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-157eeA8VHsmLsubzgQDBI6HpyJdVVyUCizdHRbTyW8McS1hWc344wkFdLptZxAWw9WQvqPz4fq5AXIH_jiE2zjWx5mFxdi6GTOMAYHwb3DDCpxq2nAuM4yTeYJreoXFboxHL3c3P1_QMRpgEMQyjW8GDPK4oBidn-25M3lsR2XiBA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

I grew up wrestling across Pennsylvania. I know firsthand the blood, sweat, and tears that wrestlers have to pour into this sport is spellbinding.

So when I watched those incredible athletes step up to the mat in Philadelphia, **[I was reminded of the lessons I learned from wrestling, and how they have impacted me even to this day.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-1455NqIy-Q7pUyxif5DFr0LhkGUvdVdFDv6U-IKMHCuVSo2xrr3NOW2RXHxxccL-n5_1mV6XE7n9NfQQ8RuPYBykRYG9OvMBJAEvpfSEjTaNXd4HL20AcgYC4Xcx4NfiojERWIbTeRaildDx3MKqmZKe2oeqThVJTYlV0RyPSgbWw%3D%3D)**

During my senior year at West Point, I was tested. I was the captain of the U.S. Army's wrestling team and I blew out my knee and had to finish the season with a torn ACL. Working through that injury and leading the team as team captain while performing on the mat was a real challenge.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-15uEyNg_zfy_rwpndu8qBgBBw0ZYP9rqD5OZIYHsFtwnzE5-kcwrKx7n68kSZYUN5e1Wh80S_UuuN3W7IyTiaKFp4Mfy8PT5VgkZmQsItXBgeUHyC7jrGKMzFwejPfuxfA6-f0cpdWP8OoegDO9GoLaF6r2HGMN9-iZ-x0SIsUltQ%3D%3D)

**But I 'm no stranger to challenges. I've been challenged and tested my entire life. I've learned from the victories and the defeats on the mat, on the battlefield, and now in the U.S. Senate.**
[DONATE](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-16e2ZPOVqM33RsewvlE7Iev_B05JUvLMTyBece5DmjnLMLri6LtlsWmi3fBGUwpZaMPh5u5u7lhcY__yECiTvVFyF_MLkVMkVPyNIfFb_THsAi_NF2WuK_hKQQE1xGljYYlt6o596GX14_K1sLK0KALzXYYaQCHyVIRUKo5SfeC9A%3D%3D)
---

As we speak, I'm fighting to lower costs for families, unleash American energy, make our communities safer, and ensure every citizen has the opportunity to achieve their version of the American Dream.

**But the fight isn 't easy.** It takes hard work, courage, the capacity to overcome adversity, and respect--_all of which I learned through my time wrestling._

**[Now, as I continue to go to the mat for America, I'm asking for your support. Can I count on you to chip in a generous donation of $25 or more today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-14Qr_f8jCmQ3RMKR6m2mWyhRxfk-lgHzFtRrwvKUG7xxgFgQr0fPrfoJZGn41qdtktMtyejSf7IwUwXaKMNxXb4icEHOQrHtvXmjmHdAUY9lk_9KT_qw9ZozmedQjTKpmfiMqKkys_W25kzzndWTeV_Y6Hwo_DsFW5Xc-NN95w-0w%3D%3D)**
[DONATE](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-14ad7iGitOOMZggBVBDnqlabVBgbJXQ7ik627h8yyA3lh47RGD04V-N1Aydeb3HqjtGAq-Be56IKU2fbkfdaKCDmKt8VcKExjC79PVO6yFlmnYQpRqgveCvOOIOsCo91mxYMW-ZdyoYzkHmI_yYzCnmgxq4FRMnTXvAuGZ6JgaiFA%3D%3D)
---

The work being done in Washington can be grueling and difficult, but the end result is well worth it. We've already made incredible progress to confirm cabinet secretaries in record speed, combat the opioid epidemic, support small businesses, unleash American energy, cut bloated government, slash wasteful spending, and so much more.

_This is just the beginning ..._

With so much more work still to be done, I'm asking for your support. **[Before the day is over, please consider chipping in to help me continue the fight.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=256f1d9f91324b3a974b2f2dba4de94b&_e=kF7bNWS4_3UCGENubzhNSotVtCw1StR-pvYU0mu-ydIVuARW_I-coo5txhWW5JfVXtPjDw4ouWdRWmGdCD4VcA2FDrRpcaXP6LaeITNUeRlhiMifgRkvU_X6F8KaOhEadjS6r1t5gi3PB5cyYrchPC-lV5JWp6avjL_2JIxWV_WNQ1gNqyqC6drMbPNgNdpSWFvcgNnnfsx_2UuPsxPp82um8x87OTn8Tj7uVxKs-17W12anpJhWGZ56psIacl_N6o0tT6z5ykRZp-UOyfFHg03_iIxIc_oEwW5LHaQl15x3BQG_IZaTMdcS8OA5UNXuniUcSwHGL9eo6G8rpscdFDGHCLbhNzdV72938EjTF0jseY5V47uE5adV42NXfPcKi_l9b2S6KUPnqOIdJbIq1w%3D%3D)**

To make matters worse, our president is manipulating the stock market every day, and we know his most loyal followers have no problem with corruption. You deserve to know that your elected officials are working hard to make things better, not to put more money in their own pockets. = | = I will always fight for YOU — my community. Especially when that means standing up to corruption. Let’s get it done, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |

**$3.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** Our next election is only FOUR days away, and this fall, every single seat in the Virginia House is up for grabs – $3 helps win races like these and more. **Reason #2:** Trump and his billionaire allies are hell-bent on using their wealth to cement GOP power in the states. Elon Musk-aligned PACs spent over $25 million in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, but Democrats secured a victory. **When grassroots supporters chip in $3, it helps our candidates compete.** **Reason #3:** Losing upcoming races will weaken our blue firewall against Trump's draconian agenda. $3 helps defeat extremists itching to roll back rights and restrict our freedoms. [ So what do you say? clean_body: While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | | | | ---|--- $3. That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: Reason #1: Our next election is only FOUR days away, and this fall, every single seat in the Virginia House is up for grabs – $3 helps win races like these and more. Reason #2: Trump and his billionaire allies are hell-bent on using their wealth to cement GOP power in the states. Elon Musk-aligned PACs spent over $25 million in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, but Democrats secured a victory. When grassroots supporters chip in $3, it helps our candidates compete. Reason #3: Losing upcoming races will weaken our blue firewall against Trump's draconian agenda. $3 helps defeat extremists itching to roll back rights and restrict our freedoms. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | $3 donations are exactly what we need to win and loosen the GOP’s grip on state legislatures. While $3 may not seem like a huge investment, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. By donating today, you can play a pivotal role in electing Democrats to statehouses in places like your community and across the country. ---|---
Peter,

Elon Musk wasn’t on the ballot, but he’s acting like he runs the United States. Under the guise of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), he’s leading the charge to freeze millions in Title X funding, **the nation’s only dedicated family planning safety net.**

Why is this administration attacking critical reproductive health care? [**We’re demanding answers.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106070170/540322992/2141984067?sourceid=1150599&utm_campaign=25emaus-0404aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=titlex&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ExMWY4MC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeC_UbbeWw_AfO274kpPBMFFcGr2EbLNHWoCvcMTvRs=&emci=4325baa8-0c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1ca11f80-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106070171/540322997/2141984067?sourceid=1150599&utm_campaign=25emaus-0404aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=titlex&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ExMWY4MC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeC_UbbeWw_AfO274kpPBMFFcGr2EbLNHWoCvcMTvRs=&emci=4325baa8-0c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1ca11f80-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
Just hours after the administration’s announcement, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to uncover the truth—requesting key documents, communications, and records that expose the motivations behind this harmful decision.
[**Our FOIA request is more than a formality—it’s the first strike in holding this administration accountable. DOGE’s attacks on reproductive rights must be stopped, and we can’t do it without you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106070172/540322998/2141984067?sourceid=1150599&utm_campaign=25emaus-0404aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=titlex&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ExMWY4MC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeC_UbbeWw_AfO274kpPBMFFcGr2EbLNHWoCvcMTvRs=&emci=4325baa8-0c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1ca11f80-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106070173/540322999/2141984067?sourceid=1150599&utm_campaign=25emaus-0404aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=titlex&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ExMWY4MC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeC_UbbeWw_AfO274kpPBMFFcGr2EbLNHWoCvcMTvRs=&emci=4325baa8-0c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1ca11f80-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

The clinics targeted by this funding freeze have delivered trusted care for decades—under both Republican and Democratic administrations. These attacks are unjustified and dangerous.

Help us hold them accountable. [**Give now and join the fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106070174/540323000/2141984067?sourceid=1150599&utm_campaign=25emaus-0404aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=titlex&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ExMWY4MC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeC_UbbeWw_AfO274kpPBMFFcGr2EbLNHWoCvcMTvRs=&emci=4325baa8-0c1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1ca11f80-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

Nancy Northup

name: Andy Kim
subject: The SAVE Act is voter suppression in disguise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Republicans are gearing up to pass a wide-sweeping bill called the SAVE Act that is voter suppression in disguise.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106070786/540325030/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM5YzJmZC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-MuonYBgIQRF_GLHbl96i8piy3digC9G76GbAKdITk=&emci=4716ccc0-de1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e039c2fd-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Republicans are gearing up to pass a wide-sweeping bill called the SAVE Act that is voter suppression in disguise. It just passed the House, and now it's moving forward to the Senate – **where I'll fight to make sure it doesn't advance.** We have laws and protections against voter fraud, and we should make sure they're strongly enforced. But this bill isn't working to make our elections safer. **The ONLY thing this bill would actually do is disenfranchise Americans.** Millions of eligible voters lack easy access to citizenship documents that the bill would require to be able to register to vote. No matter what party you are, the SAVE Act would keep eligible Americans, including women, people of color, rural voters, and people with disabilities from accessing the ballot box. [**Today, I'm asking you to sign on to my petition urging the Senate to vote NO on the SAVE Act. I will not support any bill that disenfranchises the votes of millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106070789/540325037/-1369383782?contactdata=6OCd9tZ1jyz6IOsXDvQg7rCfNOxxwuBzk7qwxpiqOjRbhPNYipzDanSsQj36CH8+t8IO2IBxkzov8Abn5aSE+khEXqAqGeCnd0E72L08FAyhd5OHsBGs0NqRpFOPXAY8ht6q6BbRhjBK6SrvSXDo4Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM5YzJmZC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-MuonYBgIQRF_GLHbl96i8piy3digC9G76GbAKdITk=&emci=4716ccc0-de1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e039c2fd-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26261389) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106070792/540325040/-1369383782?contactdata=6OCd9tZ1jyz6IOsXDvQg7rCfNOxxwuBzk7qwxpiqOjRbhPNYipzDanSsQj36CH8+t8IO2IBxkzov8Abn5aSE+khEXqAqGeCnd0E72L08FAyhd5OHsBGs0NqRpFOPXAY8ht6q6BbRhjBK6SrvSXDo4Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM5YzJmZC02OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-MuonYBgIQRF_GLHbl96i8piy3digC9G76GbAKdITk=&emci=4716ccc0-de1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e039c2fd-691c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26261389) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:
