clean_body: Republicans are gearing up to pass a wide-sweeping bill called the SAVE Act that is voter suppression in disguise. | | | | Republicans are gearing up to pass a wide-sweeping bill called the SAVE Act that is voter suppression in disguise. It just passed the House, and now it's moving forward to the Senate – where I'll fight to make sure it doesn't advance. We have laws and protections against voter fraud, and we should make sure they're strongly enforced. But this bill isn't working to make our elections safer. The ONLY thing this bill would actually do is disenfranchise Americans. Millions of eligible voters lack easy access to citizenship documents that the bill would require to be able to register to vote. No matter what party you are, the SAVE Act would keep eligible Americans, including women, people of color, rural voters, and people with disabilities from accessing the ballot box. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I voted no. Now I’m asking for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I hope you’ll take a moment to read this email.
#
This is a long email, but it’s a deeply personal one. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it because what’s at stake right now couldn’t be more important.
**I voted no on the Republican budget plan in Congress** — a framework that advances reckless cuts to Medicaid and other lifelines that millions of Americans depend on.
Let’s be clear: This proposal would rip health care away from millions of people to fund tax breaks for billionaires. And I won’t stand for it.
**When I think about what these cuts would mean, I think about Andy.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250418-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1912&refcode2=1912_21716_iwuE0W&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)
Andy was my husband. Just one year into our relationship, he was diagnosed with cancer. Overnight, we went from planning our future together to fighting for his life. I became his primary caregiver. During his battle with terminal cancer, I held his hand through appointments, treatments, and, ultimately, when he passed away.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250418-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1912&refcode2=1912_21716_iwuE0W&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)
But we were lucky. Andy had access to health care. It gave us precious time together. But I also saw firsthand how fragile access can be — and how devastating it is when people don’t have it.
**Not everyone is as lucky as we were.** Too many families are forced to make impossible choices — between seeing a doctor or keeping the lights on, between paying for a life-saving prescription, or putting food on the table for their children.
Health care is a human right. In the wealthiest country on earth, no one should have to make choices like these.
But right now, Republicans are threatening to make things even harder by slashing Medicaid and cutting off care for millions of Americans — including 1 in 4 Delawareans.
That’s why I voted no. It’s why I’m continuing to speak out. And it’s why I’m asking for your help.
**Because the truth is, there’s still time to protect Medicaid — but only if we show up and fight back together.**
[**Will you pitch in $5 to power our grassroots campaign and help us defend Medicaid?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250418-1?refcode=em20250418-1912&amount=5&refcode2=1912_21716_iwuE0W&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250418-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1912&refcode2=1912_21716_iwuE0W&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)**
When I think about the road ahead, I think of Andy. I think about every family that’s fighting to hold on to hope. I think about what it means to lead with compassion and conviction. And that’s what’s fueling my fight.
Thank you for reading,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250418-1&t=1&refcode2=1912_21716_iwuE0W&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1912%2E21716%2EiwuE0W)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M. ET, we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250418-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250418-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20054%2E9716520%2E4-soZ_)**

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Be honest with me.

**In just 10 weeks, 100,000+ illegal immigrants have been deported** , and border crossings have plummeted to record lows.

But Senate Democrats are doing EVERYTHING they can to stop him. **[That's why this Official Immigration Verification Poll is so important.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ffc9652f2e694133b744a56c93cbb648&_e=oKqR4ksQOSFLyiFKNkcVccyjFOcf8EHBAyAzJk9J8Wb05deKF9jQZvpihpb5Ze1T9mxg-1y0vyQS3yid0LFXyzfAtiJt49B2L4nqx5Gixs8TsjEXF1U3OF5xTwLLLaNZqWeghmXQeMpuka5qrXSfkbrkhx0cEEbhKSZMlrA0biv8JKc06rQ3QRe5TXA4S4l-yu9PzGU7NJw6VkGlwHsCWsFFqcBtFA_dW0CSTzTEdxHDzMc4v0WEKzCMx0Xb-aLkm_R-tONSd_RdgbmjWQIWaqaSyiESuxtUR8W3gvDE1qfqyO3ocEW0Wg-NQJhmcQUSr8Lr2cSylGlicQTaY_-qRON3r8bqE2xsZasxkcdtgaCwViWaUgstkL-cxxgFMkUSqQ_6FN5yWp_1G-gIvH4hEzMfmbcXHychhe0ly9DiNi2AKv-A-gK-SzfCcHW4WrB3g179tkcwaoFvRz_YBwE4fABf5o24HUYmIudH3Jz-eJzwZsKA8lqehnjbpXb_mYKg)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ffc9652f2e694133b744a56c93cbb648&_e=oKqR4ksQOSFLyiFKNkcVccyjFOcf8EHBAyAzJk9J8Wb05deKF9jQZvpihpb5Ze1T9mxg-1y0vyQS3yid0LFXyzfAtiJt49B2L4nqx5Gixs8TsjEXF1U3OF5xTwLLLaNZqWeghmXQeMpuka5qrXSfkbrkhx0cEEbhKSZMlrA0biv8JKc06rQ3QRe5TXA4S4l-yu9PzGU7NJw6VkGlwHsCWsFFqcBtFA_dW0CSTzTEdxHDzMc4v0WEKzCMx0Xb-aLkm_R-tONSd_RdgbmjWQIWaqaSyiESuxtUR8W3gvDE1qfqyO3ocEW0Wg-NQJhmcQUSr8Lr2cSylGlicQTaY_-qRON3r8bqE2xsZasxkcdtgaDFBz7yK9m5awXrrjT87QUIJEJw7t613qc5Izs5iewnW_oO9_yFIMdNbnhoQBXUztz55LCxoAjoQ3VVnxnL1pak0ZrKjPCdDWTwg-Rw0MZ91rr7jgYeA-nsDWIF4-7cgnX-ujn3O6vvug_fpGpnXYlR)
Peter,

Under President Trump's decisive leadership, our nation's borders are more secure than ever. Through robust policies and unwavering commitment, we've significantly curbed illegal immigration and fortified our homeland.

| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=62632d633d&e=33f53a5b1a)

---
| Friends,

Last week, With Honor Co-Founder and CEO Rye Barcott joined the [R](http://)[emembrance Society](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=262a45ad87&e=33f53a5b1a) and the [American Coalition for Ukraine](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=e48acfb093&e=33f53a5b1a) for an event titled "Vladimir Putin - World's Number One Terrorist: Implications for U.S. Policy." Four days later, on Palm Sunday, two ballistic missiles struck a central neighborhood in Sumy, a city in the northeast of Ukraine. The attack, which killed 34 civilians, including two children, and wounded another 117, is the deadliest Russian attack this year. It is a stark reminder of the brutality that Ukrainians have experienced almost daily for the last three years.

Rye also discussed the early and ongoing support of veterans in Congress, particularly members of the [For Country Caucus](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=57641f850f&e=33f53a5b1a), who met with Ukrainian MP Sasha Ustinova in the first days of the invasion and committed to standing with Ukraine for the long haul.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=733b2c8aad&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| As the Trump Administration continues to negotiate an end to the war, With Honor Action applauds the leadership of Congressman Brian Fitzpatrick, a former FBI agent who is currently in Ukraine to express our shared goals of a democratic Ukraine free from Russian aggression.
---

| With Honor Action is excited to once again sponsor the AI+ Expo hosted by the Special Competitive Studies Project ([SCSP](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1ad1d12766&e=33f53a5b1a)) in Washington D.C. You can read the full announcement [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2df9756ae8&e=33f53a5b1a) or by clicking the image above. This three-day event isn't just another conference; it is an opportunity for our nation's most cutting-edge AI innovators and policymakers to interact and collaborate on the future of technology for America, and the world. We hope you'll join us for what promises to be an impactful event.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I introduced legislation to roll back Trump’s tariffs. Learn more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Folks, big news: I introduced new legislation to challenge Trump’s authority to issue the sweeping tariffs (also just known as taxes !) he announced earlier this month in a chaotic and reckless move that sent global markets into a tailspin.
If that’s all you need to hear, please add your name right now to say you support my legislation and help build momentum around it. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/inEEcpRxckKXwmUThFqzNw2]
Derek, President Trump does not have the authority to wage this kind of trade war — no president does!
Since the Trump White House seems to have forgotten basic civics, a reminder: The executive branch cannot create or change laws out of thin air. It’s the legislative branch — a.k.a. Congress — that is responsible for writing laws, including those that govern trade and tariffs.
That means it’s also Congress’s responsibility to reassert its authority when the President oversteps the bounds of his power.
Trump’s tariff strategy is raising costs on American families, threatening alliances that our national security depends on, and creating opportunity for China and other adversaries to take advantage of global instability.
Congress can’t stand by and watch our economy crash, people’s retirement accounts plummet, and prices skyrocket — we must take action.
I strongly urge my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to support my legislation to take back constitutional power on trade. Add your name to join me today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/inEEcpRxckKXwmUThFqzNw2]
Thanks for using your voice with me on this critical issue!
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

If that’s all you need to hear, please add your name right now to say you support my legislation and help build momentum around it. [] Derek, President Trump does not have the authority to wage this kind of trade war — no president does! Since the Trump White House seems to have forgotten basic civics, a reminder: The executive branch cannot create or change laws out of thin air. It’s the legislative branch — a.k.a. Congress — that is responsible for writing laws, including those that govern trade and tariffs. That means it’s also Congress’s responsibility to reassert its authority when the President oversteps the bounds of his power. Trump’s tariff strategy is raising costs on American families, threatening alliances that our national security depends on, and creating opportunity for China and other adversaries to take advantage of global instability. Congress can’t stand by and watch our economy crash, people’s retirement accounts plummet, and prices skyrocket — we must take action. I strongly urge my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to support my legislation to take back constitutional power on trade. Add your name to join me today. [] Thanks for using your voice with me on this critical issue! -Tim Kaine [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

### Join me April 19 to build a movement that can't be ignored.
| | [Caroline Gleich](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---

Tomorrow, I'll be at speaking at a community protest in Park City from 12-2 PM.
Not because I want to protest.
Because I _have_ to.
Because I still believe in what this country could be--if we're brave enough to fight for it.
Caroline Gleich ⛰️ is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Odt8pdKhH4Csh7Kfd9W3JOV0fyH6Lk8yOI65ILMeVMk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161618206)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d9c302d-9fcc-458d-9319-538861d4a123?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
We're in a defining moment.
Not just for Utah. Not just for the United States.
For the _world order_ we've led for generations.
For the principles of democracy, dignity, and decency that hold society together.
This is not about left vs. right.
This is about **progress vs. regression.**
**Freedom vs. control.**
**Hope vs. fear.**
* * *
So what do we do?
We build a mass movement.
Research by political scientist Erica Chenoweth shows that it only takes **3.5% of a population** engaged in sustained, nonviolent resistance to bring down authoritarian regimes. That's not a dream--it's a strategy backed by decades of data. ([BBC article on the 3.5% rule](https://substack.com/redirect/68cdeebf-7ef8-4136-ab61-14e2d459bf97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
We get to 3.5% by organizing.
By showing up.
By texting our friends. Talking to our neighbors.
By refusing to be silent.
This Saturday is one step of the process. There will be more rallies and strikes. More fights. More moments that test our courage.
But I will not back down. And I'm asking you not to either.
📍 **Park City | April 19 | 12 -2 PM | City Park Bandstand**
🌐 **Find a rally near you:[fiftyfifty.one](https://substack.com/redirect/f175d0d8-e63a-47f5-b889-d8525c3ea9c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fbdef1f4-d8a8-4857-a4b2-7326fcb006a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
I choose a future where laws are stable, business can thrive, and workers earn a fair wage.
Where we lead the world in curing disease, advancing science, and building climate solutions.
Where we celebrate differences instead of punishing them.
Where public lands stay public, and families can afford to live, breathe clean air, and dream big.
That's what we're fighting for.
* * *
But the Trump administration- and the politicians and billionaires who enable him- have made their choice too.
They want to roll us backwards.
To gut climate science.
To silence educators and scientists.
To strip away diversity, equity, and inclusion--despite the proof that diverse teams outperform, innovate, and lead.
They want to impose tariffs that disrupt economies and cost real people their livelihoods.
They've made it clear: they're willing to destroy institutions, abandon allies, and consolidate power at any cost.
They are not conserving anything. They are burning it down.
And when you defund the CDC and remove the scientists working there, our public health will suffer--leaving us more vulnerable to future pandemics and health crises. That means the next outbreak could hit our kids' schools, our nursing homes, or our rural hospitals with devastating speed.
When you gut the EPA, our air and water become more polluted--especially in frontline communities already facing disproportionate environmental harm. PFAS and other toxic chemicals will continue to contaminate drinking water, increasing cancer risks for families, including pregnant women and children.
When you kneecap the FDA, food recalls are slower. Dangerous drugs stay on the shelves longer. Contaminated baby formula, mislabeled allergy warnings, and toxic additives in everyday products make their way into our kitchens and medicine cabinets.
When clean energy programs are dismantled, we don't just lose innovation--we lose tens of thousands of good-paying jobs. We lose cheaper, safer energy options. We lose the chance to leave our kids a livable planet.
When DEI programs are dismantled in schools, workplaces, and government agencies, we don't become more fair--we become more divided. Talented students and workers are pushed out. Veterans, single parents, people with disabilities--all lose the support systems that help them thrive.
This is how democracy backslides--not all at once, but by a thousand cuts. And each cut harms real people.
This is our time to rise. To show what we're made of.
We won't go quietly. We will go together.
We can win this. We must win this.
Because if we don't fight for progress--no one else will.

Good morning! You've been picked to join the exclusive group to get early access to episodes before they're publicly available. I'm counting on you to provide your feedback directly to me so that I can share it with our podcast hosts, Ayla and Amy, to make our podcast better! Your thoughts on content, audio quality, and pacing will directly shape [**The Flyover Podcast's**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zzFvwyAUBOBfYzZb8HgFMzB08ZZOlTJaGB6BCofIIbHy7yu3e9Y73Sfd-TSfXC75evlyK9kW6xwoZO8ahRk4fPQcezHOggUbiYAkIys0ojF6NJIlG4MePUc1klJaICqvAcE7ckKgX4hlezgcxSgUSsEHF52EuKA0IBduTIecQm51G35qvrZEsbzqk7bB15UVm1q73Tv52cHUwbTv-_Cqj_ZY6OiPEPnZNZ_670T99D9lmw23PZeS70p3yC-ry-XPa-8-Pi38BgAA__9WrlSe) success. Here's what to expect:
**✓** The same great news you've come to love and enjoy.
**✓** Unbiased, fact-focused coverage.
**✓** Get informed on the day's top stories in just 15 minutes.

To join, click the button below and then subscribe to our YouTube channel. [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zzFvwyAUBOBfYzZb8HgFMzB08ZZOlTJaGB6BCofIIbHy7yu3e9Y73Sfd-TSfXC75evlyK9kW6xwoZO8ahRk4fPQcezHOggUbiYAkIys0ojF6NJIlG4MePUc1klJaICqvAcE7ckKgX4hlezgcxSgUSsEHF52EuKA0IBduTIecQm51G35qvrZEsbzqk7bB15UVm1q73Tv52cHUwbTv-_Cqj_ZY6OiPEPnZNZ_670T99D9lmw23PZeS70p3yC-ry-XPa-8-Pi38BgAA__9WrlSe) We'll shoot you an email with a private episode link every morning until launch, starting on the 21st. Thanks for your continued support—I can't wait for you to experience [**The Flyover Podcast**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zzFvwyAUBOBfYzZb8HgFMzB08ZZOlTJaGB6BCofIIbHy7yu3e9Y73Sfd-TSfXC75evlyK9kW6xwoZO8ahRk4fPQcezHOggUbiYAkIys0ojF6NJIlG4MePUc1klJaICqvAcE7ckKgX4hlezgcxSgUSsEHF52EuKA0IBduTIecQm51G35qvrZEsbzqk7bB15UVm1q73Tv52cHUwbTv-_Cqj_ZY6OiPEPnZNZ_670T99D9lmw23PZeS70p3yC-ry-XPa-8-Pi38BgAA__9WrlSe)! Cole -- CEO

clean_body: I've got something exciting and new for you: The Flyover Podcast is launching, and I want YOU to join our exclusive focus group. | | | Good morning! I've got something exciting for you: is launching, and I want YOU to get a sneak peek. You've been picked to join the exclusive group to get early access to episodes before they're publicly available. I'm counting on you to provide your feedback directly to me so that I can share it with our podcast hosts, Ayla and Amy, to make our podcast better! Your thoughts on content, audio quality, and pacing will directly shape success. Here's what to expect: ✓ The same great news you've come to love and enjoy. ✓ Unbiased, fact-focused coverage. ✓ Get informed on the day's top stories in just 15 minutes. To join, click the button below and then subscribe to our YouTube channel. We'll shoot you an email with a private episode link every morning until launch, starting on the 21st. Thanks for your continued support—I can't wait for you to experience ! Best, Cole -- CEO The Flyover✈️ (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

body:
Economic Forum: Exploring the Impact of Federal Investments in Alaska – Join Our Virtual Discussion| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Join us for a brief, one-hour virtual**[Economic Forum](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076686/540344593/375391747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399#!event/2025/5/1/virtual-economic-forum-how-federal-dollars-impact-alaska-8217-s-economy) focused on the role of federal investments in Alaska's economy**. This forum aims to provide valuable insights into how fluctuations in federal employment and funding impact Alaska’s economic landscape and long-term growth. **Economic Forum: Exploring the Impact of Federal Investments in Alaska – Join Our Virtual Discussion****Date:** Thursday, May 1, 2025**Time: **12 PM - 1:15 PM AK **Location:** Virtual - [Register here to participate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076688/540344596/375391747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399#!event/2025/5/1/virtual-economic-forum-how-federal-dollars-impact-alaska-8217-s-economy) This event is co-hosted by [Commonwealth North](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076691/540344598/-1385731277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399), a non-partisan public policy forum dedicated to educating Alaskans on critical issues, the [UAA Institute for Economic Research (ISER)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076693/540344601/-1048384790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399), and [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076696/540344603/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit focused on leveraging federal investments for workforce development and community growth. The discussion will cover the importance of federal workers and infrastructure investments to key industries, their impact on resource development, and the broader implications of federal funding for economic stability and growth in the state.
**This virtual forum is free and open to all –[register today](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106076699/540344606/375391747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU2OWU2NS03NDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAIR0PFmTkJyda-wwnU1ZXjuoZszjVgHtZ-HI4Ea7Jc=&emci=8c54fba0-aa1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0de69e65-741c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9512399#!event/2025/5/1/virtual-economic-forum-how-federal-dollars-impact-alaska-8217-s-economy) to be part of this important conversation.**

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
Just 24 hours ago, a gunman opened fire at Florida State University, killing 2 people and injuring 6 others. This is the second time the university has been struck by gun violence.
When asked for a comment, Donald Trump had this to say:
**“The gun doesn't do the shooting.”**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250418-1-b&t=1&akid=10326%2E3935704%2EkDV9_f)
This is despicable. And it comes straight out of the NRA’s playbook.
Whenever there is a tragedy, the gun lobby would rather try to scrub their hands clean of any wrongdoing than pass basic gun safety legislation. We saw it again yesterday.
Despite what Donald Trump wants you to think, gun violence isn’t inevitable. Shootings like the one yesterday take place because extremists like Trump would rather take their marching orders from the gun lobby than the American people.
_In fact, the Trump administration is actively rolling back all of the progress we’ve made to reduce gun violence._
Thoughts and prayers aren’t going to cut it. We have an obligation to save lives. If Donald Trump and his MAGA allies refuse to take action to protect lives from gun violence, then we must do everything we can to replace them with leaders who will.
[**Help us send a clear message to Donald Trump today: Rush $3 to GIFFORDS PAC so we can defeat the gun lobby’s grip on our government and save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250418-1-b&t=2&akid=10326%2E3935704%2EkDV9_f)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr25.LyCti9&refcode=em250418-1-b&t=24&akid=10326%2E3935704%2EkDV9_f)**

****

****

Thank you,
— GIFFORDS PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=10326%2E3935704%2EkDV9_f) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Troy Downing
subject: AOC is running my name through the mud.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
You don’t want to miss what she had to say – read more:

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter 7,000 socialists packed into Missoula to hear Bernie Sanders and AOC trash President Trump, Elon Musk, __**and me**__ for standing up for Montana values.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
-They called us “oligarchs.”
-They mocked our agenda.
-They said we don’t care about working people. **But here’s the truth:** after AOC and Bernie Sanders fly in from New York and Vermont to lecture us, they’ll immediately forget the people of our state. Meanwhile, **I’m fighting every single day** for lower taxes, less bureaucracy, and more freedom for Montanans and Americans everywhere. These liberals want the government to control your healthcare, your job, your land, even your speech. I want to get the government _**out of your way.**_ Democrats are pouring millions into Montana to flip it blue and turn it into the next liberal hellhole full of government overreach, but I won’t give up the Big Sky State without a fight. I refuse to back down, but I need your help, Peter. I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to defend my campaign and reputation from the smears of radical lunatics like AOC. **[**Can I count on your support?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **RUSH HELP NOW** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._yA)
---
We will continue to make America great if everyone plays their part. Thank you for having my back in this fight.Best,
---
---
Troy Downing
_**Patriot in Congress**_
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I relied on Planned Parenthood for health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
If we don’t fight back now, our communities will pay the price.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)
Deb here.
Like so many New Mexicans, I relied on Planned Parenthood for my health care.
That’s why I need to tell you — this latest attack from Donald Trump’s administration isn’t just political. _It’s personal._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250418_1_pp?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1410&refcode2=1410_400544_VcOuHl&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)_Credit: Source New Mexico_
Withholding funding will make it harder for people in our state to access the basic care they need, like contraception and testing, and harm people who don’t have any other option.
When I was younger, I tried my best to make ends meet, raise my child, and stay healthy without breaking the bank. Planned Parenthood filled the gaps, just like it does for so many across New Mexico and our country.
**But now, under Trump, that care is under attack. And if we don’t fight back now, our communities will pay the price.**
As New Mexico’s next governor, I promise to stand up to Trump’s cruelty and protect reproductive freedom for all New Mexicans — but I need your support to win this race first.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to help power our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250418_1_pp?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1410&refcode2=1410_400544_VcOuHl&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250418_1_pp?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-1410&refcode2=1410_400544_VcOuHl&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)**
Thank you for being in this fight with me.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250418-1&t=2&refcode2=1410_400544_VcOuHl&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1410%2E400544%2EVcOuHl)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Bryan
subject: Record-Low Border Crossings — Let’s Keep It That Way
body:
Our nation just hit record-low border crossings — a clear sign that smart, effective policies are working.

| | | | | [](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=dc32e554da&e=e907534017)
---
| | | | | **April 18, 2025**
---
| | | | | _**Breaking: Customs and Border Protection reports historic low levels of border crossings in March!**_
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f07d835493&e=e907534017)
| Last month, our nation hit [**record-low**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=53a9565d36&e=e907534017) border crossings — a clear sign that smart, effective policies are working.
The numbers don’t lie: In March of this year, just _**7,181 illegal aliens**_ were apprehended at our southern border. In March of 2024, that number was _**OVER 137,000**_.
Whether it is building the wall, ending catch-and-release, reinstating remain in Mexico, or increasing supports for the men and women of Border Patrol, the work that **Congress** and **President Trump **have done is paying off.
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4566478362&e=e907534017)
| This didn’t happen by accident. It’s the result of strong leadership, relentless dedication, and a firm commitment to national security. **But we can’t afford to lose momentum!**
---
| [JOIN OUR TEAM!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7af68cbeab&e=e907534017)
---
| **The Left** is already trying to reverse our successes. They have their eyes on the midterm and are ready to take back control of the House and undermine our **conservative agenda! **That’s why I need your help.
---
| I’m working to keep our border secure and our communities safe, but the Left and their corporate dark money has put a target on **OUR** seat. They will use all of the tricks up their sleeve to take us out and reverse all of our progress.
[_**Can I count on your support to fight back by donating $5, $10, or even $25 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a8ec25f408&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7a0ce791fb&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

name: Social Security Update via Team Bell
subject: We're going to get real with you for a minute.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
If we let them dismantle this now, what’s left for us tomorrow? [POLL] Peter, we want to get real with you for a minute:

What’s happening in Washington isn’t politics as usual. **It’s a betrayal.**

Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers are doing exactly what we feared: They’re coming after Social Security and Medicare with a chainsaw. They're not hiding it. _They're proud of it._

And the people who built this country — folks who worked their whole lives, played by the rules, paid into the system — are the ones being hung out to dry. President Biden said it best just last week: _“They’ve taken a hatchet to the Social Security Administration.”_

_Are you kidding?_

These people don’t care about you or your family. They care about control. And raising our voices is the last line of defense we have to protect Social Security.

If you’re not angry, _**you should be.**_

_This isn’t some far-off issue. This is personal.

This is your mom’s monthly check.

Your neighbor’s medication.

Your friend’s disability coverage.

**Your future.**_

If we let them dismantle Social Security now, what’s left for us tomorrow? We’re not helpless. **But we do need to raise hell — together.[Should extreme Republicans and their MAGA ringleader keep their hands OFF of our earned benefits? clean_body: If we let them dismantle this now, what’s left for us tomorrow? [POLL] Peter, we want to get real with you for a minute: What’s happening in Washington isn’t politics as usual. It’s a betrayal. Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers are doing exactly what we feared: They’re coming after Social Security and Medicare with a chainsaw. They're not hiding it. They're proud of it. And the people who built this country — folks who worked their whole lives, played by the rules, paid into the system — are the ones being hung out to dry. President Biden said it best just last week: “They’ve taken a hatchet to the Social Security Administration.” Are you kidding? These people don’t care about you or your family. They care about control. And raising our voices is the last line of defense we have to protect Social Security. If you’re not angry, you should be. This isn’t some far-off issue. This is personal. This is your mom’s monthly check. Your neighbor’s medication. Your friend’s disability coverage. Your future. If we let them dismantle Social Security now, what’s left for us tomorrow? We’re not helpless. But we do need to raise hell — together. | Thank you, Team Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

| | Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter!This past weekend, we were horrified to learn that Governor Shapiro and his family were targets of an arson attack. Thankfully, no injuries were reported. [Governor Shapiro made](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YiKBSD7IBYp-2FM3rrV3ty5cnOnzzIJc-2B7wxhQ9tSeKyz9LjMwlG-2FOge1p41-2BE0nFN5O9h0wbBUtsKIjJKY2LGiuFCj-2FFX5hAoATl0BDFQkOk7yuAhUD2IVCFZNIlPiWDcDL6yCu8axre70A8PAckJCTM-3DwlpJ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHf2oz5FXvm6Qe7GoHD1yr6MJEtKfmtjzO30OMBrE3bPJ4kkV1yvlyl8BRFd3ijrZw3KzHM8KNSMIp6lu9wNjpnJ0tdHzKdyswreLipexJyTvOTkxpt4TUMPc8Bw3uectNg7rVpDNTE71x36TNrtRriW) his first public comments since the attack at the Governor’s Residence early Sunday morning: "This is not how we resolve our differences, and this is not okay. This level of violence has to end, and it has to be roundly condemned by everyone, both political parties, people from all different walks of life. It’s not okay." While the headlines have been focusing on the damage to his home, the real question is: What kind of world are we actually building?

No residence, title, or security detail can protect us from the truth: Our systems are burning -- literally and metaphorically.

And it’s not just about one house. It’s about all of us.

Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. popularized the idea of the Beloved Community – a global vision of a world free of discrimination, injustice, and violence. The Beloved Community isn't about saving the elite while the rest of us fend for scraps. It’s about tearing down the walls that divide us and building something rooted in justice.

Yes, this event is tragic. It is unfortunate. But maybe it is also a wake-up call.

It is time to stop patching up broken systems and start imagining something better, together.Our votes are the first step for achieving that.

The $0 boycott that might give you MORE energy rather than drain it.

After 2 years, redirecting my attention has become the foundation for all other resistance—and often costs nothing.

Our minutes = their millions. Every algorithm view and targeted ad funds the systems we’re fighting. This isn’t about perfection (I still love binges & a good scroll sesh ). It’s about becoming less useful to empire and more present for each other.

The tools that help me and more avails in the “Anti-Capitalist Tools” board linked in bio .

Trump is a step closer to openly defying the courts and deporting people without due process. Due process include notice of deportation and the opprotunity to contest it _before _it happens. In case you missed it, due to an “administrative error,” the Trump regime has deported Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador. According to the [New York Times](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yvoli0BpMoY7Su6YCR-2BdeC5TPBrP3F-2F6Fzpmhk62hUxa-2BIY-2FGgM3c1m60VEaLcZlggq1wAG0l7h-2F-2B57zgXjhx6AZ6CqG49nJlrUmRFn4fQizJVz4cRPt6Uk0WG23jUsbhA-3D-3Dc_9Q_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHdpXHvo4LIKi38QUee4q0GAMLZQVLTSeqTbek0MNSshfgeE3DF0Vr3S-2BvjbklZCPRH9BPLZ2nYwgpO7n3Nxt54tfcBQDc94aMOWlox9Tk1Ea1ZYSu7ydvpJBzq9v4G5VAYHUZURkEPyUpEL0AlhpLgS), Garcia is a 29-year-old father of three, living in Maryland with protected legal status.

Here’s what’s happening: The U.S. Supreme Court has unanimously determined that the government must “facilitate” his return to the United States. However, Trump is indicating that he has no intention of following this order. Instead, he has allied himself with President Nayib Bukele of El Salvador, who self-describes himself as the world’s “coolest dictator.” Bukele has stated, “Of course I’m not going to do it,” when asked if he will return Garcia home.

Stephen Vladeck, a law professor at Georgetown University, explains that “the idea that ‘the government can disappear people to a foreign country with no due process and no responsibility for what happens next’” amounts to “a rule-of-law crisis.”

If Trump gets away with sending someone, regardless of their citizenship status, to a foreign prison without recourse, the impact could be devastating. This is made abundantly clear as he has floated the idea of sending American citizens “convicted of violent crimes” to the prison in El Salvador. His Attorney General, Pam Bondi, is allegedly studying the proposal. Judge James Boasberg, a federal judge in the District of Columbia, ruled that there was probable cause to believe the government was in criminal contempt of court for disobeying the Judge's order that it stop deporting people who had been denied due process -- that is notice and an opportunity to contest the deportation -- before those flights took off. Judge Boasberg [explains why a contempt finding is essential](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YisxRD647Gp9sofpx3exGfxIBV3mlFFf3VKTJL60IZTTppYdRtKNxvyokVh1j9QlWhyeFtfGbwXoJofm8oetj0q3NSca0-2BB2i5sL1E62Ckv9wCqWpwbotX76vgEpyl5d4dhAUllYOHPMKjQC6Ddsp14-3DKspR_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHeNo8-2FKPRb7JCn2cw-2BF68HBgl-2Blib7AS03yUgvV4pT-2Fn8grU7nPs1Xyrcytlrgzyq6bwnfSNAk9RDgJdR9jgjMHuRIrG2n2hkLR7o3giWM5pNpD5zctNKtGhhlFwHQGa15r-2BmTxe-2B5cVp7cJtl5Xl1X) when a party disobeys a court order: “The rule ‘reflects a belief that in the fair administration of justice no man can be judge in his own case,’ no matter how ‘exalted his station’ or ‘righteous his motives.’... The Constitution does not tolerate willful disobedience of judicial orders — especially by officials of a coordinate branch who have sworn an oath to uphold it.” As the Trump regime works to chip away at our democracy and push us closer to a constitutional crisis, it has never been more critical that our state and federal courts remain fair and independent. The independence of the judiciary should be protected – especially from the executive branch. This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!

# A big week
---
On Wednesday, 50 people took the**oath of citizenship** from Judge Courtney Powell at the Dauphin County courthouse in Harrisburg during the county’s naturalization ceremony. The new citizens came from 17 countries. Staff members from the affiliated organization New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) were present to help the new citizens register to vote. In order to be eligible to vote in Pennsylvania, people must have established residence or became citizens at least 30 days before the election. This means that anyone who moves to Pennsylvania or becomes a citizen by Saturday, April 19th can register to vote in time to participate in the primary election on Tuesday, May 20th.

It is a scary time in America. Last week, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to pass the [Safeguard American Voter Eligibility](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YiKBSD7IBYp-2FM3rrV3ty5ckDW-2BMClmmZ4xkF-2FK80rhypmgCHu8Wz8zzS3qVlUUFt-2FdE0zxN-2Bcg4rLTpVE51ccdItfR4ZOhZqExw4D9wzQ9ak-2Bl871Lw9Q3AVkAC9ZOUEyA-3D-3DFgb9_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHemudUj5lWArmYdlKJG4a1y6UeVI-2BQCKb7zYq5pxM3qv0E-2F1lUvIZpMW51pCOcLZo9xsjBqlU5X5Lp1aZF5eWWqIjkMj77tarmGLWqEKWRz3UTjb1OgnEak1x7TVbz7cttVt2Jyn32n8s-2FFkqhwtVAG) (SAVE) act bill, which would require prospective voters to show proof of U.S. citizenship in order to register to vote. It is now headed to the Senate.

Senator Fetterman and McCormick have both sent responses to constituents on their current stance on the SAVE act bill. The responses can be found below.

| | We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: This bill would enact a 21st-century poll tax by stripping the fundamental right to vote from more than 21 million eligible Americans who can’t produce, don’t have, can’t afford, or struggle to access the required documents. The government has what it needs to determine eligibility, and this only serves to discourage people from voting and allow Elon Musk to comb through our voter files and access our private information.Speaking of taxes, all U.S. residents had to submit theirs on **Tuesday, April 15th.** Did you know that many people without legal status pay billions in taxes, filing under tax identification numbers? The Institute on Taxation and Economic Policy estimates that undocumented immigrants paid $96.7 billion in federal, state and local taxes in 2022. For months, IRS officials have resisted disclosing what has long been guarded information, but now, the IRS [will share this info with ICE](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YoLfr43sWNfrUPcbOyYo5ios0BXnaLLNOw3Yq0tRdoX8b-2FNfKHunjG5Mc4h-2BRx3E6NB9qq0tgiY3HI6R82e43mDDtYpaGCVG7m5uzasGWGRuYuDQBf0bJGuWnUh-2BhB5AzBwqrLjbJHLDIgA4eB1vX94JqCjfQpnKjTz-2F-2F-2BWXzlz2V0R5zCvUxtaMVJ0MjXTAMrWv9NLhMnZEliuMY3GR2yxtUmB8MG7FOWvgVG2TJ0Bey5SIcLascJthLH5HLoCgpko7zSxz3W8IaSpSLNes-2F7Q-3DxDcl_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHd4ZJ1kH81ZmfSfd6ah8fPxtqQikCIov6WLW5SEMkhGw2x-2BRTbU381qgaM0UE5Gm2qiNy-2BT-2B1i1FGlGuObVG-2BYA8WgayEN3LqNS7T7HAUOm44XyBtJ8jWRZ8HqYTz0dae411FblLZAXTOLTtGaXnj-2FD). This could be a slippery slope. Remember when deportations were ONLY going to be of undocumented criminals? As we saw with Armando Abrego Garcia, due process is not happening. Plus we now know of cases of green card holders in detention, and this week the White House confirmed Trump is thinking about[ sending US citizens to prisons in El Salvador](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YkypKUMdcPOZDvkCUEdMLCkHcQlslwovfCB-2Bu8PPaxRocadSysxwfZf4o8w-2Bw-2FnMaE6C0rMQjvyd2kQfSPB219sTzs6EK9C1msqemUU5Eqj6qHU-2B3WfMGRmraIwQG62JDTILKSs3Z-2Bn-2B-2F8M-2F0EgFk8hW9GoBk88Q9AXeRz4Wv2UqzPxEoAK1oP6ufjunzRbcvQwIG4m2-2FLc4uBAlFhJgcar1P1yrqRV-2F73HqmB9tuWjBvfLcKTRO2EuKCxXHOL10m1k2fuSnHsmByCLOtvIaDh5iOsP-2BFI9JQgNsljQgGw3U3pvHMIOZeSV2mVkXXRxdpQ-3D-3DHsHt_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnBtBbBwRIWZ-2BJMR5L7ifPk00cygxqXO8jnBQoGYcBHf5QJBTtTelvbg0m34JDw4xvdrDjH-2FF9zKmlqRlFXD7Hpm32ZT-2BuNQW3pXHgS6Je2NzZ4rX3uooX0BWCIIFs-2FV5AHsdF4VUKIB5sLtIJmlFylJUdRxVzGn4U0Rh7h0ggWtAHuF-2B5ijpea1MiXBIkuMP). _When is enough, enough?_ We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter!This past weekend, we were horrified to learn that Governor Shapiro and his family were targets of an arson attack. Thankfully, no injuries were reported. his first public comments since the attack at the Governor’s Residence early Sunday morning: "This is not how we resolve our differences, and this is not okay. This level of violence has to end, and it has to be roundly condemned by everyone, both political parties, people from all different walks of life. It’s not okay." While the headlines have been focusing on the damage to his home, the real question is: What kind of world are we actually building? No residence, title, or security detail can protect us from the truth: Our systems are burning -- literally and metaphorically. And it’s not just about one house. It’s about all of us. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. popularized the idea of the Beloved Community – a global vision of a world free of discrimination, injustice, and violence. The Beloved Community isn't about saving the elite while the rest of us fend for scraps. It’s about tearing down the walls that divide us and building something rooted in justice. Yes, this event is tragic. It is unfortunate. But maybe it is also a wake-up call. It is time to stop patching up broken systems and start imagining something better, together.Our votes are the first step for achieving that. | | | | | From At the intersection of culture, politics, sports, and real-world issues is Slingshot The Podcast. Hosted by Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, this is where we amplify the voices too often overlooked or misrepresented—voices that move the culture forward. Whether we’re talking policy or pop culture, this is unfiltered truth from the ground up. Listen to us where you get your podcasts. , , , , and . Plus, watch us on Connect with us Instagram: @slingshotthepodcast Facebook: @SlingshotThePodcast Youtube: @SlingshotThePodcast TikTok: @slingshotpodcast Email: info@newpaproject.org SlingshotThePodcast.org | From The $0 boycott that might give you MORE energy rather than drain it. After 2 years, redirecting my attention has become the foundation for all other resistance—and often costs nothing. Our minutes = their millions. Every algorithm view and targeted ad funds the systems we’re fighting. This isn’t about perfection (I still love binges & a good scroll sesh ). It’s about becoming less useful to empire and more present for each other. The tools that help me and more avails in the “Anti-Capitalist Tools” board linked in bio . What digital boycott practice works for you ? | | | | | | Trump is a step closer to openly defying the courts and deporting people without due process. Due process include notice of deportation and the opprotunity to contest it before it happens. In case you missed it, due to an “administrative error,” the Trump regime has deported Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador. According to the , Garcia is a 29-year-old father of three, living in Maryland with protected legal status. Here’s what’s happening: The U.S. Supreme Court has unanimously determined that the government must “facilitate” his return to the United States. However, Trump is indicating that he has no intention of following this order. Instead, he has allied himself with President Nayib Bukele of El Salvador, who self-describes himself as the world’s “coolest dictator.” Bukele has stated, “Of course I’m not going to do it,” when asked if he will return Garcia home. Stephen Vladeck, a law professor at Georgetown University, explains that “the idea that ‘the government can disappear people to a foreign country with no due process and no responsibility for what happens next’” amounts to “a rule-of-law crisis.” If Trump gets away with sending someone, regardless of their citizenship status, to a foreign prison without recourse, the impact could be devastating. This is made abundantly clear as he has floated the idea of sending American citizens “convicted of violent crimes” to the prison in El Salvador. His Attorney General, Pam Bondi, is allegedly studying the proposal. Judge James Boasberg, a federal judge in the District of Columbia, ruled that there was probable cause to believe the government was in criminal contempt of court for disobeying the Judge's order that it stop deporting people who had been denied due process -- that is notice and an opportunity to contest the deportation -- before those flights took off. Judge Boasberg when a party disobeys a court order: “The rule ‘reflects a belief that in the fair administration of justice no man can be judge in his own case,’ no matter how ‘exalted his station’ or ‘righteous his motives.’... The Constitution does not tolerate willful disobedience of judicial orders — especially by officials of a coordinate branch who have sworn an oath to uphold it.” As the Trump regime works to chip away at our democracy and push us closer to a constitutional crisis, it has never been more critical that our state and federal courts remain fair and independent. The independence of the judiciary should be protected – especially from the executive branch. This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote! Here is a this year. | | | We have a new podcast! And the second episode airs next Thursday, April 24! — where the misunderstood voice becomes the culture’s power is hosted by our Founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, and Charles Gregory , from The first episode dives headfirst into a conversation many are afraid to have: What’s the problem with DEI? In the premiere episode, “Damn, I Don’t Want DEI in the Title,” the hosts confront how diversity, equity, inclusion—and access have been politicized, misrepresented, and misunderstood. But they don’t stop there. Through storytelling, humor, and cultural commentary, they uplift powerful examples of Black excellence in sports that challenge stereotypes and demand visibility. Listen to us on , , , , and . Plus, watch us on | | | | | | A big week On Wednesday, 50 people took theoath of citizenship from Judge Courtney Powell at the Dauphin County courthouse in Harrisburg during the county’s naturalization ceremony. The new citizens came from 17 countries. Staff members from the affiliated organization New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) were present to help the new citizens register to vote. In order to be eligible to vote in Pennsylvania, people must have established residence or became citizens at least 30 days before the election. This means that anyone who moves to Pennsylvania or becomes a citizen by Saturday, April 19th can register to vote in time to participate in the primary election on Tuesday, May 20th. | | York County | | | | | William Penn High School | | Dauphin County | | | | | Harrisburg Area Community College, York Campus | | | | | Downtown Harrisburg | It is a scary time in America. Last week, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to pass the (SAVE) act bill, which would require prospective voters to show proof of U.S. citizenship in order to register to vote. It is now headed to the Senate. Senator Fetterman and McCormick have both sent responses to constituents on their current stance on the SAVE act bill. The responses can be found below. Fetterman’s letter: McCormick’s letter: bill is VOTER SUPPRESSION and if f it becomes law, this bill would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters, especially immigrants, Black and brown communities, married women, and young people. Democracy works when everyone has access to the ballot. Let’s protect that. Calling your reps only takes a few minutes, but can have huge impact!You can do your part by calling our senators and asking them to protect our voting rights by voting NO on this bill, You can even use this script: | | | | | We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: This bill would enact a 21st-century poll tax by stripping the fundamental right to vote from more than 21 million eligible Americans who can’t produce, don’t have, can’t afford, or struggle to access the required documents. The government has what it needs to determine eligibility, and this only serves to discourage people from voting and allow Elon Musk to comb through our voter files and access our private information.Speaking of taxes, all U.S. residents had to submit theirs on Tuesday, April 15th. Did you know that many people without legal status pay billions in taxes, filing under tax identification numbers? The Institute on Taxation and Economic Policy estimates that undocumented immigrants paid $96.7 billion in federal, state and local taxes in 2022. For months, IRS officials have resisted disclosing what has long been guarded information, but now, the IRS . This could be a slippery slope. Remember when deportations were ONLY going to be of undocumented criminals? As we saw with Armando Abrego Garcia, due process is not happening. Plus we now know of cases of green card holders in detention, and this week the White House confirmed Trump is thinking about. When is enough, enough? We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever. | | | | | Happy Easter from NPP! Just as Easter symbolizes new beginnings, civic education empowers individuals to shape their communities through knowledge, engagement, and action for a better future.Wishing those who celebrate a joyful and meaningful Easter! | Last day to register to vote for the Primary Election: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Thank you for staying informed and engaged! | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

You heard from Elissa yesterday about how she’s thinking about the Democratic Party – and our need for a strategic plan that focuses on the three big things that most Americans can agree on, which is strong economic security, strong national security, and a strong democracy.
We think you’ll like her full interview in Time Magazine that elaborates on those thoughts and plans:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3693?t=2&akid=2273%2E135344%2ESGWo-p)
You know Elissa – she tells it like it is. There’s no sugar coating the need for Democrats to have more comprehensive strategies so we can win back control of the House and Senate in 2026.
[**If you can continue supporting our work, please consider a contribution today.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr25.NJ6rxh&refcode=em250418-1&t=3&akid=2273%2E135344%2ESGWo-p)

name: Blowing your taxes
subject: Your GOP Congressman has a Sugar Daddy
body:
| |
---
Republicans are blowing your taxes. Literally. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyMDM5MDM2MTI5NjQxNjg0LFwiclwiOjE1MjAzOTA3NTc4ODg4MzI1NX0iLCJzIjoiZmRkNGVkMWE1MWE0MDY5NSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUyMDM5MDM2MTM2OTgxNzIyLFwiclwiOjE1MjAzOTA3NTc4ODg4MzI1NX0iLCJzIjoiNDhlNzUyODNlOGU4NTNmYiJ9)
---
|
Team,

This past Tuesday was Tax Day. Although normal people haven’t seen any cuts in their taxes, the GOP’s largest donors have seen their taxes cut ten fold.

As the tariff war escalates, the market collapses further, and inflation continues to rise, the American people are _pissed_ and we need to make sure that they know _exactly who_ to direct their anger towards.

Which is why we’ve partnered with Progressive Action Fund, known for their provocative and hard hitting ads, to develop an ad that we are running in key swing districts across the country that _**shows a GOP Congressman with his sugar daddy**_ and shows why we never got the tax cuts they promised:

---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: This book is making liberals furious (claim yours)
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2045p7g181ivjx9n5jqg94a1aznduzh30s481s6jl9jxpbzz6840fxkag8cu2ea5nbxe85vg3z8mznlo6x2&__stmp=suxcmf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jybv0jbismzxz9su2e7a50a4a6ztit1qofyll5nzrkzk6m7ycmjkt8jeumb9lowrx9dgaulb37q6hqlbm415z4grh4js6vja9mgerb0mhta5u0vurx5mfnzd7f2im2sse2o6ejqly6am4hvn2n1z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jybv0jbismzxz9su2e7a50a7vfyg82qo6lxjceinx86iblssn341jw47ku24acf8hq7jgnl84fb2cukztpjgzm95ejwhuebimnwu1wal3m4p9wfp97ln6sw5qcez1i1erkzdmim74k3z649fyof9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suxcmf&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Accessible and affordable childcare
body:
| | Did you see this headline from earlier this month, Peter?
| _**Northwest Public Broadcasting:**
Head Start serves 15,000 kids in Washington. And its regional office just closed._
---

It can be next to impossible to find and afford childcare, especially in a rural community – and it’s even more difficult for folks who work long hours.

I experienced this firsthand as a mom working in the trades, when my husband and I used to bring our son to our auto repair shop when there weren’t other options available.

Resources like Head Start are essential for providing early childhood education, health services, and family support to working families here in Southwest Washington and nationwide.

Since the beginning of my time in Congress, I have worked to expand access to quality, affordable childcare, and I’m not stopping now – because when working families succeed, our entire community succeeds.

[Will you join my fight for accessible and affordable childcare by signing on today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106080183/540356228/526531515?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250418_1_1&refcode2=a1a7d0e5-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWE3ZDBlNS03YTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PfBQRqEMl3pmtZzadqi8wsTJiRlsgAU3JSWTnOJ3Occ=&emci=9da7d0e5-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a1a7d0e5-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=31138575)

Virginia’s future is on the ballot — are you ready for the primaries?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106080193/540356258/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjk4YWZmMi03YTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYzBbE5PBaiFM9uiyAN-qFH72BEw3vLLUWfVmiwCojk=&emci=f98323ec-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3b98aff2-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15759664)

We’re officially 60 days out from the primary election, Derek. With Abigail Spanberger leading a grassroots campaign to take back the Governor’s Mansion and Democratic challengers running in deep-red districts, 2025 will be a historic year for our Commonwealth. And thanks to supporters like you, we’re shaping up to expand our majority in the General Assembly. It’s time to turn our potential into power, and that starts with you, Derek. **Will you take a moment to let us know your voter registration status?
[_Whether you’re registered, not sure, or still need to sign up — we want to hear from you so we can help you get ready to cast your ballot._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106080194/540356259/1988709763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjk4YWZmMi03YTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYzBbE5PBaiFM9uiyAN-qFH72BEw3vLLUWfVmiwCojk=&emci=f98323ec-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3b98aff2-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15759664)** | **************[TAKE THE 1-MINUTE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106080195/540356260/1988709763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjk4YWZmMi03YTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYzBbE5PBaiFM9uiyAN-qFH72BEw3vLLUWfVmiwCojk=&emci=f98323ec-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3b98aff2-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15759664)**************
---
[_**If you’re not sure of your registration status, click here to make sure.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106080196/540356261/-1643438963?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjk4YWZmMi03YTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYzBbE5PBaiFM9uiyAN-qFH72BEw3vLLUWfVmiwCojk=&emci=f98323ec-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3b98aff2-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15759664)
Every single vote will matter. In 2023, just 975 votes statewide decided control of the House. This year, with reproductive freedom, voting rights, and public education on the line, we’re not taking any chances.
Thank you for being in this fight with us.
– Team DPVA

name: Team Bonta
subject: The reproductive rights champion we need
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250418&t=1&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)
Rob just scored another big endorsement, this time from **Planned Parenthood Affiliates of California (PPAC)!**
PPAC is the statewide advocacy organization representing seven Planned Parenthood affiliates that collectively serve as one of the largest providers of sexual and reproductive health care services in California.
They’re endorsing Rob for re-election as California’s Attorney General because they’ve seen firsthand his **unwavering commitment to defending reproductive rights and ensuring California remains a safe haven for abortion access for all.**
**[Join PPAC in supporting Rob in his re-election race: pitch in $5 or more!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250418?refcode=em20250418-1745&amount=5&refcode2=1745_1088799_Kq2m7o&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)**
In the endorsement, PPAC President and CEO Jodi Hicks said this about Rob:
_“Events over the past several years have demonstrated that the fight for reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy is far from over. However, California is incredibly fortunate to have a strong Attorney General in Rob Bonta, who is determined to protect these fundamental rights with the full power of his office._
_That is why he has PPAC’s strong endorsement for another term as Attorney General of California. I am certain his leadership will continue to be critical for protecting and expanding access to essential care as we enter increasingly unstable times.”_
Since the Supreme Court overturned the federal right to abortion guaranteed by _Roe v. Wade_ in the 2022 _Dobbs_ decision, Rob reaffirmed our state’s commitment to protect reproductive healthcare and access to abortion services by:
* Filing a lawsuit against Providence St. Joseph Hospital for failing to provide emergency, life-saving abortion care to a woman in dire condition;

* Holding the city of Beverly Hills accountable after it interfered with the opening of a new reproductive healthcare clinic in the city;

* Filing a lawsuit against a chain of five “crisis pregnancy centers” for misleading patients about an unproven, risky, and experimental treatment;

* Sponsoring bills in the CA legislature to protect access to medication abortion, help the CA DOJ enforce the Reproductive Privacy Act, protect reproductive digital information, and better address the Black maternal mortality crisis.

**[If you want an Attorney General who’s dedicated and ready to keep up the fight for reproductive healthcare and justice across California, Rob is your candidate. Fuel his campaign with a grassroots donation of any amount today →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250418?refcode=em20250418-1745&amount=5&refcode2=1745_1088799_Kq2m7o&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250418?refcode=em20250418-1745&amount=5&refcode2=1745_1088799_Kq2m7o&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)**
— Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250418&t=3&refcode2=1745_1088799_Kq2m7o&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1745%2E1088799%2EKq2m7o)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
