body:
They lied. Let’s make them regret it.| | | Friend, Let’s be clear about what we’re up against.

My opponents aren’t just running against me—they’re knowingly lying to voters about my record. One of them even kept repeating a quote he knew was fake—after the reporter who made it up admitted it and deleted it.

**This is what desperation looks like. And they are DESPERATE to bring their far-left, anti-police, pro-criminal rights agenda back to Virginia.**
__
---
[ HELP ME FIGHT BACK ](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/zSbAhAr5qa3h8_f1He6gPu08bIyiJvdPyubpMpoLoOxigNfnHdd7rnfBrku6JSvV8EIUv3aFoMpwMTY1AZjdgUXEZknta_2EEymPv-d1R6J9ghtH1g8q4rxVM5MrAVON1-GMyFiMWXVV3vjX8Sg7oHXtaSY-M3gzO8XY4wX--kpcrIv4x7m4sOdy7qgUgjpQyJtj1S2A7Qrzt-AzkbG5TN2ihQt8vqvJeHfVpWIzsondVT4SSUdmu5Dmh5FcbBGcQIIJbjPy8LeGklaX5hVhK_RQBRPbvRdDMW2X7aBBejBaRKBrnj0I0WvMs_Nevna3JjlrTmL1SORHi8fU1apWyf5vFplb21HG2XknQNniTsSs978dVCCnp25Gnuk/i9yaw1oqixbtWZw7wBGpfsR6DD0JDdVN/8)
---
They’ve already raised over **$1.5 million** from liberal donors across the country. And now they’re gearing up to blanket Virginia in attack ads.

Why? Because they know I’ve delivered real results:

✔️ A 23.3% drop in overdose deaths
✔️ A 30% drop in murders
✔️ Billions recovered from Big Pharma
✔️ Government overreach stopped cold

_As the first Hispanic elected statewide in Virginia, I’ve stood strong for the rule of law, and I’ve made real progress. That’s why they want me gone._

They have radical progressive donors and DC special interests. But we have something better:_**** you._

**This month, we’re aiming to activate 50 grassroots donors to help us fight back. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to jump in—this is it.**

_**[Chip in now and be 1 of our 50 this month »](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/qiAPxZMIyaMLDdhOhhEZWV_OMeYmW-a2JMArziYz7DnMME_gb-0CNJ5zdgHPD3h3JdTe79YIYP3FRv2tZFo6i2JDqjmlyu2OiUdPh1T1iR8YfnwzCrt-_ryTC4d3Sz9SiYdVa1FziYbMc6TFzngbUTeN60fifoQvFWcw3xXb6T0tWTuhg9JQ5RtqNnVFcpstdRYIizFmqjBF4ZYsUbfGEU__fBX6iJuD0akLiQkzkn1vpcTpDJagmWcT9fp9VGOtKSjn3yzEFe_hMScWw6b7K0hkLNfPZ_zQ4p9seUc8A_8H6o3HgkR7TqEsakp-PLVH9sBmDEu2obZGioxSregQYDyRGRmYw7CJnAPEPUsXuO529fQca-hlFPkWi6U/4vkLJJG3DUXPebMKOZNnyrINge0-J3_D/8)**_

Let’s show them that truth, character, and courage still win in Virginia.
---
With gratitdue,Jason MiyaresAttorney General of Virginia _P.S. I don’t need millions from the coasts. I just need committed Virginians like you. Let’s reach our mid-month goal—50 donors by midnight tomorrow. Are you in?_

_**[Yes, I’ll step up now →](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/p1luWO0mzUIGE8EJ61AWMDp0ueRViEvskqppCN3zdXtMaje_25tlflq-jWihe4IVXuHExkQOCdcWdG7lbk6dEVdJx_iFUz27lPxqEjxnL2JUhDR1YcDsZs1G9HPvdETqfkQAu0-PjAwwvVr7-IFPOwNjY3_yZyfVB48aNBaxjzbhOFqUG8cL5S1NjWnir5tkFy7_dCaKoWgPF5ihopjtQAurD0yPwzjT49yST_J696EXSil5vMDAZAIzFxjC-HhZY3T2ihM8tC-Cd9rY4zabLB9O4GfrpJ2sFI-hWOBFlTah3jAgggLXS8stga-yEXEhK__kb9QS2TFHV-wCsVUPsAvvgsOMG6wS_mCddqpUTf_X7wStGlOvnHrklPk/LtnBM4qVeTCdk3q7ztkJqWakz6DNp_CI/8)**_

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: This last week on the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This week, Bernie and I hit the road hard to connect with working people in California, Utah, Idaho, and Montana. We held six town halls across four states and were joined by people of all walks of life.
We started off in **Los Angeles, California** where we were joined by 36,000 friends including Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna, and Maxwell Frost. This was Bernie’s largest event ever!

Then, we went to **Salt Lake City, Utah** , where 20,000 folks packed an arena to fight the oligarchy:

Our next town hall was in **Nampa, Idaho** where 12,500+ folks turned out on a Monday night to demand a better future for all. The collective energy even made the arena shake!

Then it was onto **Bakersfield, California** where Bernie and I were joined by 4,450 friends — including Dolores Huerta. It’s scenes like these that scare the hell out of oligarchs like Trump and Elon:

We then went to **Folsom, California** where the line for the event was three miles long. 30,000 people joined us in Folsom, CA — with a population of just 85,000 — in Republican Kevin Kiley’s district.

Our final town hall of the week took us to **Missoula, Montana.** Missoula has a population of just 77,757 and 9,000+ folks came out to rally with Bernie and I.

All over this country, in both Democratic and Republican districts, people are ready to fight back and defend our democracy. They deserve leaders who will stand with them.
**This isn’t Trump’s country. It’s _our_ country.**
Working people are coming together to fight for the future of our democracy and country.
We’re hoping to hold more town halls soon but it takes major resources to put on events of this size across different states.
[ Will you make a $5 donation today to help us add more stops soon? Every donation makes a difference—our average contribution this year is just $21.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250418-1.Hah3HQ&refcode=em20250418-8643-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250418-1.Hah3HQ&refcode=em20250418-8643-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h)**
Thank you so much,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250418-1?refcode=em20250418-8643-P_FND_EVT_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8643_2526796_0mUy_h&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250418-8643-P_FND_EVT_GRM&t=22&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8643%2E2526796%2E0mUy_h)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Democrats Win Seats PAC
subject: Trump’s war on science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.dwspac.com/p/bg-w4eO8DEWuKhf2unAuQg2?unsubscribedata=pSFIkjdViR6h3uUD3N6noPEnSAhUGErpWljIIH5JaAFY9xBZt%2BWd6mmh7YC%2B%2BA5dahf0DqqE5685H2DQRgwRsET4q4Hgz1D1D9oYYsumVDE664x07Encqy5AfbfDCxaYD3faOgTmobfa%2BIFERW0%2BVHPY3AN9EE%2Ffd2YC8eyoPiDbDOGj4vCRRc0XBTePlSaJPCiVKLDykBX9zrpk1ndHiwgjsf3Vk1elXC9UJtMksoNWGiszr7u6PRO7ziTR3%2FXWA0xEjSbR%2BjyMbXko5jrkxCQ5xN6wklPEo1r2T5%2FkgLsJxlLwMUoVnDuxlNild3tv8GEjjaeyadqQ6nucF2sWQiSuLA3aSI2k5OjIYxmIxAGnHCFmmM0JhEHiUGYYgL77l7x80wzIjRM%2BKJCo0uCEzWC0mK3E3HxzIsU8nALwB78%3D).
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106087247/540380608/-743774872?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20250418_FR_MMFR_0_1YO_DWSPAC_NA_NA_MMFR4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODcwNDBmOS04OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_dbyTWm6ppPT-Z03nEYpVta3RsCKLsN2fhfYK2DrtCk=) Peter, this isn’t an exaggeration: **We’re witnessing Donald Trump launch an all-out war on science and public health.**

Right now, **_BILLIONS_** of dollars are being cut from federal agency funding, health grants to support measles vaccinations, and critical medical research.

Thousands of scientists, researchers, and public health experts are being laid off.

And enabling Republicans in Congress are letting Trump’s assault on science go unchecked.

We need to draw the line — right now. We can’t allow Trump, Musk, and his chaos administration to dismantle decades of progress in public health and science.

We need Democrats in Congress who will stand up to Trump’s anti-science agenda and keep Americans safe.

name: David Hogg
subject: Big news, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Will you help us rebuild the Democratic Party with younger leaders?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250418-1&t=1&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)
Peter, we have some big news to share:
**Leaders We Deserve is launching a $20 million investment to usher in the next generation of Democrats** who will go to the mat every day for the American people and use every tactic and tool to stop Trump’s radical right-wing, economically illiterate agenda.
**[Will you pitch in $5 to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-1?refcode=em20250418-2004&amount=5&refcode2=2004_587540_yt0sJB&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)**
Today’s party politics has an unwritten rule on both sides: **If you win a seat, it’s yours for life.** No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture that we have to break.
And while we need to continue to pressure our current leaders to do more, part of the pathway forward requires us to start mounting primary challenges to Democrats in solidly blue districts who are failing to deliver for the people.
Too many elected leaders in the Democratic Party are either unwilling or unable to meet the moment and are asleep at the wheel while Trump is demolishing the economy, challenging the foundations of our democracy, and creating new existential crises for our country by the day.
**Younger leaders simply bring a different level of urgency that we just aren’t seeing in our politics right now.** We grew up with the existential threat of climate change bearing down on us. Adolescence today means active shooter drills and wondering if you’re going to survive math class. And we are told every election is the most important of our lifetime – that we must protect democracy at all costs – all while democracy continues to fail us.
It’s not because democracy can’t work, but because our politicians have failed to make it work for the people, and instead made it work for the special interests destroying our future.
**We can do something about it, Peter. We can ensure that Democrats are fighting for us – or we can replace them with younger leaders who will.**
**[Can you pitch in $5 now to help us power this game-changing fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-1?refcode=em20250418-2004&amount=5&refcode2=2004_587540_yt0sJB&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)**
Like so many, I care deeply about this party. I want this party to be strong. It’s personal to me. When my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s almost 15 years ago, the only reason my family stayed afloat was Social Security. And the only reason we were able to get Social Security was because the Democratic Party fought for it.
With all its flaws, the Democratic Party has played a critical role for progress in this country. Revitalizing and rebuilding it is important work. **This party is worth fighting for, and not just for the sake of opposing Trump. What that looks like right now is electing younger leaders who have the energy, passion, and vision to meet this moment with the urgency our country deserves.**
Through all of this, some incumbents will rise to the challenge and emerge stronger. Others will demonstrate why they should be replaced.
**Either way, we all win.**
**[If you’re ready to jumpstart the next generation of Democratic leadership, please donate $5 right now to stand with us in this important fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-1?refcode=em20250418-2004&amount=5&refcode2=2004_587540_yt0sJB&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250418-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250418-2004&refcode2=2004_587540_yt0sJB&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250418-1&t=2&refcode2=2004_587540_yt0sJB&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2004%2E587540%2Eyt0sJB)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Friend,
We are nearly three months into Trump’s presidency, and we’re watching an alarming barrage of attacks on the country, our rights, and the rule of law.
From executive actions threatening birthright citizenship to a sweeping executive order to suppress the vote, Trump and his allies are testing the very limits of the law and the Constitution.
So we’re asking you to fill out our team’s survey today: how important is it to have a pro-democracy Colorado Attorney General in Trump’s America? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gJZXB1co8EOUAWaMlXzyWg2]

Now, she’s ready to do the same as the Colorado Attorney General. But we want to hear from you.
Complete our survey today → How important is having a pro-democracy Colorado Attorney General in Trump’s America? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gJZXB1co8EOUAWaMlXzyWg2]

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Update re: anti-voter bills in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Here’s how you helped stop anti-voter legislation from passing the Georgia General Assembly: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106087911/540382863/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250418_f_LegislativeReportBack_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODhkMGRmMC04YjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZIYMV33bhIFjQIee-gjv5B7qOnPIH7lMG7PgCBNeU3c=&emci=49797ac0-7a1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=288d0df0-8b1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | When the freedom to vote is under attack, this team steps up. Here’s a recent example: **All the way through the final days of Georgia’s most recent legislative session, some lawmakers kept attempting to pass egregious anti-voter bills.** They were trying to ban Georgians from dropping off mail ballots over the weekend before Election Day. They were trying to allow cuts to Saturday early voting for certain local elections. They were trying to give unelected State Election Board members more control over who stays on the voter rolls. And they were trying to enshrine policies that bipartisan elections experts have called out as harmful, like mandated video surveillance of absentee ballot drop boxes and expanded partisan poll watcher access to sensitive areas in elections offices. **But with your support, this team fought back — and NONE of those anti-voter provisions passed the General Assembly.** In close coordination with a pro-voting rights coalition — with near-daily in-person check-ins and strategy sessions at the Capitol — we tracked the very latest elections legislation. We equipped partners and allies with analyses and resources that helped make the case against anti-voter bills. We lobbied legislators to stop or mitigate the damage of extreme proposals. We drove a public advocacy and education campaign that included a grassroots lobby day at the Capitol with university students, community volunteers, and voting rights supporters. We mobilized constituents to call the offices of key legislators. We raised the alarm online and behind the scenes. And we helped prevent these bills from passing. **Now that the General Assembly is set to be out of session for the rest of the year, the Atlanta Journal Constitution noted this “marks the first year since Donald Trump’s narrow loss in 2020” when lawmakers “haven’t changed state election laws.”** Of course, we can’t forget the anti-voter bills that did pass in recent years, from SB 202 in 2021 to SB 189 last year. New Georgia laws have made mass voter purges easier, imposed burdensome voter ID requirements, criminalized handing out food and water to voters in line, and placed unnecessary limits on ballot drop boxes. They represent key planks of a comprehensive agenda to silence the will of the people, because some politicians are so scared of losing power that they’re willing to smother our democracy. We have to keep pressing forward to secure equal access to the ballot box for all voters. The attacks will keep on coming — but this team will be ready to fight back. And it’s because of activists like you. **Thank you, friend****, for everything you do as a member of this pro-voter movement.** With deep gratitude, The Fair Fight Action Team | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106087912/540382864/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250418_f_LegislativeReportBack_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODhkMGRmMC04YjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZIYMV33bhIFjQIee-gjv5B7qOnPIH7lMG7PgCBNeU3c=)**
---
** **
|

clean_body: Here’s how you helped stop anti-voter legislation from passing the Georgia General Assembly: | | | When the freedom to vote is under attack, this team steps up. Here’s a recent example: All the way through the final days of Georgia’s most recent legislative session, some lawmakers kept attempting to pass egregious anti-voter bills. They were trying to ban Georgians from dropping off mail ballots over the weekend before Election Day. They were trying to allow cuts to Saturday early voting for certain local elections. They were trying to give unelected State Election Board members more control over who stays on the voter rolls. And they were trying to enshrine policies that bipartisan elections experts have called out as harmful, like mandated video surveillance of absentee ballot drop boxes and expanded partisan poll watcher access to sensitive areas in elections offices. But with your support, this team fought back — and NONE of those anti-voter provisions passed the General Assembly. In close coordination with a pro-voting rights coalition — with near-daily in-person check-ins and strategy sessions at the Capitol — we tracked the very latest elections legislation. We equipped partners and allies with analyses and resources that helped make the case against anti-voter bills. We lobbied legislators to stop or mitigate the damage of extreme proposals. We drove a public advocacy and education campaign that included a grassroots lobby day at the Capitol with university students, community volunteers, and voting rights supporters. We mobilized constituents to call the offices of key legislators. We raised the alarm online and behind the scenes. And we helped prevent these bills from passing. Now that the General Assembly is set to be out of session for the rest of the year, the Atlanta Journal Constitution noted this “marks the first year since Donald Trump’s narrow loss in 2020” when lawmakers “haven’t changed state election laws.” Of course, we can’t forget the anti-voter bills that did pass in recent years, from SB 202 in 2021 to SB 189 last year. New Georgia laws have made mass voter purges easier, imposed burdensome voter ID requirements, criminalized handing out food and water to voters in line, and placed unnecessary limits on ballot drop boxes. They represent key planks of a comprehensive agenda to silence the will of the people, because some politicians are so scared of losing power that they’re willing to smother our democracy. We have to keep pressing forward to secure equal access to the ballot box for all voters. The attacks will keep on coming — but this team will be ready to fight back. And it’s because of activists like you. Thank you, friend, for everything you do as a member of this pro-voter movement. With deep gratitude, The Fair Fight Action Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: John Fetterman
subject: for the teachers, steelworkers, nurses, cement masons, plasterers and everyone in a union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S)
| | |
---
Hey Derek, it’s John.

Yinz know how I feel: **The Union Way of Life is *sacred*.** You don’t mess with it. You always gotta fight for it.
So I wanted to send a quick update on some union wins lately and how we can keep working together to fight for what's right. 👇
🩺**Our nurses are getting it done →** From the Geisinger nurses in Luzerne County who just won a new contract to the hospital workers across PA holding the line for fair pay and safe staffing – these folks are doing heroic work every day. I stand with them.
**⚖️ Unions are taking the Trump administration to court → **Trump’s people are trying to strip union membership from *1 million* federal workers. But the unions are suing to fight back, and I'm with them 💯. Attacking union membership is deeply un-American. See yinz in court.
🍽️ **I just introduced a new bill****to support striking workers →** Right now, if you go on strike, you can lose your eligibility for food stamps. It’s messed up. No worker should have to choose between standing up for their rights and feeding their kids.
🔩 **Billionaires are trying to divide and conquer, but they don't know who they're messing with** → Steelworkers, contractors, cement masons, plasterers – they built PA. They paved the roads we drive on and built the schools we send our kids to. While Trump tries to push his union-busting Project 2025 agenda, I'll keep fighting for a future where your skills are valued the way they should be.
All across PA and the country, union folks are holding the line. And I need every single union worker walking the picket line to know that my team and I have their back here in Washington.

**No billionaire, no corporation, no DC lobbyist will ever matter more to me than a union nurse, steelworker, cement mason, plasterer or teacher fighting for what’s right.**
**If you’re in this with me, it would mean a lot if you could[pitch in a few bucks to help keep this grassroots movement powered by regular working folks going](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk66-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S). Every dollar helps keep up the fight for working families in PA + across the country.**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk66-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S)
---
Thanks for keeping this country running.

Union Way of Life. Always.

John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk66-fr-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10046_434096_pYZP-S&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10046%2E434096%2EpYZP-S)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**You are the backbone of this movement, and I wouldn’t be in Washington without you.**

But Peter, we don’t have an endless stream of money at our fingertips, so we have to work _twice as hard_ as everyone else to maintain our momentum.

[So Peter, I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in $3 (or whatever you can spare) to help me reach my $25,000 April goal and join my fight to flip the House? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106088249/540383984/-292812465?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250418_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTBhOGE5OC04ZDFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HcbdjSMseWSERm9IeGY-Qvo0dM-gPKOrtvQgYWVPqG0=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

**THEN:** President Trump pledges to the American people to deport illegal immigrants. President Trump wins a MAJORITY of American votes. He carries out his promise.

**NOW:** Democrats, including corrupt judges, are bending over backward to stop deportations...

Friend, let me be blunt.

It’s time to continue our offense against these Democrats who favor illegal immigrants over American citizens.

Door knocking, phone calls, turning out the vote. That’s how we won over the youth vote in 2024. That’s how we’ll defeat these Democrats again.

Charlie Kirk

Trump and RFK Jr. are pushing policies that will **gut** our healthcare system— _and Americans will pay the price:_

* Scientists are losing their jobs in the name of “efficiency.”

* Healthcare workers are being told to follow RFK’s party line—not medical evidence.

As a doctor and a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, Kim is hearing directly from our public health agencies: they’re already under-resourced and overwhelmed.

Trump and RFK Jr.'s actions are the exact opposite of what we need.

Kim is speaking out, but to break through the noise, it's going to take all of us. clean_body: Dr. Kim Schrier is doing a deepdive, Peter. Peter, When it comes to your healthcare, Kim is a leading voice in Congress—and she’s not staying quiet. She recently joined C-SPAN’s Washington Journal to lay out what’s really at stake under this administration’s dangerous agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Here’s the bottom line: Trump and RFK Jr. are pushing policies that will gut our healthcare system— and Americans will pay the price: Critical research funding is being slashed—leaving lifesaving studies abandoned and safety checks on our food and medicine to fall through the cracks. Scientists are losing their jobs in the name of “efficiency.” Healthcare workers are being told to follow RFK’s party line—not medical evidence. As a doctor and a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, Kim is hearing directly from our public health agencies: they’re already under-resourced and overwhelmed. Trump and RFK Jr.'s actions are the exact opposite of what we need. Kim is speaking out, but to break through the noise, it's going to take all of us. = Together, we can protect science, protect healthcare, and protect the truth. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. # Friday, April 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** This week’s _Feel Good Flyover_ features Geraldine “Jerry” Leo, who rang in her 100th birthday by casually holding a five-minute plank—while the rest of us are still recovering from attempting one last Tuesday. Consider this your official reminder: it’s never too late to out-plank us all. We’re sponsored this afternoon by [Money.com Pet Insurance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGK5SAQRb_G7DqUljFm4WIgZNcDDQM9O4mxTBxMfBi7w_v74fUbmA_obdXh3st5f7Wvc0zxWH_OO5mwBltDtgddZ6JaqdgyH8vm87pRybwHcLHUzc_3xQoQ3QvIF66tn2O6W9l4E4gEYUOG97IDUKrjzWZIaaGCGxAxBPCLRI2oAfRMDp1TTTSPNJBcCwAJQ6u4RE-Dk4t2Xd9xJoF8rLm0f3I86kYh3fMnlXbJe5PMVuvtZPiDiYmJ6bqudqd4VCoL3eqDYWLCfkDxxsT0--1djL8eKE4f0TMcuVS9ZkKdH44zHANRsmvO3v5reb4Ew_G_mecNGY4gLddfOppi_O2KKcVT9UzCus8xfU2s33b7acTfAAAA__8r-4mu). Their latest offers are featured in today’s edition.

## Ranch Dog Helps Rescue Missing Toddler
A missing 2-year-old boy who wandered seven miles through the rugged Arizona wilderness [was found safe](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnSAUhJ9Gd5gDIuqCRTfubrddGoSDnhbhBug19ukbm77Bv_uSSSYz34_X-jIUKO7fzYna736tPq0RrxKwVsxrNtEeLu0H5sRHgI1yPZy57SpADAwk49PqDIV7la3THlFg36LmoxwAlBp4e2g5WAMwK3CzUDjyiQs1KPR2Amd837eknzaQfBIAEuZOcdk7nDdpp20YB95IQEc15e5nolgP9OFOH8ydTWcb9FHruzT9t0YsjViu6-riZp8XT96I5cFGLL8L-08nlUJxZzU5FzCzy4Rf6NjITgpYmAkpIjOZ_qRo2EXBYY5YCgvoWDEe682yiSzbaARwOc5t1u59UQhU1NhI2E9D4d-6-mWtHy3-BgAA__-gLY2p), thanks in part to a local ranch dog named Buford. The [toddler disappeared](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnsbcbAcYmHhi6ZEvXjhb4XgwtNhaQWO7TV8krdD7Sr6Pv6z7dTYhhWz7NStotbqouTRsdJVKtlKdsttljWjzlxBVjNuTq0ZzzJJjogUng1wlNiOckW9SOSFDXkuZK9owNQ89br1EqnBkJJq3F0XE3KuSd7RUNaGdh2qBfNSb5VTAm2XgZuOyQRivnq-1VzxvJCENN-fKdwlY9uXimJ-XLnNY2al_rXpruoxG3Rtx2Snuk19SI2xpKCdsCAk4yGVJEOEz8IQQFa4hUoPqcHosHk8Nv2gwcISLljUoBSy5lAkuvQqYyPwjBnvBWoVwA0wKcKz7woW-zxv0IMYYyqEayZTUhvg_Wf8s-tfgLAAD__5MSj5E) from his home wearing just a tank top and pajama pants, prompting a massive overnight search involving dozens of rescuers and a helicopter. The boy was discovered 16 hours later by rancher Scottie Dunton, who noticed his loyal dog Buford, an Anatolian Pyrenees bred for guarding livestock, escorting a small blond child alongside a fence on his property. clean_body: A missing 2-year-old boy who wandered seven miles through the rugged Arizona wilderness , thanks in part to a local ranch dog named Buford. | | | | | | Friday, April 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! This week’s Feel Good Flyover features Geraldine “Jerry” Leo, who rang in her 100th birthday by casually holding a five-minute plank—while the rest of us are still recovering from attempting one last Tuesday. Consider this your official reminder: it’s never too late to out-plank us all. We’re sponsored this afternoon by . Their latest offers are featured in today’s edition. | Ranch Dog Helps Rescue Missing Toddler A missing 2-year-old boy who wandered seven miles through the rugged Arizona wilderness , thanks in part to a local ranch dog named Buford. The from his home wearing just a tank top and pajama pants, prompting a massive overnight search involving dozens of rescuers and a helicopter. The boy was discovered 16 hours later by rancher Scottie Dunton, who noticed his loyal dog Buford, an Anatolian Pyrenees bred for guarding livestock, escorting a small blond child alongside a fence on his property. Buford had stayed with the child for at least a mile, guiding him across “He loves kids,” Dunton said. “I imagine he wouldn’t leave him once he’d found him.” Baby Defies Odds Thanks to Generous Stranger A Florida baby diagnosed with a rare and fatal brain disorder is defying medical odds thanks to an . Millie Longhenry was born with a severe congenital condition and sent home on hospice care, but her parents turned to that showed promise. When they could no longer afford treatment, a former patient of her neurologist stepped in to pay the full bill, giving Millie a second shot at life. Wonky the Lamb Warms Hearts On a small farm off the west coast of Scotland, named Wonky has become an unlikely internet star. Born with a , she’s now thriving—thanks to her owner, Rhoda Meek, and the videos she’s shared online. Clips of Wonky’s wobbly steps and joyful runs into Rhoda’s arms have captured millions of hearts, with commenters calling her a “fluffy warrior” and a symbol of resilience. These days, Wonky spends her time chasing hens, munching grass, and , with her crooked stride adding to her unique appeal. | Flying together with our sponsor We all love our pets, but we certainly don’t love it when an unexpected vet bill throws our finances into disarray. It’s better to avoid this scenario altogether with pet insurance. Pet insurance can help offset the costs of covered accidents, illnesses, And with some plans offering up to 90% reimbursement, it’s enough to keep everyone’s tail wagging. | ➤A Canadian WWII veteran received over 1,700 birthday cards after requesting 100 for his 100th birthday, sparking global support and gratitude for his service. () ➤ Brothers in Tennessee kept their family farm dry during devastating floods with a handmade levee, captured in stunning helicopter footage. () ➤ A missing yorkie was found 300 miles away in Mississippi, where frat brothers had adopted him as "Benji" before reuniting him with his overjoyed owner after discovering his true identity. () ➤ An 11-year-old Oklahoma boy stole the show at his school talent night by flawlessly imitating over 50 bird calls, earning cheers and newfound fame. () ➤ Elephants at San Diego Zoo Safari Park formed a protective circle around their calves during Monday’s 5.2-magnitude quake, shielding them until the tremors passed. () ➤ A Long Island woman, celebrating her 100th birthday, held a five-minute plank at the local YMCA, stunning her aerobics class and proving age is just a number. Enjoy a lush, healthy lawn backed by our satisfaction guarantee. | Watch a cute little horse recover and thrive with his Golden Retriever siblings. | A bear walks into a bar and says,"Give me a whiskey and...uhm... a cola." "Why the big pause?" asks the bartender. | Flying together with our sponsor We all want the best for our pets, but premium care comes at a premium price. Whether it’s an unexpected emergency or a chronic condition, veterinary costs can pile up quicker than doo-doo at a dog park. That’s where pet insurance comes in—it’s not just about cutting costs, but ensuring you can say “yes” to critical treatments without straining your budget. | "If Wonky can keep going with her head literally on sideways, I can get through this week.” — inspired by Wonky the Lamb | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 ---|---

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team — Jason’s had it with the GOP’s cowardice toward Donald Trump.

Over and over again, he’s heard privately from Republican lawmakers who don’t agree with the President’s agenda.

Yet here’s the thing: Republicans won’t admit it in public — they’re too afraid to stand up to Trump. They didn’t speak out when Trump told us what he was going to do as president. Now, they privately complain about their unpopular policies, like taking away health care by cutting Medicaid and giving tax breaks to billionaires like Elon Musk.

Jason’s not afraid to stand up to the president. He’s continuing to call out Trump, Elon Musk, or anyone that’s hurting Colorado and working families.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25]

Jason knows that we need leaders who have the courage to stand up to Trump or anyone who gets in the way of real progress.

That’s the type of servant leadership Jason models every day, and he’s fighting to elect more leaders like that who will hold President Trump accountable.

Please chip in to help Jason defeat cowardly Republicans and elect leaders who will stand up for what’s right. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25]

Earlier this month, the attorney general of Texas sued the city of San Antonio over the city council's vote to spend $100,000 on helping residents travel out of state for abortion care.

Texas AG Ken Paxton already sued Austin over a similar fund, and he's doing everything he can to prevent Texans from accessing the reproductive health care they need.

That's why it's so important that we have strong pro-choice women like San Antonio mayoral candidate **Gina Ortiz Jones** leading our cities and fighting back against anti-choice Republicans like Paxton. **Gina Ortiz Jones isn't afraid to stand up to extremists like Ken Paxton. **

A former under secretary of the Air Force, Gina has fought for our freedoms, security, and for every American's ability to achieve the American dream. She has the leadership experience necessary to enact real change, and having grown up in the community, she's a staunch advocate for the people of San Antonio.

**At a time when mayors are on the front lines in the fight for abortion access, Gina Ortiz Jones is exactly the type of leader we need to stand up to anti-choice extremism.**

clean_body: Will you split a donation between Gina Ortiz Jones and EMILYs List? | = Peter, Earlier this month, the attorney general of Texas sued the city of San Antonio over the city council's vote to spend $100,000 on helping residents travel out of state for abortion care. Texas AG Ken Paxton already sued Austin over a similar fund, and he's doing everything he can to prevent Texans from accessing the reproductive health care they need. That's why it's so important that we have strong pro-choice women like San Antonio mayoral candidate Gina Ortiz Jones leading our cities and fighting back against anti-choice Republicans like Paxton. = | = Gina Ortiz Jones isn't afraid to stand up to extremists like Ken Paxton. A former under secretary of the Air Force, Gina has fought for our freedoms, security, and for every American's ability to achieve the American dream. She has the leadership experience necessary to enact real change, and having grown up in the community, she's a staunch advocate for the people of San Antonio. At a time when mayors are on the front lines in the fight for abortion access, Gina Ortiz Jones is exactly the type of leader we need to stand up to anti-choice extremism. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Interim Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Trump’s chaos in Washington, from pauses on federal funding to slashing critical programs Jersey families rely on, from tariffs to mass layoffs of hardworking federal employees, **has only hurt families. Jersey needs a Governor with a plan to combat this chaos.**

I’ve spent my career solving problems and delivering real results—bringing new jobs to New Jersey, expanding the Child Tax Credit, passing commonsense gun safety laws, and fixing our roads, bridges, and rail. **Now, I’m ready to do the same as Governor.**

**[Donate $10 here to help support my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106089791/540389051/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250418_FR_LowerPrices_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGExOTUzYy05MTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcf3SL7srektqKM2mAWwAjyoCelKSXooKBe2JSEdOk=&emci=3dbf0ee0-681c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cda1953c-911c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**

Josh

Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone.Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. body:
As a husband and father, my heart goes out to the families who were affected by yet another mass shooting. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106089883/540389780/29580466?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M3ZmRjZC05MTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4momtHzZiz7nXaK9Hg5sLLqIWry4fvBeg6o4qrZ2Yg=&emci=758e1d9f-7f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=57c7fdcd-911c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6576167)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/xijQj8Ub_ESyHtRt33sKYA2?unsubscribedata=5Re8RdKBXxpxSgO%2B5h1VcYY%2BazRxTKC0Wm%2Bn7i0HK87K6FuJkuAo5cFE%2BZXAGz%2BQ9uaO%2FlRmv6pvQYeaO%2BWt3kU8IhsjQrOZJMffp6TF1qKi4KdEl2EXZanYinlyZfZ0yDvFMQsR8lImVB27blMaCrZZsEZrEPd3q7xBgbWFE3xwYMMVQZPjfiue%2FxMT9Jaxm4%2FR45jkuNwj%2BavE%2BAXHmeuF%2BsUyn1WILPhJUGzCeuyIl28wHKvAge%2FYh7Ryl%2B1hr3eulX92Z618i9Hd0gzpznhVVzMplOUVIzktm913sRE12rmO91F2hl%2F9tuTz7MHT7q66LRJnlf7ytwwxbFigGMf7ZihiD0k0feQfwLkdKUWy1%2FPNQsyZhzIxEqDM%2F6YV8PsgCNorC3121CNLkco1Cfe%2Bc8I6sDtP8JS0k0NMwZk%3D)**

Folks, yesterday the Florida State University community experienced an act of senseless violence that killed 2 people and injured several others. As a husband and father, my heart goes out to the families who were affected by yet another mass shooting. I was there with families after the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas high school, and I’ve seen firsthand the unimaginable pain that these families experienced. I'm thinking of them, and my family's thoughts continue to be with them. But we know that while thoughts and prayers give comfort, they aren't enough to end gun violence. **That takes action.** **[As I recently talked about on Morning Joe, we need to do more to end the threat of gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106089884/540389781/-803653937?v=0Rs2SN2bBQs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M3ZmRjZC05MTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4momtHzZiz7nXaK9Hg5sLLqIWry4fvBeg6o4qrZ2Yg=&emci=758e1d9f-7f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=57c7fdcd-911c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6576167)** That’s why I passed the Marjory Stoneman Douglas Safety Law in the Florida legislature to raise the minimum age for gun purchase to 21, add 3-day waiting periods, and implement red flag laws in our state. It’s why I’ve fought to pass four bills on the national level to prevent gun violence. I’ve consistently fought for commonsense laws that prevent gun violence throughout my career, and I promise to always keep up that fight. Today, I hope we can come together as a nation to hold the victims of this heinous violence in our hearts. **We must continue to heal together.** Standing with you always, \- Jared
| | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065
www.jaredforflorida.com/

clean_body: As a husband and father, my heart goes out to the families who were affected by yet another mass shooting. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | Folks, yesterday the Florida State University community experienced an act of senseless violence that killed 2 people and injured several others. As a husband and father, my heart goes out to the families who were affected by yet another mass shooting. I was there with families after the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas high school, and I’ve seen firsthand the unimaginable pain that these families experienced. I'm thinking of them, and my family's thoughts continue to be with them. But we know that while thoughts and prayers give comfort, they aren't enough to end gun violence. That takes action. That’s why I passed the Marjory Stoneman Douglas Safety Law in the Florida legislature to raise the minimum age for gun purchase to 21, add 3-day waiting periods, and implement red flag laws in our state. It’s why I’ve fought to pass four bills on the national level to prevent gun violence. I’ve consistently fought for commonsense laws that prevent gun violence throughout my career, and I promise to always keep up that fight. Today, I hope we can come together as a nation to hold the victims of this heinous violence in our hearts. We must continue to heal together. Standing with you always, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ to receive fewer emails. Click here to .

name: Becca Balint
subject: This is just cruel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090262/540390794/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxYjVjNi05MjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1BQ78UggDH0KabYIdjOAAghQw1Y85pWgfbmTmaqxKlc=)
---
Peter, Winters get cold in Vermont. _Everyone_ knows that — even Donald Trump. That’s why it should be a no-brainer to ensure people can afford to keep themselves warm. But the Trump administration recently laid off the entire staff at the Department of Health and Human Services overseeing the Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP). **Let’s call this for what it is: A cruel and completely nonsensical decision. ** LIHEAP is a lifeline for 26,000 Vermonters and millions more nationwide. The program helps people heat their homes in the winter without being forced to make the impossible choice between putting food on the table and staying warm. The Trump administration’s decision to fire the _entire_ staff overseeing the program is plain wrong, cruel, and emblematic of a larger problem that they don’t give a damn about anyone besides their billionaire friends. **[While Trump and his far-right allies continue to prioritize billionaires over working families, I’m focused on speaking out against their attacks on Vermonters and vulnerable people across the country. If you can, chip in now to help amplify this message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090263/540390795/-1865709748?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxYjVjNi05MjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1BQ78UggDH0KabYIdjOAAghQw1Y85pWgfbmTmaqxKlc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090264/540390796/-1865709748?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWIxYjVjNi05MjFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1BQ78UggDH0KabYIdjOAAghQw1Y85pWgfbmTmaqxKlc=)

name: Jasmine Smith
subject: Emerge women are leading the charge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
As MAGA extremists try to undo decades of progress, our team here at Emerge is working to train the next class of Emerge women who will take a stand and defend the incredible progress we’ve made.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106090312/540390987/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMDQyZjMyLTkzMWMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ON-bqXgXXBhRV-IYo8g9-tGe_8MYEjGtJG4atG3Z__4=)

| Peter,

Right now, Donald Trump and his allies are pushing extreme policies aimed at rolling back women’s rights, willfully tanking the economy, and threatening funding for critical programs that support and uplift working families.

**But here’s the good news:_more women than ever before are stepping up to run for office!_**

As MAGA extremists try to undo decades of progress, our team here at Emerge is working to train the next class of Emerge women who will take a stand and defend the incredible progress we’ve made.

We’re building a pipeline of future leaders who are ready to join our alums in office to safeguard our most fundamental rights, defend our democracy, and fight for a future that works for all of us – _not just the wealthy and powerful._

With over **1,200** **Emerge alums** currently serving in office, we’re working to help elect even more women to join our alums on the front lines by giving them the tools, training, and support they need to run strong community-focused campaigns and win.
---

We’re less than 100 days into this Trump presidency, and already, he’s cut thousands of jobs, endangered our national security, and caused chaos for our economy through his on-again, off-again tariffs.

Senator Warner is fighting back, but he needs to hear from you.

[_**Take just a minute to take our priorities survey right now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090333/540391068/-2093961581?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYjk0YS05MzFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfcr5wtPn326ZJXNyofpCebIypNMBR_f8MgRok3x8dU=&emci=efc1b3d9-7d1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=594bb94a-931c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237)

Thanks!

To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Mark wants your input

Derek,

Amidst all the Trump administration’s chaos in Washington, Senator Warner understands that it’s easy to get lost in the noise.

That’s why he wanted us to reach out. Derek, we’re asking you – our supporters, donors, voters, and volunteers, to tell us what you envision for the path ahead.

[_**Can you spare a few minutes to take our priorities survey? Senator Warner wants to know what issues you care most about.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090334/540391069/-2093961581?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYjk0YS05MzFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfcr5wtPn326ZJXNyofpCebIypNMBR_f8MgRok3x8dU=&emci=efc1b3d9-7d1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=594bb94a-931c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237) ****[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090335/540391070/-2093961581?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYjk0YS05MzFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfcr5wtPn326ZJXNyofpCebIypNMBR_f8MgRok3x8dU=&emci=efc1b3d9-7d1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=594bb94a-931c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237)**** Look, we’re in the early stages of Trump’s new presidency with a Republican-controlled Congress. We know the GOP’s incessant obstruction is going to curtail the things Democrats wanted to get done this year.

But that doesn’t mean Senator Warner stops fighting – for our federal workers, for affordable health care, for a woman’s right to choose, for our country’s safety and security, and more.

These are the issues that matter to him, and he wants to know if they matter to you, too.

[_**We’d love to tell Senator Warner that you added your input. Can you take our priorities survey today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106090336/540391071/-2093961581?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_SvyForward_250418_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYjk0YS05MzFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zfcr5wtPn326ZJXNyofpCebIypNMBR_f8MgRok3x8dU=&emci=efc1b3d9-7d1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=594bb94a-931c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237)

---

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[put CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins in her place](https://substack.com/redirect/0000871f-3ceb-4b81-8618-7bde6b87bc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for still defending alleged MS-13 member, reported wife-beater and illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0000871f-3ceb-4b81-8618-7bde6b87bc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0000871f-3ceb-4b81-8618-7bde6b87bc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You said everything was done right here,... but this administration has admitted in court that he should not have been deported," Collins pressed Homan.
"I'll let them deal with it," Homan answered. "DOJ can fight this out in the courts,... I'm telling you from my stance, what we've done, I believe was right!"
"Even though it was a U.S. immigration judge that said the one place he cannot go is El Salvador? He could have been deported literally anywhere else and this would not be a fight!" Collins pressed again.
"That was years ago, conditions in this country were different," Homan fired back. "The facts of the case have changed since that first decision!"
Abrego Garcia was arrested in 2019 while loitering outside of a Home Depot alongside MS-13 members. Court records show Abrego Garcia's wife had said that he physically attacked her several times, at least once leaving her with a black eye.
**[Watch Homan stand his ground on CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/0000871f-3ceb-4b81-8618-7bde6b87bc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** against the media's spin job:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0000871f-3ceb-4b81-8618-7bde6b87bc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Conor McGregor tells Tucker Carlson why he feels compelled to save Ireland from mass migration
[](https://substack.com/redirect/df75ece5-135e-4939-aaef-d53b14f2c8b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
MMA legend Conor McGregor sat down with Tucker Carlson to discuss his intentions to run for President of Ireland despite several absurd logistical hurdles, as well as the challenges Ireland is facing amid mass migration facilitated by globalist leaders.
McGregor explained to Carlson that he cannot simply run for president without receiving backing from four county councils and 20 nominations from members of the Oireachtas, Ireland's parliament.
"So you can't just run for president?" Carlson asked, stunned by the amount of red tape in the way. "So how is it a democracy?"
McGregor admitted that Ireland is not truly a democratic country and warned that the globalist interest who have put his people's concerns last will "attempt to tarnish" his reputation to stop him. "I move forward under God, and my nation can see."
"Our public wealth being administered into private hands, enriching people to bring in this influx of illegal mass migration that is changing the fabric of my country," the former UFC fighter explained. "Ireland is very close to losing its Irishness and we will not let that happen."

Public libraries are an invaluable part of our society. They provide the opportunity for people of all ages and from all backgrounds to learn, communicate and participate in their communities – and they must be protected at all costs. name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Listening to everyone and delivering everywhere

body:
Gretchen is delivering real results for hardworking Michiganders and their families in all 83 counties. |
#
---
Team, When Gretchen ran for Governor in 2018, she didn’t write off _any_ part of the state. She showed up _everywhere_ , listened to _everyone_ , and competed for _every_ single vote across the state. **Now, she’s delivering real results for hardworking Michiganders and their families in all 83 counties.** Under her leadership, Michigan has become one of the best places in the country to live, work, and raise a family. She’s worked with Democrats and Republicans to lower costs, raise wages, fix the damn roads, invest in our children’s future, and protect our freedoms — all to ensure that _everyone_ in Michigan has the opportunity to create a better future for themselves and their families. But she’s looking to take her movement even further. That’s why she’s fighting like hell to elect Democratic candidates in all 50 states who will deliver real results for their communities. [**Gretchen’s fight for progress wouldn’t be possible without this grassroots movement, and she’s counting on your help to continue delivering for Michiganders in all 83 counties and supporting Democratic candidates nationwide. The effects of this proposal would be devastating, Peter. More than one-fifth of Coloradans rely on these programs for healthcare – **that’s 1.3 million people across the state.**

Gabe Evans has gone all-in on his support for Trump and his extreme MAGA agenda. He’s voting to make life harder for working families in Colorado, gutting funding for healthcare programs that millions of people rely on, while giving tax breaks to billionaires.

body:
| | | **Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem and Secretary of State Marco Rubio are openly defying court orders to bring the wrongly deported home - a criminal insult to the Constitution.**
**[Tell Congress: IMPEACH Noem and Rubio. End the injustice and restore our democracy.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxD-0o3oHpGQqKIv8D1mO5XfzbFSpQXxqaoB115GnC8ou6yeYp3QuHOqeIy-9Mc9Wnz3YnQqZb6kJSXHdTX4uuoj8YTVDS_sn5TvbxQr1bqL8eqicVBnvP0ckbDu9QafyIs3l6gpiYjN6H5n8QcahRGNdqUw-jvnOEDVYykkouoqIYE6NigOGAnxaxSBAD4S8PefAZw007jz5KcXkvzYN_cp63mrCzZc5as18TXfFxvHLuBC2RHu2y3fCHrql2wjkiLsNd8Pc3kr6qHqjPNMZcO80GZE6U0lvKMPZXXzBuGMM/4fr/C78pqSSRRSOYw9fDTFH4EQ/h0/h001.HOQPZuk2nK5iskZhy_rA7WS7HGg7Xlc4b0nH0RzkLB8)**
* * *
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and Secretary of State Marco Rubio wrongly deported hundreds of Venezuelan men to a brutal Salvadoran prison, depriving them of due process in violation of our Constitution.
_Now they are violating a court order to bring them back, in open defiance of the rule of law_
Despite Noem’s and Rubio’s assertion that these migrants are violent gang members, murderers, and rapists, reporting reveals that 75 percent of them have NO CRIMINAL record.
**Failing to hold Trump officials accountable for their egregious violations will erode our civil protections and strike a significant blow to our weakened democracy!**
******[FIGHT BACK! Sign on and DEMAND that your members of Congress IMPEACH Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxD-0o3oHpGQqKIv8D1mO5XfzbFSpQXxqaoB115GnC8ou6yeYp3QuHOqeIy-9Mc9WnfYlRKeGREaAGUE5TGCDbhpXGVfH7tWCFaQEyv0s6tfZzqryBI1IcETwNjTc79o8Om26S8WkwfVS8VEwf1E6DeLokIdMsOpcEkSoiHtRMguwkYtVrdJchE1Wq6CMoqK20t6GpiVl-YvJQiFXRjNq0VDXMOaoklnXG6WqsVkXoTwuVR2DHCuc3wBVmGDBdZ7wxCCaik1-BH3WCXpQ-hgg94EGZXh6VBKfh6957-fQls4k/4fr/C78pqSSRRSOYw9fDTFH4EQ/h1/h001.1hFDu_JuiuwmzH6zj6xDAEmLPiWaQRoygGNQEgBeiyI)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxD-0o3oHpGQqKIv8D1mO5XfzbFSpQXxqaoB115GnC8ou6yeYp3QuHOqeIy-9Mc9WnYp8oYTVU8MlnKt7aHU4Os1BWYK9wf2o9bXcB8wPWdu1qMm0Z2ixRr5bnT31g69ZL6wD6kilA9IpqEIRAZp7pH_Nupjzjd9WVeLs5fzGGIbsM9Pf03f-A3ua9ERIQjldt92n3CQoMl6nHLPKg-E8RciweathVXPiWRuZNGY5Mx1ho5vIxZqR-5BCyW9jUiPkawvHqkmUxZeMIvprekInD68Hp67Jko5MnG2zj8TnK1X0/4fr/C78pqSSRRSOYw9fDTFH4EQ/h2/h001.icJbBpfxZczznSQqaG8N_qeafwhVdaErNCHQhrHG75c)

One deportee, a husband and father who has lived in the US for 14 years, was here legally, and had committed no crime, was admittedly deported due to “an administrative error.”

Many of these men were in the middle of the asylum process and have no ties to gangs or criminal activity.

The Trump administration is in contempt of court, refusing to return these men while exploiting this tragedy for photo opportunities and propaganda.

**Cruelty and fear are the point. DHS Secretary Kristi Noem and SOS Marco Rubio have illegally condemned innocent men to suffer indefinitely in a brutal prison, and they are looking for ways to send US citizens too! They must face the consequences!**

The stock market is crashing and rising only to crash again, all at Trump’s whim, taking your retirement and college savings with it. His tariffs are sending everyday costs up - from energy to groceries to cars. Meanwhile, people will lose their jobs as manufacturing moves out of the United States. It’s a disaster. And while people are worried about grocery costs and putting food on the table, **Donald Trump is on the golf course at Mar-a-Lago, bragging about his golf scores.** It’s elitist, anti-American, and absolute bullshit. name: Beth Davidson
subject: NY-17 is ready for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We wanted to share some important updates about our campaign to flip NY-17 and take back the House.
| [](https://fight4progress.org/davidson?t=ovnpOnDQMGos&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-18_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, we wanted to share some important updates about our campaign to flip NY-17 and take back the House.

**Here’s why this race matters:**
* NY-17 is **one of just three Republican-held districts that Kamala Harris won in 2024** — making it one of the most flippable districts in the country.

* National experts have just named NY-17 **a total TOSS-UP** — meaning it’s anyone’s game, and we can win this.

* **Beth is running to defeat MAGA Republican Mike Lawler** , who has repeatedly failed to deliver for the Hudson Valley and is siding with Donald Trump and his disastrous policies that are already hurting our families.

* Republicans have one of the **slimmest majorities in modern history** , which means flipping this seat is key to taking back the House and putting power back in the hands of the people.

| [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://fight4progress.org/davidson?t=BCuYJ4vRfLqF&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-18_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, the contribution you make today will help us build a campaign that can defeat the outside money we know is coming—and send Mike Lawler packing once and for all. Together, we will send a message that NY-17 is ready for change.

[_**Can we count on you to contribute to Beth’s campaign and Fight For Progress today to flip this seat?**_](https://fight4progress.org/davidson?t=frxhlGsesz3i&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-18_1&amount=25)

National experts have just named NY-17 a total TOSS-UP — meaning it’s anyone’s game, and we can win this. Beth is running to defeat MAGA Republican Mike Lawler , who has repeatedly failed to deliver for the Hudson Valley and is siding with Donald Trump and his disastrous policies that are already hurting our families. Republicans have one of the slimmest majorities in modern history , which means flipping this seat is key to taking back the House and putting power back in the hands of the people. | Peter, the contribution you make today will help us build a campaign that can defeat the outside money we know is coming—and send Mike Lawler packing once and for all. subject: TAKE ACTION: A Constitutional Crisis - Bring Kilmar Home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092369/540397540/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDllZmQ5YS05OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CVOsVQUTHk8o16emgIM2HQFYshaiLv3tkmyh4uhD2Y=)
Friends,
We are at the start of a constitutional crisis. Donald Trump is defying a 9-0 Supreme Court order to return **Kilmar Abrego Garcia back to the United States.**
By now, you've likely heard about **Kilmar** , a Salvadoran immigrant granted legal protected status in 2019 by a Trump-appointed judge. Yet nearly a month ago, Kilmar was **abducted** by federal agents, **deported without a hearing** , and sent to a **maximum-security prison in El Salvador** with no charges, no due process, and no explanation.
When the administration admitted Kilmar’s deportation was an **"administrative error"** , they still did nothing. Now they’re ignoring the Supreme Court.
It’s unprecedented and dangerous for our Democracy. This is not just about one man, **this is about the rule of law and basic human rights.**
📣 [Sign our petition ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092370/540397541/-397768190?refcode=em250418&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDllZmQ5YS05OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CVOsVQUTHk8o16emgIM2HQFYshaiLv3tkmyh4uhD2Y=&emci=4f0e9264-961c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2d9efd9a-991c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16877361)[today to demand that the Trump administration bring Kilmar home to his wife and children. We must show them that the American people will not sit quietly while our Democracy is dismantled.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092371/540397542/-397768190?refcode=em250418&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDllZmQ5YS05OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CVOsVQUTHk8o16emgIM2HQFYshaiLv3tkmyh4uhD2Y=&emci=4f0e9264-961c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2d9efd9a-991c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16877361)

[TAKE ACTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092372/540397543/-397768190?refcode=em250418&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDllZmQ5YS05OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CVOsVQUTHk8o16emgIM2HQFYshaiLv3tkmyh4uhD2Y=&emci=4f0e9264-961c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2d9efd9a-991c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16877361)

Senator Chris Van Hollen made great progress last night when he was able to actually meet with Kilmar for a wellness check. This just goes to show, the pressure is working! I thank Senator Van Hollen for his courage and persistence in this fight. Now let’s keep it going.
Republicans have denied my request for a Democratic delegation to visit El Salvador and advocate for Kilmar’s release. But I refuse to stay silent while our Constitution is shredded and innocent lives are destroyed.
Trump has already hinted that American citizens are next.
👉[**Add your name now.** The fight for Kilmar is the fight for all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092373/540397544/-397768190?refcode=em250418&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDllZmQ5YS05OTFjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CVOsVQUTHk8o16emgIM2HQFYshaiLv3tkmyh4uhD2Y=&emci=4f0e9264-961c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2d9efd9a-991c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16877361)
Let's go,
Robert

clean_body: = Friends, We are at the start of a constitutional crisis. Donald Trump is defying a 9-0 Supreme Court order to return Kilmar Abrego Garcia back to the United States. By now, you've likely heard about Kilmar , a Salvadoran immigrant granted legal protected status in 2019 by a Trump-appointed judge. Yet nearly a month ago, Kilmar was abducted by federal agents, deported without a hearing , and sent to a maximum-security prison in El Salvador with no charges, no due process, and no explanation. When the administration admitted Kilmar’s deportation was an "administrative error" , they still did nothing. Now they’re ignoring the Supreme Court. It’s unprecedented and dangerous for our Democracy. This is not just about one man, this is about the rule of law and basic human rights. 📣 Senator Chris Van Hollen made great progress last night when he was able to actually meet with Kilmar for a wellness check. This just goes to show, the pressure is working! I thank Senator Van Hollen for his courage and persistence in this fight. Now let’s keep it going. Republicans have denied my request for a Democratic delegation to visit El Salvador and advocate for Kilmar’s release. But I refuse to stay silent while our Constitution is shredded and innocent lives are destroyed. Trump has already hinted that American citizens are next. 👉 Let's go, Robert * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

It could be the difference between hardworking Americans being able to put food on their tables or needing to choose between paying bills and feeding their kids.
It could be the difference between Democrats flipping the House blue and issuing a critical check on Donald Trump’s power or handing Republicans a trifecta for another two years.
This campaign isn’t funded by billionaire megadonors like Elon Musk. It’s a movement of small-dollar grassroots donors who pitch in what they can, when they can, that fuels this movement.

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. It’s my job to make sure our team has the resources we need to support Dr. Ruiz’s fight for CA-25 in Congress, and right now, we’re $2,786 short of our $10,000 mid-month goal. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = The $10,000 goal our team set out to meet by tonight is more than just a number. It could be the difference between defending critical programs like Social Security and Medicaid or witnessing millions of Americans go without the benefits that allow them to thrive. It could be the difference between hardworking Americans being able to put food on their tables or needing to choose between paying bills and feeding their kids. It could be the difference between Democrats flipping the House blue and issuing a critical check on Donald Trump’s power or handing Republicans a trifecta for another two years. Team: In the face of Trump's chaos, **_real_ leaders like Kamala Harris are stepping up and calling on Democrats _everywhere_ to bravely fight back.**

**If we fail to answer her call, Trump and his allies will think we're rolling over and turning tail.** We're about to hit Trump's 100th day back in office, and if we show weakness now, there's no telling what he'll try to get away with next!

We've launched an EMERGENCY petition to _prove_ that Democrats will NEVER back down from this fight. More than 879 grassroots supporters in Pennsylvania have already stepped up and signed on -- but our records indicate that you're not one of them! **We need to know that you're with us, so please:**

**[Join THOUSANDS of Democrats everywhere standing against the MAGA agenda. Add your name to show you DEFINITELY oppose Trump!](http://go.dscc.org/go/21477?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250418-LivePetition-HarrisCourageSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250418-LivePetition-HarrisCourageSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=20073%2E9716520%2E5nuIK2)**

**For Trump, this isn't about right or wrong. It's about revenge.**
Attorney General Letitia James's office has been holding this administration accountable at every attempt to strip away our freedoms, silence our voices, and undermine our democracy.

So now, he's lashing out – trying to discredit her with politically motivated attacks and threatening to prosecute her.
**Letitia James knows Trump's playbook all too well – and she's not afraid to fight back. # [#]
Peter, there are just HOURS left before our first mid-month deadline of the quarter expires, and we need all hands on deck.

This is our first chance to get ahead, and we need to lay the right foundation to show that the Texas Organizing Project PAC has people power behind it.

Our mobilization depends on people like you chipping in what they can, when they can, so that we can keep doing our work on the ground. With everything going on between the Texas Legislature and Trump’s administration, there’s no time to waste.

Fighting back starts now, and it starts with us. Is there anything you can chip in to bridge the gap before the clock runs out?

name: Randy Villegas
subject: Most don’t know this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106092846/540399039/701031030?refcode=em-4.18.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNkNGQ3ZGQtOWIxYy1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KcmeOWHGQ8zgEVvEI-DqqI6xJPFpvBHKKGd4gRYhfj8=) Hi there, it's Randy. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. **That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on.** He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. That’s why I’m running. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on. People are ready for change. Trump and his billionaire lackeys are not the Kids First leaders our children deserve — it’s time to get them out of Washington.

Our victory in Wisconsin and hard fought battle in Florida prove that people are rejecting Trump and Musk’s chaotic actions. They put kids last and are tearing down institutions that support our kids' lives.

The White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention was gone less than 72 hours into Trump’s term. Now, the Trump administration is dismantling the Department of Education, the agency responsible for protecting students in public schools, supporting our teachers, and ensuring every child gets a fair shot at success. **_It’s time for a change._**

But here’s the thing: We cannot get rid of these disastrous leaders without you. We must seize the moment and continue on the path to real progress. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to donate anything you can, no matter how big or small, today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsm92z_9kg8EwjzhMXy50svKkLVZVd6V87biWoa7qY3YlV_uff_VXR6poO5vUiaEo8HUc1MiX-dsiPJNfZKsrslmJF6bUnlKq_km9egBH_pfiEHh4j9A1MAO5XWEvO-IFpk1UcYrd1-fCV409Vv7KfmA8YFy1DSzPY8NKZzJYghdHauFS0MIZYOtuOoWt-fn-H_fNdcUZIU_ysAb0Mcu89UWwEB0ogTU41prk-wUsqGbCB-YyLM-Qpj1xvGrsfI7AZqzdCHtY-lmp7GCRGJfKKNSrLFPnJMrknP0NSNTHqWV5qT5913FKo8BXj-vqwLcvpnIQ6NzskUOz698OifCaI4COyvEF9KyaHrjMVbBYdP7O8hgc63u2eUYmFt1riHt3pGUXGcURPe8pSxlGFKH-T8HV6Ehr0o53vtKpcZyy6WbDo5KLVrbzc8Py8fNuqjvta0bAlUXiYPU0DEtP_zp-7X/4fr/c91AfGirQkGZHS-b1JBLGA/h5/h001.50sZcGQBWOnM5KeB0krwhhA3M9W47DO39yKp2ZkvY_g)_**

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Our country is tired of Trump and his MAGA extremism. The evidence? Just a few weeks ago, Judge Susan Crawford won by incredible margins in Wisconsin despite running against the richest man in the world (Elon) AND Florida Democrats cut Republicans' margin by nearly 20 points! People are ready for change. Trump and his billionaire lackeys are not the Kids First leaders our children deserve — it’s time to get them out of Washington. | | | | Our victory in Wisconsin and hard fought battle in Florida prove that people are rejecting Trump and Musk’s chaotic actions. They put kids last and are tearing down institutions that support our kids' lives. The White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention was gone less than 72 hours into Trump’s term. Now, the Trump administration is dismantling the Department of Education, the agency responsible for protecting students in public schools, supporting our teachers, and ensuring every child gets a fair shot at success. It’s time for a change. But here’s the thing: We cannot get rid of these disastrous leaders without you. We must seize the moment and continue on the path to real progress.
